body:
Your special sneak peek at our national TV ads.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=a0ab9ad07c&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# DONOR EXCLUSIVE
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, Our campaign is on the rise, and we have big things planned for the next couple of weeks. The RNC may have blocked us from the last debate, despite doing everything necessary to qualify for it, but they can’t stop us from sharing our message of common-sense solutions to the American people. We’ve got a country to save, so we’re hitting the airwaves to share our message with the entire country. I’m sharing this message exclusively with the donors like you who have helped share our vision for American restoration. Thank you for believing in us. [**WATCH OUR NATIONAL T.V. SPOT NOW BEFORE WE GO LIVE**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7b1a78b7cf&e=0be619cbaa) I can’t wait for the ad to be shown in homes across America. **But I’m going to be honest with you, as I always am.** [**Television ad campaigns like this are expensive. We need all the help we can get to make sure this message makes MAXIMUM IMPACT. Your donation, no matter how small, will directly impact our ability to share this ad far and wide ahead of the GOP presidential debate at the end of the month.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=e00d5e4ac8&e=0be619cbaa) The RNC tried to shut us down. But I stood up to them, and thousands of people responded to our independent conservative campaign. [**You know I will never stop fighting for you. But we need 50,000 donations and a 3 percent share in at least three national polls to make the next debate stage. Every dollar we raise gets us closer to that pivotal stage. Every dollar sends a message to them that WE THE PEOPLE will not be ignored.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=b9c5061de8&e=0be619cbaa) Americans are sick of the status quo that benefits special interests. They are tired of an unaccountable political class who’s ignoring the issues that matter to them. **I’m not afraid to stand up for patriotic Americans like you.** Since I don’t owe anything to the Washington D.C. establishment or their billionaire buddies, I am the only candidate who is willing to address the issues that really matter. I will prioritize addressing the crisis of fatherlessness that’s at the heart of American decline. On day one, I will fire the Soros prosecutors who are unleashing violent criminals on our great cities. I will restore economic freedom, unleashing the American entrepreneurial spirit to create more economic opportunities for hard working Americans to thrive. With your help, we can bring about a new American Golden Age. I hope we can count on your continued support. Thank you,
**Larry Elder**
GOP Candidate for President
---
[P.S. The corrupt GOP establishment is trying to silence our campaign. But, with Bidenomics, a weaponized bureaucracy, the epidemic of fatherlessness, and the destruction of law and order in our country, we have no choice but to speak up. Please, give whatever you can today to help us reach as many Americans as possible.](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=5883c6146e&e=0be619cbaa)

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69319536/425766813/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmY4ZDNjMi0xMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOLcDBJDAYqededWlEFwHYYUy8QbAcYJXXh0hM-0ECg=)

**[Can you take a few minutes to fill out our September issues survey and let me know where you stand on the latest from Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69319537/425766814/-1446378350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmY4ZDNjMi0xMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOLcDBJDAYqededWlEFwHYYUy8QbAcYJXXh0hM-0ECg=&emci=36d7f38b-0d4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=02f8d3c2-134d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)** | [Take The Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69319538/425766815/-1446378350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmY4ZDNjMi0xMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOLcDBJDAYqededWlEFwHYYUy8QbAcYJXXh0hM-0ECg=&emci=36d7f38b-0d4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=02f8d3c2-134d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)
---

As we close out the Summer months, there are number of major issues being considered in Washington:
**» This week, Congress is working to reach a deal to avoid a government shutdown and keep federal offices fully functioning.** Kevin McCarthy's extreme allies are already threatening a shutdown if their extreme, far-right demands aren't met.

**»**** Democrats in the Senate are moving forward with an ethics complaint against Supreme Court Justices.** This comes in the wake of more revelations of possible ethics violations by Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito.

**» The probe into former President Trump’s interference in the 2020 Presidential Election is still underway.**
I want to hear from you on these issues and more. What you share will help inform our decisions throughout our campaign and help me better understand what's top of mind for folks across our district and beyond.

**[If you have a few minutes to spare, use this link to take our September Strategy and Issues Survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69319539/425766816/-1446378350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmY4ZDNjMi0xMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOLcDBJDAYqededWlEFwHYYUy8QbAcYJXXh0hM-0ECg=&emci=36d7f38b-0d4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=02f8d3c2-134d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)**

Kevin McCarthy's extreme allies are already threatening a shutdown if their extreme, far-right demands aren't met. » Democrats in the Senate are moving forward with an ethics complaint against Supreme Court Justices. This comes in the wake of more revelations of possible ethics violations by Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito. » The probe into former President Trump’s interference in the 2020 Presidential Election is still underway. I want to hear from you on these issues and more. What you share will help inform our decisions throughout our campaign and help me better understand what's top of mind for folks across our district and beyond. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69319694/425777538/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjkwMzg2Ni0xNzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riTX0KGMsFB1pYvRsXZFkz90Qa84jfP0AJrE7WBxy1E=&emci=12903866-174d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=16903866-174d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | Yesterday, the Senate came back into session, and I returned to DC from the August state work period, where I traveled across Oregon and connected with the people who make our state great. Now, I'm continuing the fight to secure a better future for generations to come. **We've got a LOT to do to continue to ensure that every American has the opportunity to thrive.** So, as we prepare for a busy fall in the Senate, I want to ask you: What issues matter most to you? | | Friend, Just when you thought the crisis at our southern border couldn’t get any worse, the Left opens the floodgates—literally. U.S. officials who should be safeguarding our country have [welded open 114 gates](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5iT57l0kQMnTXLWFjOpcZ4tRUSn3ruNcKK2oC8FT-8kiaacvIxPuEVSqka39FNYSygioOeXgwBMsrzGzuqoPmP5YPX3s-4KMkCditXlXL7GRrtNVGFk0W8aNbULr_tmwSgJYz958BJWh-06K__pUmIcM8vJfk2IosIyIgaVfJXzHxx850JDuD3c54BNN7ik59ix3ZLSNCsyJTfyZqdFt-lmo1h8H4xovsV9LlIC5kwqo1pX53R-_eNBVuLHf1pORnTA5eEkd85IPjCTHnTnP5mQ%3D) along the Arizona border under the guise of “environmental concerns” during monsoon season. The result? Roughly 1,400 migrants waltzing right into America _every single day_. **[>> Donate $5 to send a message to the Biden administration that we have had enough of their destructive open-border policies.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5roPWoh1PbjzEeuS2diqniVi9W7sPSXmg3vOXj6kq7H5tkI-bE5OG-B-RhKILvdln4XF4QZspV42wByMGPEBGo-kM7g9eELCsjU8B9ir4s-7yg1YB72nuFao4zX0pL34cApaKh_vwVfpYCIUh3Z2AelqdvP8tMmQ6TgBI4vTAIx1uxUNn4pH_YadY3tMwXz1MlXyggTLlhAswPRqeuzL84anw8hFERmqsTBU2a8m4o--0Ek0R7s_Vz-Z6WfNO5WqCTAop1u7_Ml8X9ijSN_yC3TmQrSTLYVyLi26LUgi4DSsfnMZsLeyMbk3ulWDHxkag71Irx3Hl2UbS5YseoXZYzA%3D)** Imagine leaving the front door of your home wide open for weeks on end. It’s insanity, and we can’t go on like this. Tim [paid a visit](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5qOpX1oZqDO2vPolxj_B8aRxNl3LyUyGUI1iLijpm-EvGPuGacf-0yQ_MOMgg9frQSNya6XGsdHdljeFbnnwNl02pd6VDxX3iCz6h5P_oRt0hKgnzn7KA5xEBsILLg6K6rJOAfhOwilhlizRJe1KipJG7Ogbworwd3_6ATaxadsfu2rWlE5W1oZoJwMXO9Pv4_4-t3znftd6m4HWYuEbGKWtUjKWiOK2g5IffK6f3qorAwiQmsQ7ADfCG6xM5M2u9g%3D%3D) to our southern border just six months ago, and since then, the situation has only gotten worse. **[Don't let Democrats continue to dodge this issue. Will you help Tim and our fellow Republicans fight for border security?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5roPWoh1PbjzEeuS2diqniVi9W7sPSXmg3vOXj6kq7H5tkI-bE5OG-B-RhKILvdln4XF4QZspV42wByMGPEBGo-kM7g9eELCsjU8B9ir4s-7yg1YB72nuFao4zX0pL34cApaKh_vwVfpYCIUh3Z2AelqdvP8tMmQ6TgBI4vTAIx1uxUNn4pH_YadY3tMwXz1MoxGKj6yV-paWMeUYo97CdtKSThgnP_qje5dMmv3e5aVf4PC0ofkc_Jks2FRV-emCVLpi-K4ycGNmnBhtgPcj3ayZjFlsBxzcn182gVloexBm9cFokOsYxIT7kRkSNfBcrG4_66kAY_6h1k_sgmtd9A%3D)**

For the first time since President Biden took over, more [families](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5it9aMTxyQgUCuiCUwx177dpyWamttvg46nNosB9zQaGP-Gi3-LPlUfErrO0okuQotwGYAQMKk7Fxl49k1CJuxVy1nDFUvH05tsyCaV23-IsO3RM_eQUCMa4WXW2t600Uo7JOKZGSsXlFd7gejRi-o1eLyY7ZHVkfPObEUWEsrhLqFfYR6ceAOzcc_QlOzXZP8IPs1-dA8Yi6rrn7g7stw8Krb2jtzNX7JAgWe_Vjk92A7-HMmdYamie_D30CsmxtRh1bos7XPS3VFpoz4O_lo4ZfDIXiSeDnYA2poI6wDT_clXoQWJ_dTVwRQbbfvZ9a3F3UmgcIfPLg3zGPpZdO6s%3D) are coming across the border than just single adults. As the numbers continue to surge, our border patrol agents are dramatically outnumbered. It’s a [threat to their safety](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=139431610ece48518cf135a1c5dbc1dd&_e=iGQtoCVC1vdHfFqbKJBa5gZjwpwwgONmIapOSvTN9_obpH5l-l4gZqTjYp2LJRpXMIysSTs-GihrjS-s-EymborNjGToZ5JLpeG6xOwJu5xh8wiz_It4rOAtUQxVATIzZ0fnqWu05NYTiLEwc8V3pjYQOiGdND4iF6s4tXQjc6_n3jCOLvLsXmu_q7BRy3JxK2Z2dE1XtaDe1KI7-KqeW4ukA2NgwteZDNp8EStXrT-2x-wXLZD41Obmklh6APqY-53fZBExbhpSdMXoTPOlHeVIiIrlpPtbQNblNYUp6rjtLXwZOgyBQIVg8_rpkvRE) and the safety of all Americans. But I refuse to be part of the Left’s televised spectacle as they weaponize the legal system to try and make me look like a criminal and list over a dozen FALSE CHARGES against me on live TV. Instead, I want to make today a MASSIVE grassroots fundraising day. When you contribute $1, $5, $15, or $24, it signals to the Deep State that the American people peacefully stand in solidarity with our movement and will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the tyrants and crooks who are destroying America. And the truth is – all of the many, many “small-dollar” contributions add up to A LOT! When I first broke the news that our movement had raised over $7 MILLION since my mugshot took over the world, the Democrats went crazy! But they’re about to really lose their minds when I announce that we have now almost DOUBLED that $7 million haul... We are now at $13 MILLION ! Can today – the day that was supposed to be my sham arraignment – be the day that officially DOUBLES our haul? We’ll have to see! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sat, September 2, 2023Subject: “NOT GUILTY”To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch. The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail. But I refuse to play into the Left’s hands. That’s why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded“NOT GUILTY” to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt... Why would I fly down to Atlanta just to hear over a dozen FALSE CHARGES brought against me on live TV? Our country is hurting right now. Our border is in chaos, our dollar is losing value, our justice system is dead, our rights are being ripped from our hands, and our enemies abroad are plotting ways to exploit our weaknesses. We have serious matters to deal with – not televised charades orchestrated by Crooked Joe and his corrupt accomplices. I’m going to focus on the REAL ISSUES that matter to Americans. And that’s how we’re going to win back the White House in 2024 and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sad state of our country right now, then don’t even think about donating! | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
| Team, I’m headed back to D.C. after spending time in my district throughout August.

And looking at my calendar, we have a busy work period in Washington — I know what I’m going back to fight for, but it seems like MAGA Republicans are more interested in playing politics than delivering solutions.

**Whether it’s barreling towards a government shutdown, attempting to impeach President Biden, or still refusing to hold an Oversight hearing on gun violence,** it’s clear that the MAGA Republicans in Congress are still in this for themselves and their special interests.

**Look, I hope you know by now that I don’t take any Republican bullshit — and I have a feeling we’re about to see a lot of that.**

[**So I know I asked you last month, but I’ve gotta ask you again — will you give just $5 to my campaign tonight? The GOP is still attacking me, and I need every last penny to keep my seat. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
During the 2020-2021 school year, some 40,000 students left Washington State public schools. Clearly, something isn't working... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3467668e3e&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Press Release: WAGOP's plans for Saving Basic Education in Washington State**
WAGOP guidelines to Saving Basic Education
* **Focus on Kids**
* **Engage Parents**
* **Empower Teachers**

Public education is most effectively managed by state governments, not federal. According to Article IX of the Washington State Constitution, it is the “paramount duty” of the state government to “make ample provision for the education of all children residing within its borders.” As the WA State Constitution and separate state law establish, basic K-12 education is most effectively delivered by local educators, hired and held accountable by locally-elected school boards.

During the 2020-2021 school year, some 40,000 students left Washington state public schools. Clearly, something isn’t working.

The State of Washington’s growing deference to federal education priorities and its parallel concentration of the implementation of K-12 education policy in the Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction (OSPI) have failed to deliver high-quality basic education to WA children.

**Standard proficiency testing of WA high school students show that half of the students can’t read or write at grade level—and nearly two-thirds can’t do simple mathematics at grade level. **These numbers are unacceptable.

Washington Republicans are committed to delivering a high-quality, uniform basic education to all children residing within the state’s borders. To do this, the state government must change the way it funds and manages public education here.

**The WAGOP plan for Saving Basic Education includes the following elements:**
* clarify state law to strengthen and protect the “broad discretionary power” of locally-elected school boards to develop curriculum, select textbooks, hiring teachers and do all other acts and things that a school district does
* narrow the mission and reduce the budget of OSPI and move those resources to school districts—preferably, into classrooms
* narrow the mission and reduce the budget of WA’s system of “Education Service Districts” and move money and people to school districts—preferably, into classrooms
* reform or repeal the state’s “prototypical school” budget model to fund special education programs and other specialized-learning programs more effectively
* maximize parental involvement, in part, by launching a school choice program
* properly incentivize teachers to give students the best possible education
* reduce the number and compensation of school administrators

Underlying all of these policy points is the core belief that families and local communities are best positioned to make decisions—based on evidence-based guidelines suggested by OSPI and other agencies—about delivering basic K-12 education to WA children. **As the WA Constitution says, the state’s primary duty is to fund K-12 education programs. The local school board’s duty is to build and implement those programs.**

For nearly a century, this division of responsibilities delivered outstanding K-12 education to WA kids. This state’s K-12 schools were consistently ranked among the best in the United States. The recent bureaucratization of basic education in WA has weakened the system, dropping WA schools to middle rankings nationally.

“We need to save high-quality basic education in our state,” WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh says. **“****Washington Republicans will do that. With bills. With budgets. And with the****bully pulpit.”**
###

subject: Beware the Digital Dollar: Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts

Banks don't need your permission
to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your
savings. Learn More

This Tax Loophole Is Kept Secret
by the IRS

The IRS is trying to close the
tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market
crashes and recessions. Learn More

This Asset Will Save You from
Recession...

With recession looming and
inflation at a 40-year high, this asset hedges against economic
uncertainty. Learn More

Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying
Realities!
The purchasing power of the US
dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the
government's promises of financial stability crumble before your
own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is
crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and take
immediate action to protect your wealth. The solution lies in the
timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall
Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has
insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but
the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the
dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you
vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently
devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception
and take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.

The signs of the dollar's decline
are impossible to ignore. Inflation is soaring and the cost of
everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that
this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the
hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion
of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of
policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term
financial security.
It doesn't stop there. Amidst all
the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order
14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's
sinister attempt to end privacy as you know it by tracking and
controlling your every financial move.

Imagine a world where every
aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded,
scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital
Dollar, as outlined in the Executive Order, is portrayed under a
sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds
via our phones that are ironically under constant full
surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented
powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence
of your privacy. It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to
ignore.

Your personal choices will no
longer be yours to make. The consequences are profound. The
government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your
purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very
essence of your personal freedom is at stake.
Act now with urgency to embark on
a journey toward financial liberation where you not only
Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the
peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 07, 2023

Kevin McCarthy was
issued a dire warning from this Republican
McCarthy has to tread
lightly these days. That's because his own party is breathing
down his neck to get what they want.

And Kevin McCarthy was issued a
dire warning from this Republican.
➞ Continue Reading

A top Democrat may lose
their job after breaking this law

Politicians don't

could change everything for Barack Obama

Former President
Obama is one of the most influential voices in the Democrat
Party. But now his influence may have gone too far.

President Biden is in
shambles after being caught in this damaging lie

Joe Biden's policies
have been disastrous for the American people. But his inability
to get his facts straight, are making things even worse.

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

subject: How Biden's Digital Dollar Destroys Freedom
body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

| |
# **Financial Freedom in America**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn7vcjdvrmtiadtm62h06sj06j0do7eflek62bag_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o72cph2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1mi64btlf1pukvkahuhk0vb2pu352t39n47fvk0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o72cph2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpvftc70b13uua2mm5ldib2t7d3upf29aej8fqo8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o72cph2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Trusting my gut on this
body:
Y’all – I have a problem

| |
---
| | | Y'all - I have a problem:

I just got my hands on some devastating news that my NEW SOCIALIST OPPONENT is _swimming_ in Democrat cash immediately after launching her Senate campaign to defeat me.

I'll be honest; I'm deeply worried.

If she stays on her current trajectory and we fail to catch up, this key Senate seat will fall to the Democrats. **It 's that simple.**

Luckily, I'm confident our grassroots movement knows how dangerous it would be to have this socialist roaming the halls of Congress instead of a strong conservative like me, _**[so I'm trusting my gut that we'll turn things around right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z91cjfir0rqbs2gcug65p94c9s12psjeb4o3m518_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o76cjh2bs "so I’m trusting my gut that we’ll turn things around right now.")**_

With everything at stake, I'm kindly asking every grassroots conservative, including you, to send in a donation - big or small - to help me hold the line and win.

**I 'm counting on 100% of the folks reading this to help - 85% or even 90% won't cut it!**

---
| | [SUPPORT MARSHA BLACKBURN NOW ->](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeklsu0e0jg35vsgt11pr524ah2htlm9hng50etg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o76cjh2bs "SUPPORT MARSHA BLACKBURN NOW →")
---

Right now, the Democrats hold a razor-thin majority in the U.S. Senate. They're counting on flipping a few key seats so they can cling to power - and Tennessee is one of them.

_They think by recruiting a darling of the Democrat megadonor class, they can bury me in attack ads, trash my name seven ways from Sunday, and flip this seat ..._

But if our grassroots team shows up - and shows up BIG - it's case closed. They lose.

_**[In other words, I badly need your support right now. My opponent is raking it in, and there's no end in sight. Can you help me hold the line now that she has officially joined the race?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziu5ngjrvv36br1obdbe4ivq160kvhmv23nb39i8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge0o76cjh2bs "In other words, I badly need your support right now. My opponent is raking it in, and there’s no end in sight. Can you help me hold the line now that she has officially joined the race? ")**_

God bless you & God bless America,

_Marsha Blackburn_

name: ICYMI News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlorjskp6e7cg3pd253ik36tb5p0c0it893760r0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge8pr4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8t455hfa6682b3ot9f5fsa7n5t4is6a7iimo4do_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge8pr4cth2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22252%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BF6n9orX5fsAMkt0NnMEbQ&sysid=1)
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22253%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fm49HuXeC%2bFw3M0wVT5nJQ&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22254%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s30S3YUg1IHZGvXi5h7xMg&sysid=1)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22254%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s30S3YUg1IHZGvXi5h7xMg&sysid=1)
---
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana’s Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22265%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ThFccVAopnXx10kTF7k2%2bw&sysid=1 "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The pharmaceutical industry
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb5tgssv4vuukcb7dttbto5lsnk5o69om8enp8eo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1geapj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrl93ao474sd5ltmnfu5iumac832jo3pdqeltc5g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1geapj2c5h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Pro Life Update

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. name: American Action News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zduottr4pbue9u710ucekkde4nees8bg48rf001o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge1p72cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z920b2rgnfonecbkgsegvr48558p64s4pjpnhhm0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ge1p72cjh2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Mike Pence attacked Trump in this wild turn of events
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 07, 2023

Mike Pence attacked
Trump in this wild turn of events
Former Vice President Pence
has a lot of work to do if he wants to repair his relationship
with Trump. But his recent actions have put a fork in that
chance.

Because Mike Pence attacked Trump
in this wild turn of events.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Kevin McCarthy was issued a
dire warning from this Republican

McCarthy has to tread
lightly these days. That's because his own party is breathing
down his neck to get what they want.
➞ Continue Reading

A top Democrat may lose
their job after breaking this law

Politicians don't
always play by the rules. But when they get caught, their world
is upended.
➞ Continue Reading

This shocking accusation
could change everything for Barack Obama

Former President
Obama is one of the most influential voices in the Democrat
Party. But now his influence may have gone too far.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

body:

|

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9noc95tbqdkfubk9i3o1mrcc8ofmok42875g398_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uiqmbdlgs3hjdcjnm5h33dj5e3hn4chmesq73cblmgqm1cbh6lqm7crhcphbcc37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr4coq69d9gsup72phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuel37mnu93bb18rgf0k87ks41bfqf4j8su54qtg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**
They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you 're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdgko8lp7lhh4kmv7962764sjfmdh5glmmis2160_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn45mg38q2b11m38cq0b2vffds2tf3qunpbbft2o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrgkecon73vcid5ipt9ku5rjm1ms4nm43s7kv6io_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let 's prove them wrong. _Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs2fj5pil4gp5smoi6dagc7a9tqp1lpkiafp78g0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America 's Social Justice Scam_**, along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkrd5qnurmf3k15bi8556gm444jjs3819qjrfg48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c1ie8or4cph2bs)

---

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell via Blue Amp Action
subject: I need every single Democrat on board:
body:
The stakes just went up.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c3cc576-705e-4950-983e-daa22a6e61a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ed9c63b-b58b-414b-be42-9c38e51f17f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. I’m an immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. And I’m officially running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and serve as Florida’s next U.S. Senator. Rick Scott has failed us in Florida, and I refuse to sit back and watch him push my state and country backward. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our economy, and our very democracy — and even more, I’m prepared to win. But this race will be one of the most competitive Senate races in 2024, and we’re up against a deep-seated Republican incumbent who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time around. The only way I can compete — and win — is with the support of grassroots Democrats like you. [I've set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to defeat Rick Scott, and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8495375e-8ef4-488b-9822-431570b59954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T793d9e9d-3f35-4dd0-bae0-9002c7e4135f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| When I was 14, my mom, my three sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador to find a better life in America. We lived in a one room apartment. My mom worked double-shifts during the day and took classes at night to learn English. I picked up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet. Those years weren’t easy. But thanks to my mother’s relentless belief in a brighter future for her children, I went on to graduate from college, become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and write the bill to expand Medicare Advantage coverage. My story — coming from a one room apartment to walking the halls of Congress — is only possible in America. But Rick Scott has spent his time in Washington doing everything he can to destroy the country that gave my family a shot at a better life. Rick Scott has a net worth up to nearly a quarter of a billion dollars, yet he’s proposed tax increases on working families and the middle class. He’s pushed for a nationwide abortion ban. And he wrote the GOP plan to end the Social Security and Medicare that so many rely on. That’s why I’m running to defeat him next November. Experts say that Rick will be one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot — which means that if we build a powerful grassroots team full of people like you, Peter, we can take him down. [So please, I’m personally asking: Will you become one of my very first grassroots donors by splitting a gift between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Rick Scott and defending our Senate majority.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8f0d8e7-a972-4e6d-b6ca-9f46c949f560/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T487de3e6-5813-4af5-9be8-ba458215db1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Good morning!** Today marks the 44th anniversary of the launch of Connecticut's [Entertainment and Sports Network](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4jAQRn_NpCMyY8fBhQsEF64AdNIVV0aOPU58BBsZLyzN_vYV0G715uk1o-_foT-YMIc4Hs2ZdPGpN7aEG_VMLdoF8h4rpz0REq9IL6USbNW2EqtJk1CNVGKlnJHCWPV0hcxZ64dmaW0VNDLkTLGWqUYIWTMrBq4G6TnnTgkPgpELJeX6fwqxTOTnR7pRrm06V7OeSrlcga8BO8COYn0Pp3AhF0yd8gjYPR2w-x2uJeVHn3z_6--fIyAHvv4Cvi70WYBvkwdskJWJXoxU7imf6gXgZkvDRwHc7Ond9pSiye51m_jmjlIe33mXTXRUZe0u9zDP4SpbEGw8mzC_fi4_LvgdAAD__ynxbmA), better known today as ESPN. The new network premiered a show called "Sports Center" to an estimated 30,000 viewers.

Today, our _Rotator _section features The Polling Station, offering a snapshot of public opinion on gun ownership, smartphone use for children, and how potential jurors view Donald Trump.

## Special Counsel to Indict Hunter Biden
Special Counsel David Weiss says he plans to seek a [grand jury indictment of Hunter Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuszAUhZ_GbBcZ2zFhYIj-COkf0o4dkcHX4BZfI9sJap--SuZO50hnOJ--j9t4M37ztLyZgH1xcTRz8Q8ceQctCDmKyvYOUaCssG90p_i5bbWo1l5r1xirNM5KTtw4w506dUbPHM9OT1j5XnAhecdb3p2U0jWf1SS7STsppe2UY4qj9SWm-jN6Kiu67Ts-MNVzDNXWr6XsmckLEwMTw3Ecdcj03JgYkOCemRgIj2e8-p5ixvleYsqQEb88LUB4gCfr5xKQCriYYL1TwQSTt0gwoYsJAclCdJBxLxgmTEwMJsHl0ixbaH6YHN7__b8yeTWUQ6bnadNUqbf74bfNZ90yxZdg_PZCL3-K_A0AAP__ZaR3Fg) before the end of the month, according to court documents filed Wednesday.

The filing came in relation to Biden's gun possession case, in which he's accused of lying about drug use while possessing a gun, but prosecutors didn't specify what specific charges they'd seek.

Weiss was appointed Special Counsel after a plea deal between Biden and the Justice Department fell apart [under a judge's questioning ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ4HFw6PgiKN3aVN6SjunpsgOMKdydtnkvrqv_hnvo_beJs4crq_Txv6SnmcQuUnjsrJXoIeoVk8IQLqBn1nnVHXvrfQrN6CRkDqYKaZLmD1lZwj0l0IXegmaNiDAq2c6pW7GGNbFcys3WxJa704Q8IoXLjmo_3MnOqKFH_yE4825K2Jfq11L0K_CRgEDOd5tpS_E57lrwsY9hy5cigChvWRKh5y5gWTLDsGnqIM-ZEKRlkQvySnhUPdMNXm8Mt-coxcbC-Mum8Tx_9lfQnwGwAA__8ubV7r)in court.
## Cars Labeled Worst 'Privacy Nightmare' in U.S.
Cars are the worst products in America [at protecting consumers' data and privacy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGunDAQgOHTmM7Iz_YaKCjS0G3alGjWHsNEhkFmFrQ5faQo5TvB_-v79ZyfQIX25SdsOErmGaLQhbMZdKetm22Txoxo0TU4foXBm77rgm3WEdHEGJLvEbrU4ysHwPRlukd8gAmpb2i0xjozmM4MD-9Da6J_ueEVsnMuDT4rbzCRcG1_M-2yYi4fvrC2kbemjKvIcSr3Q9lJ2Snze08gxHu78R8qBVqui7IT7spOR6UL4mdnoT2Wd8Kk7ARVKBY8lZ1ITs05UyQoOkI9NVTUsqK-uZ6ij8rpHUVHEFy4fvSNeoULNV5YdcWL8MakM1f9P6Xs1NQxHTeVQmfolDfLBlT-zcu3lH8DAAD__8LPerk), according to a new report from the nonprofit Mozilla Foundation, which reviewed 25 auto brands and labeled them all a "privacy nightmare." Cars have become data-gobbling digital machines that [offer consumers no privacy protections](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2S4yAQBOCnkTJc_AzIBASXOPOlF6oGGOy5QkIlsXZ5n37Ljjfsr5Ou_nedr8iV19tfXCj00mZMnR80Sy8moc2sxxwKkSYzUlDOgzxPk9PjPXhjo1bJR1tMUWSLRchnhGKdsi5OIwcttZFeTtJbAHeSCaLx0RVjTPZQBpCUubf99L_x2u9U6qs9aD-ltow13HvfjsH8GfRl0BfcVnoe7-od9s6p0qAvGTuKbecHppdIuB_iI6nVSqlzW8XSvrlWFKV9rRk_lJxyBZQ_m-hSzE4D2IySwDstvcrjHvL25Fr5cNMA8rYg18-q_utHPwEAAP__6KNnrg) when selling personal data to third-party companies, many of which partner with carmakers. Nissan is upfront in saying it can collect whatever data it wants, including [immigration status, sexual orientation, and health status](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ8Gb0SEHxMGhi7e0rWjdY0v8a0wRJimcp--onPX75POOTof9_kOlCg_3mFH32KZITR64Swct1yqWQ6rj4gS1YD-OjotbtaOctg8XJWJ1ixLNHiLNgqjjVJhNCIGGY0eyEshlXDCCme0Hi8i6EW5ZYxKqdXpyLTAlVqpl89CuW0Y01leWC-h7EPyW2vPg6k3JicmJ6hHw7BlCtA9k1OAejA59RImJ-E6KjljaLjyLjlU5MCflV4QTp7psbW9s738UErAY_nKKzQqmR9w9rCh-vX5TSnRMVqmxWMHSn972r_v_AYAAP__NQFmpA). Mozilla says none of the 25 brands met even minimum privacy standards.
## Irish Town Bans Smartphones for All Children
Parents in an Irish town outside Dublin have banded together in a pioneering program to [ban smartphones for all children](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQRb9G6tDwAIMpKF7jzmlTahAsZhMEGtixkr_POHXae5tzzvt9vXssWB9vfgdHqa0-ED5h5ZYZJuQq5ugSgAA5g_unreJXY7SYs7vocJXGapB2s9xEpbYQN5m0Bu7Bqhmd4EJyyw23F6X0woPapN10klJGq9KkOESk1pePhpUypPLdntCX0Pa5uEx0jEn-n8RtErfzPJfUviqc4_W_ltZLnMQNO47MDt-h0mDkP4G9JFplY_edjtwqDDaa71gfLLQaoNfBQsYSO9TBdqjkC8vgC-W5u3icWAoObSbFH7vH8ktEf_b5CQAA__98BGrD) until they finish elementary school. The goal is to have no child feel they're the only ones without a phone. The agreement is voluntary, but parent associations at all eight schools in the town of Greystones have agreed to pull the plug on phones for younger children in an effort to fight anxiety and exposure to adult material. The Irish health minister has called for the plan to be [implemented nationally](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAURp8Gu2tYQBwKi23sZtstDeJF7gRhAjjGt9_M1n_3FV9yTs7f5_K0FCntf-yBU_N5sa7RBxduYAQhF9Ftk0cUKDucfmmj-GMctejCJPkDhfR6HZwdlNQP73E0WvNhk0YJ19EkuJDc8JGbQSndc6dWaVbtpZSbUZ4pjhu1XPpXptQC-njnD5be5aOLU2jtXZn8zcTMxHxdV98C7qctG9n0_TAxN3Qh5Zj3m4n5i2Nifp2JiZl_53G6AGgrYYGWodobUgYqVAO0fCU4EzWsQAnqYUt7h5wQVpvA5wJ3PtMOLlDcCqauTNv7ohip6pEpvh-W4n_V9mO4fwEAAP__o01wvw), comparing it to governments regulating "food and drink and medicines."

clean_body: Special Counsel David Weiss says he plans to seek a grand jury indictment of Hunter Biden before the end of the month, according to court documents filed Wednesday. | | | | | | THURSday, SEPT. 7, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 44th anniversary of the launch of Connecticut's , better known today as ESPN. The new network premiered a show called "Sports Center" to an estimated 30,000 viewers. Today, our Rotator section features The Polling Station, offering a snapshot of public opinion on gun ownership, smartphone use for children, and how potential jurors view Donald Trump. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Special Counsel to Indict Hunter Biden Special Counsel David Weiss says he plans to seek a before the end of the month, according to court documents filed Wednesday. The filing came in relation to Biden's gun possession case, in which he's accused of lying about drug use while possessing a gun, but prosecutors didn't specify what specific charges they'd seek. Weiss was appointed Special Counsel after a plea deal between Biden and the Justice Department fell apart court. Cars Labeled Worst 'Privacy Nightmare' in U.S. Cars are the worst products in America , according to a new report from the nonprofit Mozilla Foundation, which reviewed 25 auto brands and labeled them all a "privacy nightmare." Cars have become data-gobbling digital machines that when selling personal data to third-party companies, many of which partner with carmakers. Nissan is upfront in saying it can collect whatever data it wants, including . Mozilla says none of the 25 brands met even minimum privacy standards. Irish Town Bans Smartphones for All Children Parents in an Irish town outside Dublin have banded together in a pioneering program to until they finish elementary school. The goal is to have no child feel they're the only ones without a phone. The agreement is voluntary, but parent associations at all eight schools in the town of Greystones have agreed to pull the plug on phones for younger children in an effort to fight anxiety and exposure to adult material. The Irish health minister has called for the plan to be , comparing it to governments regulating "food and drink and medicines." name: Phil Kerpen
subject: AARP betrayed seniors. Help us fight back.
body:
Dear Friend,
I know that you are as disturbed as I am about the creeping government takeover of our healthcare system.
First, they forced Americans to buy government-approved health insurance under Obamacare.
Then under Biden’s so-called "Inflation Reduction Act," liberals forced drug companies to accept government-set pricing or face a 95% tax on their gross sales – with the savings diverted to green energy giveaways.
Both of these bills were finances with big Medicare cuts. **And no lobbying force has done more to enact these anti-senior policies than AARP.**
**That’s why I hope you will please**[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DuypCAYQOHVaEgBP_IIDKaqp_ehQAsIikj7Wv3UnfxGJ_miY3pplCCytT3hihHcCcZa1xOquLJANBiszDgCA4KtNR8MDMYPbX1PMQWssCC86xhDBPG_TLyEkEJCh0HQhuEh2eL1sOShFr9WM_h4I72mNvau1tzAn4a-G_quZdAz-k3_GHhfNTbwgn2YxEFI2n1YlHncdZAosYz1WeaHAckbOZSFAeq6CSCfwqHix0981a5MOc86xTtc51d2dJ2vem6nzt2HmHTw-EjvCtg1rE7kaIWf_DiJ0RZqXbdt4tkkU-c0J1fzOetwnuWY81d0l6aaWrXOX7-ZGO29kDhdNMugsDPlGbZl54Etnd7DFyuuxwk2Q1JDufWugdf8JLnsNfBcUhCje8QejmO5903AOEyuTT2noLDEtC29yaeP0e9cNAxPafDx_9XaX2jHUWmMCKiMDn_qA_9Ezgy5JUsikNT5udFHMAOIhC_8CwAA__-WGaoy)
A recent bombshell report from Juniper Research reveals how the supposed "seniors organization" AARP is little more than a marketing scam for UnitedHealth – the largest health insurance company in America.
AARP sells UnitedHealth insurance exclusively in return for a 4.95% cut of every monthly premium – AARP’s corporate royalties net them over $1 BILLION a year.
[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00D2ypSoUQOHRaGgBG9kYGLyq-848EPxBBVQQPYy-63be0Uq-aJlemg6prMeeio5T0iLn9dIzxg2jzAwDMokwiU5MnI6U61EKg2Nte0YYkI4gFW3LeUMb8T_HH0SJEloCyCpOlBsvq5U_VLpsSEbZ_dvo4Oq9X1I6KvivYp-KfdKl9Nb8S_8a-Lxpr-AHopoxU-qiXX1nyvJmuksi91T8VjjwU1sS1iw4nVxU7fluT86nUGh4CYFENkR5WPoETx_66rl9JpBi2Ceuw3LruSOczPRpy3Qf1xDSxM5wB_L6sERzOg44EpW22efFvjhvoszgNnsfSz78975ZyMa4bd4ROC3Fj-BwhUfcQ0wXbIDiXUlW_p6kbn3FxGiXCn624qSPaRXH5VYcloJxzdl_44kwqHmpXS8YdEQSVl-9OR677zYKrDiZnbL736upf5tI9k6ThkJ3NNk-OpPfyI03iz8kxUbqo3ybCbmBhq43_AkAAP__tUGpYA)
It is important to understand AARP’s blatant conflict of interest as they work to dupe seniors and members of Congress into believing that socialized medicine will _help_ them.
**The policies AARP advocates for would decimate our healthcare system – while enriching its big insurance partner and itself.**
AARP was taken to court over this blatant conflict of interest.
At trial, AARP defended itself by arguing that its relationship with its senior members "is not one of 'trust or confidence' that creates a fiduciary duty" and "does not 'transcend an ordinary business' relationship."
**When AARP says they have no responsibility to act with seniors' interests in mind — take them at their word.**
[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DuypCAYQOHVaGgBP8_AYKp6eh8IPpBHo6Ctrn7qTn6jk3zRsb20SmDZjj3mimLEBKXt0hOjR0ADN4YTzYEjBHxSljHCACig1vUEEUAKCcwZo7TDHf9LxUsIKSQwBII0FOk47s7olHXd3ada7cLdmU9sQ7_Umhv405B3Q95118Z3v-kfA--rhgZeUPQsToxjcWtS9lmuEweJZKhP8g8FUcDUQrymd-RGyTBafBNaDsWOXU7PwfVV6Vy_PHtspOPG4gLiXme_HnaT9r6oSswWqpB_6kxc_AYpfbbfz5kYR4QFvg1EqGMicmFlylFvo4gDCj47UmVM5zGlzW3pQR6bxLTezt0P3uDBmX3dh8m6axUnGZRqCB_d0sDLP1GmUlee97iKYXlEWc8z3WUTMOh5aWPPCSgkEWn33uavC8EVLhqK5qhd-H-19ldXUFAGdRhU7k73NSf6ifS0W1KWWHTS5OfuJkEtdHg94F8AAAD__3clp4c)
American Commitment and the Committee to Unleash Prosperity have launched a campaign to push back against socialized medicine by exposing AARP as a prop for Big Insurance.
That’s why it’s so important you take a moment to [**sign your letter to Congress**](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00L2yoyAcQPGn0dIB_shHYbEz2bwHIFEMIAHUyNPv3O1vdZpfdeZJzJJj0dsJM0kxGjml_TpRIV9iJIgyqdAsiDQvAMO00pQpK2jvJoIIIIk4ZuNI6YAH9pfyB-eCCxgRcNJRpILNzqiYVM1ur7Ny_h7MHno_rbWmDv505NmRZ83KvIff9I-B57f6Dh5Q1MJPjENxW5RzW78n9gIJX1t8N3pcEds1nXFGoCPbPpTqfTdvluI61gMJFhLoj9-NJLxEub2sDGVbOIxtlO5ej2AjLJ87Mo0EPozmChYxW673lkeS7pkwuly4IZKbvWO7YUzKmUzuJS-cSIm0-16WGp-_-ViZDhZdCz0_L6JiIbbVWiDUi9Gb17MjzLq1g8e7BRFL3VjKYeN6bbxs5xnv8uGg1bL2YWIEJBKI9Hma0-W8d4XxjqIlKOf_X63TdyjIS4MGDDINp7vMiX4i3nRYYxKYD8Kkdg8vTmcY8HbAvwAAAP__vVyoSg) so that we can get our message out as loud as possible.
The future of America’s health care system may well depend on us unmasking AARP as a front group for UnitedHealth. **Will you join me in taking this important stand against socialized medicine?**
Thanks for all you do,
Phil Kerpen
P.S. If you act today, we will also sign you up for a FREE subscription to the Committee to Unleash Prosperity's HOTLINE newsletter by famed economist Stephen Moore. Newt Gingrich calls it "brilliantly done and always informative-a remarkable achievement."

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=832c62c09fda44858a61663a7a61cfdc&_e=bnbXQF4UWHrQ5B9nlepF0r5XIoz6nOl4wZjIz5JTLcv3exf3bk8XfBIP73SIPNXjyDDWQiYhTmLbRKx8aS2xZ8xreIEl9HIhgBrV8fxsbaXkYGZzMSDZLUeBW1A2StvAk9OQhI4RjzctiK2Am9TSwBWBlB0cAdIiopB3zvuiR0OOGlxxa9SzsPCB0kRUvP0MD8CvlH5W0QFWbN4bfONCYQaxyWU52BtUsKHA49Gvmr8IgM_y2PQM5HIkygHf6zM8R58gZBrwBA8LC76vafcizhu9KQsFaPtNLdQ7BeaphfPAHzn3FJz3uenIIfUdpg9TRYHFYADkbtNCGpNIw4Vh2iQIh2gLtxdKXRZHGv2Gyhl84R-ZBpLPXuWqAbTRbGDecGU-SmRHnhGkHTA8G8akIER2EM7xEFQYSPD4uYtSKzI%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=832c62c09fda44858a61663a7a61cfdc&_e=bnbXQF4UWHrQ5B9nlepF0r5XIoz6nOl4wZjIz5JTLcv3exf3bk8XfBIP73SIPNXjyDDWQiYhTmLbRKx8aS2xZ8xreIEl9HIhgBrV8fxsbaXkYGZzMSDZLUeBW1A2StvAk9OQhI4RjzctiK2Am9TSwBWBlB0cAdIiopB3zvuiR0OOGlxxa9SzsPCB0kRUvP0MD8CvlH5W0QFWbN4bfONCYQaxyWU52BtUsKHA49Gvmr8IgM_y2PQM5HIkygHf6zM8R58gZBrwBA8LC76vafcizsL1cdrJ-q1aTCHwUGqoyvU8pYWambSGsEs3G_S2H_Z_tVtZ6lWirlpLFRK1vxEyrvvl6zfnoEnOf5L-1TVg_fsjRrhDtMf17udg5NBVpcQ2nqlSQgJB96mKkuBmTLQTKrSaZUSlvBIQnn0sJRTml0Y%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=832c62c09fda44858a61663a7a61cfdc&_e=bnbXQF4UWHrQ5B9nlepF0r5XIoz6nOl4wZjIz5JTLcv3exf3bk8XfBIP73SIPNXjyDDWQiYhTmLbRKx8aS2xZ8xreIEl9HIhgBrV8fxsbaXkYGZzMSDZLUeBW1A2StvAk9OQhI4RjzctiK2Am9TSwBWBlB0cAdIiopB3zvuiR0OOGlxxa9SzsPCB0kRUvP0MD8CvlH5W0QFWbN4bfONCYQaxyWU52BtUsKHA49Gvmr8IgM_y2PQM5HIkygHf6zM8R58gZBrwBA8LC76vafcizpUW9pK1Zz89vQ2bC6U7Y4TGY2pFVyIdoHX7JKDBSCRBvhMcTuzs90ArPBbwVdqEBFlnoKHiFDd7CSdJhB1VaVnmbc2H32by5tjsbWuwiA_hUhuXuxTSnLq8_ZF8ESvahfnge88zftPjS60pxB0WgFs%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Goldco
subject: Sean Hannity: Biden's Plans for Retirement Accounts
body:
With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast.

| | |
# **Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden's Tax Plans...**
---
|
---
| | With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast. His **tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement** investments.

And if you DON'T want to see [_**your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d79f3b0aa554fb2b4f0ae409bafd354&_e=3qt5c32yvgJsz7p6ECJHFbuZcc1nOZp63CLY4wQN_Ad-BmqKzDAMqAO2kMCQgWExOddoGAP-y6GW2t6hfvSsKtUjpuJUzuatYOtxumD7FlJ52qLGkXP9srU_W0bEkP9_hYTx-82M0dX2Arp4FCvBaqkMDDvpiI3NV9g9aqmQ_klIZZ4PFBzv96usdyRnh82vnc7996iiGCaxxV4jEcNJKTK6hKzWSxcbdD_jj-GV2VxwMlxYDlJxiwKoDbbfn24tCNIFY8HPQG-3o3kYaAq_8s2QSlUq1YM8PQrXF9Nh11Pe1hn-Lnl4sm_dRB9dAz1xxAVdBbIEH2wQo2uGUnvQ2_KxwKrK7fVReDMYF5gRcNLOk7trHIzboBTqyZqFKigYobeY_AtM620m9r49cZwfmj6-L3Xar8uZWT8BGRA9nFN4EZS1OBc-KsY02NP0nUF-ETEjwpgJ92b42fpONrJYuNOgsDi4_gtIqYtfFv9aam8ofLnNQJ8FbdDu-FKfv5Gi)...

You've got to move your money.

Now.

BEFORE he changes the laws.

Look, **Joe Biden has already said he 's making raising taxes a top priority**.

So make protecting what's yours a top priority, too.

clean_body: This is serious. | | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now" , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic. "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | | Ryan Zinke is a retired member of the United States Navy. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Support Black farmers
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970840?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: We have a once-in-a-FIVE-YEAR opportunity to fight for racial justice and worker protections in agriculture!** **[Act before the opportunity passes!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970841?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Every half decade, Congress renews the Farm Bill -- massive legislation addressing hundreds of issues in food and agriculture. The Farm Bill must be renewed this year, providing a powerful opportunity to fight back against Big Ag corporations and score huge victories for racial justice. **But the window of opportunity is closing fast!** The Justice for Black Farmers Act aims to correct historic discrimination that caused Black famers **to lose MILLIONS of acres** of land and **robbed them of BILLIONS** in generational wealth. The Protecting America’s Meatpacking Workers Act would **expand workplace safety and health protections** for workers in the often-abusive industrial agriculture industry. We can pass both bills through the Farm Bill if we send enough messages to Congress before it’s too late. **[Please, Friend, help correct historical harms and protect workers. Take just 30 seconds to send your message to Congress before midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970842?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In the 1910s, Black farmers owned an estimated 20 million acres of land. Since then, due to white supremacy and racism within the U.S. Department of Agriculture, the number of Black farmers **PLUNGED 98%!** _**Ninety. Eight. Percent.**_
Meanwhile, meatpacking workers are often subject to degrading and dangerous conditions. **Overworked and underpaid.** At risk of **SERIOUS injury!** We can address both issues through the Farm Bill -- but we need your help to do it. **[Tell Congress to pass a pro-racial justice, pro-worker Farm Bill!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1970843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign

body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=988689430283480da83ce551a456f785&_e=T6OAZTnWaeFCZ_qUQVgUqQO80cjMoZ3daKcflJkED6X_iVtdv4s-IXXijd_Eii_UtzTIsbyvDqJC0TBC2QsPXPULzQ5h--BFwuWAg5YNP3hDboIcaa4ieum3CSDswj3E9E_ndFIJgnxV-jt4pqGgb671txI8vZ8nyGWak9iEChQw8sRfewHYeAogKE-mmWPqgl0v18JaqWWyFiU8x-fEhgMApd_C35lcdMXUdp5Kfca5sow7Ls0b0oWr1tN-cSFT4p05Ldh9bbnpyVUE25PQGztT8D3wU-Aky5yfR_wQB_IPN1j7CBPmEDfkG9urMBuFm8gT46-DmCJ0HbKOchD-rLo92iqcks_tUA6cWfu099zKX_YHxMXLgYvupn1OQv7mGGIqZDzPbVHaxPl4btT_FA%3D%3D)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=988689430283480da83ce551a456f785&_e=T6OAZTnWaeFCZ_qUQVgUqQO80cjMoZ3daKcflJkED6X_iVtdv4s-IXXijd_Eii_UtzTIsbyvDqJC0TBC2QsPXPULzQ5h--BFwuWAg5YNP3hDboIcaa4ieum3CSDswj3E9E_ndFIJgnxV-jt4pqGgb671txI8vZ8nyGWak9iEChQw8sRfewHYeAogKE-mmWPqgl0v18JaqWWyFiU8x-fEhgMApd_C35lcdMXUdp5Kfca5sow7Ls0b0oWr1tN-cSFTsOUB68mam-jjc40XCDdlhIPuGStKZja8jKcVN7IcH79Mce_ZuWj3k3PJufGaldgmCstnFCxmpKKejF9oD_lvZSsiazxA2KdPgCn7wMRoYHqrF14PNWDvK275s5RR1Jxz8ntA7y8uIZJF36coXw0rgQ%3D%3D "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=988689430283480da83ce551a456f785&_e=T6OAZTnWaeFCZ_qUQVgUqQO80cjMoZ3daKcflJkED6X_iVtdv4s-IXXijd_Eii_UtzTIsbyvDqJC0TBC2QsPXPULzQ5h--BFwuWAg5YNP3hDboIcaa4ieum3CSDswj3E9E_ndFIJgnxV-jt4pqGgb671txI8vZ8nyGWak9iEChQw8sRfewHYeAogKE-mmWPqgl0v18JaqWWyFiU8x-fEhgMApd_C35lcdMXUdp5Kfca5sow7Ls0b0oWr1tN-cSFTT1YzRd1BUBDcFy-YqRjewBp3dKxAANb6WzGwhau1BgRlxBmB86iXc02fgwlXyENouFK9krwc3rcopz9jKAg_2CRAtsfmL4081Zi_BeDM5rF-NmjEgAdoH-vIoRRxVS6do7xmp9euKutaXUDCSQGSkw%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.
