name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: TERRIBLE NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=729918c6aea344948326cd85357c1e93&_e=PI_Uf5b9cBbZlCrWKiRk64w2d9YqRmR6ArSfiIKocLYH_5UHP9C4esc6zgwNKO96aS5A_CCmnefEva6GYOGw8rmDbGIKWK7RNimMjAZo6y2QcaNy8h96t75OKJPJ6jVvEk3tiRhYlODFwkf_WGPJFX8A5FTUfTEKCiIwjhtMBGZa1YUS2twDZAOwN80R6YbIuuHchx3HSyF7nNxZW8qkkh7GupvcNLl9BWgScm8-CG5zddV3NDlIs1E8ib0VLv0wUVPuHO08ui0GLBmeHI2Lynvgu2EAfzZ-yfkVzjTYuYS0nCGsjoQnuCimVdtmBQgOvicT1jU7pZ6KXwtFxTWlBqP_wEt9WPW5UdpX4A109SOtoPQN8ip8lzrODbIciGcy-9RY5qjMNcf_ScVfRug0-A%3D%3D)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=729918c6aea344948326cd85357c1e93&_e=PI_Uf5b9cBbZlCrWKiRk64w2d9YqRmR6ArSfiIKocLYH_5UHP9C4esc6zgwNKO96aS5A_CCmnefEva6GYOGw8rmDbGIKWK7RNimMjAZo6y2QcaNy8h96t75OKJPJ6jVvEk3tiRhYlODFwkf_WGPJFX8A5FTUfTEKCiIwjhtMBGZa1YUS2twDZAOwN80R6YbIuuHchx3HSyF7nNxZW8qkkh7GupvcNLl9BWgScm8-CG5zddV3NDlIs1E8ib0VLv0wZc5nwe3hlUQ4BOk6MeFNv05kEWnRlZMPH0wjRBvRu7idyhH2L0m7D8GCTKPTTOkfRo6H59YwtkBMvM_IdAlJ0yF6qTCb-wyy2QJJiWqZo729Zjea_gUIJ8iIcG8BNlyHLRPTBaAUfvqBC44FZtjbGA%3D%3D "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=729918c6aea344948326cd85357c1e93&_e=PI_Uf5b9cBbZlCrWKiRk64w2d9YqRmR6ArSfiIKocLYH_5UHP9C4esc6zgwNKO96aS5A_CCmnefEva6GYOGw8rmDbGIKWK7RNimMjAZo6y2QcaNy8h96t75OKJPJ6jVvEk3tiRhYlODFwkf_WGPJFX8A5FTUfTEKCiIwjhtMBGZa1YUS2twDZAOwN80R6YbIuuHchx3HSyF7nNxZW8qkkh7GupvcNLl9BWgScm8-CG5zddV3NDlIs1E8ib0VLv0wzYxclfjWe6X37FayfbZ4uO1fx6KE8hyrFWck_a1tti902PJ1O9CiiCHPxlqc3ebA2rM53-l4dJ7r6WJw--bcYgOVVXhSMJmkNy7xks99thocJ_KiefjZVKq1d_VLIMw8Ywa4XlEkAj-qcexYT7gP_g%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=729918c6aea344948326cd85357c1e93&_e=PI_Uf5b9cBbZlCrWKiRk64w2d9YqRmR6ArSfiIKocLYH_5UHP9C4esc6zgwNKO96aS5A_CCmnefEva6GYOGw8rmDbGIKWK7RNimMjAZo6y2QcaNy8h96t75OKJPJ6jVvEk3tiRhYlODFwkf_WGPJFX8A5FTUfTEKCiIwjhtMBGZa1YUS2twDZAOwN80R6YbIuuHchx3HSyF7nNxZW8qkkh7GupvcNLl9BWgScm8-CG5zddV3NDlIs1E8ib0VLv0wxjaKEzkBv6ieMVsRfYPUx3bSjBwVO44vs1a6Qem6cyTN9U2JY5gi9Ej-Kq5WlD_C6tSrAyH4yzyeoj_-_XeTossaZDlVMvjYbcFQdQ_lv-rn-PqIeMnVIACTeLO7mwShuw_BaZlQC0yI8b5I-sAzNw%3D%3D "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

clean_body: This is serious. | | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now" , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic. "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | | Ryan Zinke is a retired member of the United States Navy. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This interview caused AOC to land on her face in humiliating fashion
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 07, 2023

This interview caused
AOC to land on her face in humiliating fashion
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is
one of the country's least respected politicians. She shows
everyone why that's the case, anytime she speaks in public.

And this interview caused AOC to
land on her face in humiliating fashion.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Mike Pence attacked Trump
in this wild turn of events

Former Vice President
Pence has a lot of work to do if he wants to repair his
relationship with Trump. But his recent actions have put a fork
in that chance.
➞ Continue Reading

Kevin McCarthy was issued a
dire warning from this Republican

McCarthy has to tread
lightly these days. That's because his own party is breathing
down his neck to get what they want.
➞ Continue Reading

A top Democrat may lose
their job after breaking this law

Politicians don't
always play by the rules. But when they get caught, their world
is upended.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Granite Solutions Press
subject: RELEASE: Hal's Pals at the Daily Kos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

| | | | |
---
**Hal's Pals at the Daily Kos**
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
September 7, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **Salem, NH -** Representative Joe Sweeney, Founder of Granite Solutions, released the following statement calling out Hal Rafter for accepting the endorsement of Far-Left Socialist Media Organization Daily Kos:
“Hal Rafter's endorsement by the Daily Kos, a far-left pseudo media organization known for promoting extreme progressive policies and a socialist agenda, should be deeply concerning to all Granite Staters. The positions adopted by the Daily Kos, including socialized medicine and extensive government intervention in our economy, do not align with our state's values of limited government and individual freedom. In this upcoming special election, I know that Republican James Guzofski remains committed to focusing on fiscal responsibility, safeguarding our constitutional rights, and serving the best interests of the Northwood and Nottingham community. I encourage voters to consider these differences when making their choice at the polls on Tuesday, September 19th. The New Hampshire House already has far too many socialist wannabes serving in the chamber - we don’t need another.”
###
---
**BACKGROUND: **

**Daily Kos: A Platform with Far-Left Policies and a Socialist Agenda****
**
The Daily Kos is a prominent online platform known for its advocacy of far-left policies and a socialist agenda. When consider the upcoming special election and the Daily Kos’ endorsement of Hal Rafter, it's valuable to understand some common critiques of Daily Kos and its positions:

[_**1\. Far-Left Progressivism:**_](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F6%2F16%2F2175593%2F-It-s-time-for-Medicare-for-All-Prioritizing-health-care-over-profit/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/7YriKSVCoj7xaGM8qsq2XxdOs74=338) Daily Kos is a champion of extreme progressive policies, including socialized medicine and extensive government intervention in the economy. These policies would lead to economic inefficiency and a larger role for the government in people's lives.

[_**2\. Support for State Income Taxes:**_](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2013%2F03%2F01%2F1190755%2F-Report-Republican-tax-shifters-wrong-about-states-with-no-income-taxes-performing-better/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/0B-pS7JCMWwxpfIl55OiZPiMi5U=338)**** Daily Kos opinion pieces heap praise on state income taxes and claim that states that tax income and squander the wealth of their constituents are better off than states like New Hampshire where we have no income or sales tax and we will soon have no interest & dividends tax.

[_**3\. Emphasis on Socialism:**_](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2012%2F3%2F29%2F1078852%2F-75-Ways-Socialism-Has-Improved-America/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/pg9MCAmq2wCz6xW03wzyHjuG9ds=338)**** Daily Kos often aligns with socialist principles, advocating for wealth redistribution and government ownership of key industries. The historical track record of socialism is abysmal and future attempts at socialism would lead to economic stagnation and a loss of individual freedoms. The platform's advocacy for increased government control and regulation of the economy is met with skepticism by those who believe in the benefits of free-market capitalism for economic growth and individual empowerment, and is an affront to those who share in our Live Free or Die mentality while diminishing our New Hampshire Advantage.

_[**4\. Climate Activism:**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fcampaigns%2Fpetitions%2Fsign-the-petition-support-a-green-new-deal/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/V0YD7myqTVXbPxhvMZ7RArS8q1M=338)_**** Daily Kos's climate activism is known for its alarmist rhetoric and sweeping policy proposals, which are harmful to economic growth while ignoring the positive direction Free Market reforms are having on the environment. Their full-throated support of the “Green New Deal” is the latest socialist fad to destroy our economy and enrich big city liberals.

_[**5\. Gun Control:**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Factionnetwork.org%2Fforms%2Fsign-this-thoughts-and-prayers-are-not-enough-ban-assault-weapons/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/FrTMMFRJka9Q5ctFIVoiwtboM0c=338)_ Daily Kos advocates for stricter gun control measures, which will infringe on the rights of law-abiding citizens and fail to address the root causes of gun violence. Second Amendment and Article 2a Advocates simply cannot trust candidates endorsed by the Daily Kos.

_[**6\. Immigration Policy:**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Factionnetwork.org%2Fletters%2Fsign-and-send-the-petition-immigration-reform-is-human-infrastructure/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/5wv72Ya-jGPZ0GMvQicRlBVRIUc=338)_**** The platform's stance on immigration reform represents broad amnesty and lacks adequate border security measures and that will have implications for national security and the rule of law.
---
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Joe Sweeney, Chairman., www.GraniteSolutions.org

You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can [unsubscribe](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fberrima.eomail1.com%2Funsubscribe%3Fep=1%26l=345da996-87c1-11ed-909d-f1da49c32334%26lc=06b1829e-cf31-11ed-896a-873e60e08f9a%26p=8e546ee8-4d15-11ee-9985-5bd5d4ca96f3%26pt=campaign%26pv=4%26spa=1694088106%26t=1694088131%26s=7769c7c0d4af2e2542d6712f4aab06cecd1d9674cfdedd29f1b157f48faa53f2/1/0100018a6f8574f2-0a2cffe3-23f7-4b4c-8af4-cb35164e6ab3-000000/fFlGmBNaJq2lwnTNJGIpLmhW6Ro=338) at any time.

name: Midnight Polling Deadline
subject: Steve Scalise is exactly right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Americans can't afford gas and it's Joe Biden's fault

|
---
| | |
**"When Joe Biden became president, he declared war on American energy ...Day one, killing the Keystone Pipeline, making it very difficult to get permits, canceling lease sales, and all of that drove up the cost of energy dramatically." _\- Steve Scalise _**

⛽📈 Steve Scalise is 100% right. _**Joe Biden is killing American Energy and causing gas prices to skyrocket.**_ ⛽📈

Friend, do you agree with Steve Scalise about the Keystone pipeline? _**Tell us before MIDNIGHT! **_

---
| | | **OFFICIAL GOP POLL
Signature missing from: Friend
Deadline: 11:59 PM Tonight**
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z40sc2o8d6rmienvn2real5v8uussqmnnb4646e0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg64ob1c1h2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdv31ksnu6te5m3s8o0jb6k2hfef7p4t0ken8ii8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg64ob1c1h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zch6av8ff797j9h47o16gdcoe5ddd670b1h5d4gg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg64ob1c1h2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zli6rnr88qjqbd588te8bfstlaad6nmc4ob3m92g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg64ob1c1h2bs)
---
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50j8a8jagifisme2ca0knvjfd2sdaeieu9gir5o_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg64ob1c1h2bs "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

subject: On the Budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oA0Q6xg-8jBOGOm48KuT-QwPYJ1yFCugj_ZNJwQfS_dHxrBDvVcnWjFYS1PjtmaDDncBrakrVwo56TC8ewE5UlePbroyp-Z72UfzJvGPNejZB9NHstTXY2zkj8LLQjhZmzkunnxIh56LO7zz0CpakSNxyIgg-3TLXkMaZv6ubvM=&c=juh9VtRzdL-wzYFHYLkfPjDkyJX5sPnm1ZDv-s9g2YO28VGtoCcvqQ==&ch=5CaeKE3WPGzJCPAH5ymII2riI8uhqUReo8V13qeFVzv-y6PIerS8ng==)
---
| Budget Passed
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The General Assembly passed the budget yesterday.

The Senate voted 38-0. The Governor now has seven days to offer amendments. We recessed Wednesday afternoon and will be given 48 hours to review any new amendments.

This is one of the few times in recent years that I voted for the budget. While it is certainly not perfect, I feel this budget is the best version we will have this year.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfj09bdr9ojm3e1cktdf9cnnhbiscit5oo4njq0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg62oj6c1h2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0tc2ts08qao8ghflc1k1aef1m8pg2bqvk8bh0q0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg62oj6c1h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za1evmlaur96irusuiot9j5ekg69j2nh507f8h60_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg62oj6c1h2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5snb9u4446hrvbcgmu2fk3ubiltjsunio18kpo_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg62oj6c1h2bs)
---
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zve09uu967a423qq50vr3np239dpb1p4nbk95npg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg62oj6c1h2bs "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhc1f5mq2sfkb96nc5l8rr4dghj1p891p57b5q90_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6ap32cjh2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhri7a9s0ajnunllfd0rqlr06a4hdn32d6ald1ag_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6ap32cjh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztj0gvb6573j32t297mvuqit8e4chrqkej6h0ps0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6ap32cjh2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zovpqf2jgrnp0oj99blcn4brqu587co2e45fq6po_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6ap32cjh2bs)
---
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zffi630um3pkm0f154i1c2ba9mjh8gqruimqcrn0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6ap32cjh2bs "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

Team DeSantis

|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNTAtOWM1NjEzMTY3OTQxNGE0NWEyYTJmMTcxNjZmMTA4ZGQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYWU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1oc19hZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtX3AmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMtMDktMDdfYWUtc3R1Y2std2l0aC1iaWRlbl9oYV9hdWQwMDE2X2VtMDUyN19scDA0ODNfdGRzX25hX25hJnV0bV90ZXJtPVJBTk8wOTA3MjAyMyJ9/3uckWmYtYvR_Z7XkRvBRug)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: A quick story about my dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend,

I want you to meet one of my biggest heroes, my father, Jonathan.

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em230907-dad-el&refcode2=417_8507_882N4F&akid=417%2E8507%2E882N4F)
If you’re anything like I was as a child, you might remember thinking that your dad had all the answers.

But when I was in elementary school, my father faced one of the biggest challenges of his professional life.

You see, he worked as a salesman in the garment industry at a time when these roles were being shipped overseas to countries with cheaper labor. Frankly, he was worried that his job would be next on the chopping block.

What he did next always fills me with pride.

Seeing the writing on the wall, my father left his job and transitioned to a career in data storage sales, an emerging field that he knew nothing about, but spent months studying in order to prepare for the change

So while I was practicing my A-B-C’s, he was developing his technical proficiency so he could land an entry-level job in a new up-and-coming industry that was equal parts exciting and nerve-wracking.

And his hard work paid off. Today, he is going on twenty years in data storage sales and is one of the best in the business!

I think about that story often these days as I meet people across the district who are worried about their own job security as new technology like AI and automation rapidly expand into their everyday lives.

While no one knows for certain how these emerging technologies will affect our workforce, it is the responsibility of our leaders and representatives to make sure our communities have the resources they need to face the challenges ahead.

Whether that means learning a brand new skill, integrating new technology into their current roles, or making an industry-pivot like my father, they need to know that we have their back.

**That is why I support investing in people first by raising the minimum wage, expanding tax credits for families caring for young children and seniors, funding emerging industries, and pursuing bold tech regulations.**

We need to fight hard so New Yorkers have everything they need to succeed in a changing workforce.

That is what our campaign is all about, and I have my dad to thank for showing me how it is all done.

Thank you for reading and being a part of this team.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

[Support Us](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em230907-dad-el&refcode2=417_8507_882N4F&akid=417%2E8507%2E882N4F)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=417%2E8507%2E882N4F)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=417%2E8507%2E882N4F)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be4e5dc5feeb4fec86aefcd58942067a&_e=0OatIDlI7o0DCqtln_YoB8gQnrvzf4E2luT8uOSKA8gLssk1zQ7XaK_UTnFlIyoOGM32WarWFuWK_mecD5kR4WhkCxNGKCKXtIcs1U2mLoSz5_n86NG2mzxW9Yq25cfdKMIQIefxtPyy7BBouyI0vAS5z0e-WI7nN3CZO7anuBvX8fuqS7Q5kK1Xh2pIA__wve6qOrhnJkiVCCW-XfZJyl-0l1t9b8-5c02c35JZAXPt0XQr5pV-KWoVgr0NhZ9TNHS6Kgyhj3BcHCVKtBNKs4kqRBFB_Oqas02f6c75ftNjPmE1FX853FTxFNo2yJH2iLG2ellNbFzaet14BvfsCSjw-T_bxr7jSTynx61cVZ-7qx8wQz2brugPGC1rLMuR)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be4e5dc5feeb4fec86aefcd58942067a&_e=0OatIDlI7o0DCqtln_YoB8gQnrvzf4E2luT8uOSKA8gLssk1zQ7XaK_UTnFlIyoOGM32WarWFuWK_mecD5kR4WhkCxNGKCKXtIcs1U2mLoSz5_n86NG2mzxW9Yq25cfdKMIQIefxtPyy7BBouyI0vAS5z0e-WI7nN3CZO7anuBvX8fuqS7Q5kK1Xh2pIA__wve6qOrhnJkiVCCW-XfZJyl-0l1t9b8-5c02c35JZAXN3-C0NMCRg4Fbl8eHTZ5Wq6N7qww3OK4sJ5JjPadenFUfNw0VP_EdlVls5BQ-FAMwk8V_Plc_gUFjo6SJ7oDteR_DqfBFmsDivp4qLtCUgVqkhLtFle9l1CrhsH1B21x0c4kQWGKbrlw3GyGwmVXfo)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

When the Clintons went after Trump...

Hello.
If you have been waiting for the right time to make your first online contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan, Republican Mike Rogers’ entry into the race yesterday morning means there is no better time than right now. This is now a real race.
$1.
That is the amount we're asking you to contribute today. Yes, just $1.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Our veterans deserve better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Some of the most powerful conversations I've had since being sworn into Congress were with veterans. In 2019, I held my first Veterans Day town hall, and I've held one every November since. It's humbling to listen to Veterans' stories of service and sacrifice.

New Jersey has over 325,000 veterans, and the Third District has traditionally had among the most. As a civilian advisor in Afghanistan, I served alongside uniformed servicemembers at the height of the war. Now, I serve veterans as their voice in Congress. This job has given me a new perspective.

It's painfully clear to me that we, as a country, are simply not doing enough to honor and repay our veterans with the health care and benefits they've earned and deserve.

A lot of the veterans I meet tell me they're struggling. Whether getting care at the VA or access to their benefits, there always seems to be a barrier standing in the way. I find that unacceptable.

Too many veterans are getting short-changed by a system that doesn't work for them, and our country continues to fail to live up to the promise we made these brave men and women when they signed up to wear our country's uniform.

Our veterans have put themselves in harm's way, not just in terms of warfighting but also the long-term mental and physical follow-on effects. Last year, we passed the PACT Act to expand health benefits to veterans exposed to toxic substances.

Every year, I've voted and worked for increased funding for the VA so they can better serve those who served us. This includes better health care, mental health and suicide prevention, a new clinic, and protecting veterans from VA benefit errors. This bill is typically one of the most bipartisan efforts in Congress.

This summer was the first time I've voted against the Military Construction/VA funding bill. I voted no because it worsens the quality of life for servicemembers and families, takes us backwards on addressing extreme weather events, limits women's rights, and intentionally otherizes LGBTQ+ veterans who have served their country with honor.

The GOP Military Construction/VA funding bill that passed in the House, with nearly all Republican members voting in support, isn't how you serve veterans.

Veteran health care needs more investment, our military needs to be ready, women deserve equal rights, and the VA should welcome anyone who has worn the uniform.

Speaker McCarthy and Washington Republican politicians have no plan to fund the government responsibly. Our military and our veterans deserve better.

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: Some of the most powerful conversations I've had since being sworn into Congress were with veterans. In 2019, I held my first Veterans Day town hall, and I've held one every November since. It's humbling to listen to Veterans' stories of service and sacrifice. New Jersey has over 325,000 veterans, and the Third District has traditionally had among the most. As a civilian advisor in Afghanistan, I served alongside uniformed servicemembers at the height of the war. Now, I serve veterans as their voice in Congress. This job has given me a new perspective. It's painfully clear to me that we, as a country, are simply not doing enough to honor and repay our veterans with the health care and benefits they've earned and deserve. A lot of the veterans I meet tell me they're struggling. Whether getting care at the VA or access to their benefits, there always seems to be a barrier standing in the way. I find that unacceptable. Too many veterans are getting short-changed by a system that doesn't work for them, and our country continues to fail to live up to the promise we made these brave men and women when they signed up to wear our country's uniform. Our veterans have put themselves in harm's way, not just in terms of warfighting but also the long-term mental and physical follow-on effects. Last year, we passed the PACT Act to expand health benefits to veterans exposed to toxic substances. Every year, I've voted and worked for increased funding for the VA so they can better serve those who served us. This includes better health care, mental health and suicide prevention, a new clinic, and protecting veterans from VA benefit errors. This bill is typically one of the most bipartisan efforts in Congress. This summer was the first time I've voted against the Military Construction/VA funding bill. I voted no because it worsens the quality of life for servicemembers and families, takes us backwards on addressing extreme weather events, limits women's rights, and intentionally otherizes LGBTQ+ veterans who have served their country with honor. The GOP Military Construction/VA funding bill that passed in the House, with nearly all Republican members voting in support, isn't how you serve veterans. Veteran health care needs more investment, our military needs to be ready, women deserve equal rights, and the VA should welcome anyone who has worn the uniform. Speaker McCarthy and Washington Republican politicians have no plan to fund the government responsibly. Our military and our veterans deserve better. More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

I served in the Middle East as a Black Hawk helicopter pilot, and I’m running for Congress in Colorado to put a stop to the bleeding once and for all. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No First Amendment in the White House?
body:
The White House is sending a loud, clear message

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden's White House just changed the requirements for a journalist to obtain hard-pass credentials. The result... ...effectively banning our client, Simon Ateba, and more than 440 reporters from the White House Briefing Room. The White House is sending a loud, clear message: if you don't work for CNN, _The New York Times_ , or another legacy media outlet, and if you refuse to mindlessly lob soft balls to Karine Jean-Pierre about Joe Biden's ice cream du jour, you don't belong in the White House Press Corps. Because this White House doesn't respect the freedom of the press. **[Which is why I'm asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon's lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d571a84d0164fd0891da7a2cde0bfa5&_e=iaSkRASf29NdLvdKkvKx52TC8ahiuXfOUevhUtiWc6UtXERNYUXQVZ9DkkNy4fm4C--m00EXDK29AYFwBq875znByTptrr_h_5AF0FQWXPwHkkWyk0bDU62PEP02vUyf9iSZ153YqH2I9uccWKpsYG4OU8-CH4YJgPycZB8fUr0h2CeQY65j8c0zearlBJIh7JDoNDmFq79FbnoRTq7_k6BOw2eYkFcMa1Ig2iIzVfgRtTdYrfkAMbZK9JeGCJPWKJ1W7es9RYKaPv7w5B3-zIgDWQh6fd2h9HkYR094VvUFSvqn0jDNzdsrXKrwmuiLYU85--Z9ZszP47LAQ3wP9af7N6IIEbXsUopFYX8uuES6JeL647YioP4iCbv70rv7jaqtBAoSMll7rjjS60-fBA%3D%3D)** This White House has a terrible record of censoring journalists whose stories make the White House look bad. We all remember how the Biden Administration pressured "Big Tech" to censor journalists questioning the efficacy of the COVID-19 vaccine. Now, the White House is shifting its attention to our client, Simon Ateba. Simon Ateba is a journalist and White House correspondent with Today News Africa, a small a news organization focusing on ties and interactions between Africa and the United States. Simon frequently challenges Karine Jean-Pierre's non-answers, inaccurate information, and demands transparency and the truth. In response to Simon's insistence on getting the truth, the White House and Jean-Pierre changed the rules, I believe, to specifically target Simon and other journalists like him who want nothing more than to do their job as _real_ journalists. **That 's right - the White House rewrote the rules to shut out hundreds of hardworking reporters. ** And that's why we're suing the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre on behalf of reporter Simon Ateba. **[Will you send an urgent donation $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today to support our lawsuit on behalf of Simon Ateba and his fight for justice?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d571a84d0164fd0891da7a2cde0bfa5&_e=iaSkRASf29NdLvdKkvKx52TC8ahiuXfOUevhUtiWc6UtXERNYUXQVZ9DkkNy4fm4C--m00EXDK29AYFwBq875znByTptrr_h_5AF0FQWXPwHkkWyk0bDU62PEP02vUyf9iSZ153YqH2I9uccWKpsYG4OU8-CH4YJgPycZB8fUr0h2CeQY65j8c0zearlBJIh7JDoNDmFq79FbnoRTq7_k6BOw2eYkFcMa1Ig2iIzVfgRtTdYrfkAMbZK9JeGCJPWjmHAgXUKVFOL1q0C76tHouCyDHH58lOPKGkAQOMywtsddP_LMtCHvJVONLW8i2Xr7AYUCOxuP0WQSa8bApn7plDcrrbX7MT2hcsnDjVF5Vc4QR-86RxNjOF0kPkvcPKRTtdkffx_srHLfBsbfukpBA%3D%3D)** You and I know the White House's actions here are a clear violation of the freedom of the press. This is bigger than Simon or any one journalist, Friend. Because the Biden Administration doesn't just want to shut up Simon... ... it wants to censor every journalist who challenges the White House's lies, corruption, or abuse of power. We need your help right away. **[Which is why I'm asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon's lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d571a84d0164fd0891da7a2cde0bfa5&_e=iaSkRASf29NdLvdKkvKx52TC8ahiuXfOUevhUtiWc6UtXERNYUXQVZ9DkkNy4fm4C--m00EXDK29AYFwBq875znByTptrr_h_5AF0FQWXPwHkkWyk0bDU62PEP02vUyf9iSZ153YqH2I9uccWKpsYG4OU8-CH4YJgPycZB8fUr0h2CeQY65j8c0zearlBJIh7JDoNDmFq79FbnoRTq7_k6BOw2eYkFcMa1Ig2iIzVfgRtTdYrfkAMbZK9JeGCJPWe_brmehLy_OYA-M-szRwPjbxGYLAyEoAAUuelD9ug6Dejz1Iqp6FphvTsPLKZF7VLVdX0xobvTVt3Dlz3ftQM5YvhtFbgElH_uqEyOSxLBcov011CnNXrdtjZtkyylPj1OxrVQJIH7oI0fUvc-aDqQ%3D%3D)** **That 's why we've taken on Simon Ateba's legal battle - and why I hope you will step up and help us win this important battle.** Simon needs you, our attorneys need you, and your country needs you. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO

clean_body: The White House is sending a loud, clear message | | | | Friend, Joe Biden's White House just changed the requirements for a journalist to obtain hard-pass credentials. The result... ...effectively banning our client, Simon Ateba, and more than 440 reporters from the White House Briefing Room. The White House is sending a loud, clear message: if you don't work for CNN, The New York Times , or another legacy media outlet, and if you refuse to mindlessly lob soft balls to Karine Jean-Pierre about Joe Biden's ice cream du jour, you don't belong in the White House Press Corps. Because this White House doesn't respect the freedom of the press. This White House has a terrible record of censoring journalists whose stories make the White House look bad. We all remember how the Biden Administration pressured "Big Tech" to censor journalists questioning the efficacy of the COVID-19 vaccine. Now, the White House is shifting its attention to our client, Simon Ateba. Simon Ateba is a journalist and White House correspondent with Today News Africa, a small a news organization focusing on ties and interactions between Africa and the United States. Simon frequently challenges Karine Jean-Pierre's non-answers, inaccurate information, and demands transparency and the truth. In response to Simon's insistence on getting the truth, the White House and Jean-Pierre changed the rules, I believe, to specifically target Simon and other journalists like him who want nothing more than to do their job as real journalists. That 's right - the White House rewrote the rules to shut out hundreds of hardworking reporters. And that's why we're suing the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre on behalf of reporter Simon Ateba. You and I know the White House's actions here are a clear violation of the freedom of the press. This is bigger than Simon or any one journalist, Friend. Because the Biden Administration doesn't just want to shut up Simon... ... it wants to censor every journalist who challenges the White House's lies, corruption, or abuse of power. We need your help right away. That 's why we've taken on Simon Ateba's legal battle - and why I hope you will step up and help us win this important battle. Simon needs you, our attorneys need you, and your country needs you. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | | Dear Friend, This morning Team Kelly announced the endorsements of Manchester At-Large Alderman Joseph Kelly Levasseur and every Republican State Representative from Manchester! These latest endorsements from Republican Leaders in the Queen City come after last month's announcement that every Republican Representative in Merrimack endorsed Kelly’s campaign.These latest endorsements join over 200 others from across the Granite State in supporting Kelly Ayotte for Governor!
---
| |
---
| | In response to the endorsements, Kelly released the following statement, “I look forward to working with these leaders to help the Queen City become safer and stronger. Our team is growing by the day because leaders from across the state know that we need a tough conservative Governor who will fight every day to keep New Hampshire safe, prosperous and free.” Our team continues to grow every day. If you'd like to endorse our campaign [click here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/93OfiC1HG/c?w=5KyYOkW2C48PXWxbfLnJzk7LM5YDMMbvs6lTq7obw10.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxseWZvcm5oLmNvbS9hY3Rpb24tY2VudGVyLyIsInIiOiIyM2NhMzFmZi04NWJjLTRjYTUtOTI5ZC1jOTRlYTkwNjc5YjIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ). All the best, Team Kelly

---

| Friends,
We hope you had a wonderful Labor Day weekend with family and friends. We are back at it working hard to improve Virginia.
Yesterday we were back in the General Assembly doing the people's work. It was bitter sweet because Wednesday was probably my last day on the floor as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. God willing, I will win in November and continue serving you in the Virginia State Senate!
We Have a Budget!
When you have divided government, as we do here in Virginia, you don't get everything you want. I don't like everything about the budget, but I do like more than I don't. Governor Youngkin, Speaker Gilbert, Chairman Knight, Conferees, and many others put in many hours to get this done.
Here are some highlights of this bipartisan budget:
Tax Policy Changes:
This bill includes a total of $1.05 billion in tax reductions. This is an addition to the $4 billion tax relief adopted by the 2022 general assembly.
This bill also reinstitutes the sales tax holiday for school supplies, hurricane preparedness, clothing, footwear, and energy efficient durable goods which had expired. This year the sales tax holiday will be held the third weekend in October (Oct 20-22).
The standard deduction has increased to $8,500 for single filers and $17,000 for joint filers.
We reduced taxes for all retired veterans by removing the age 55 requirement. [Click here for my press release.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uyCtOdbWqoFZ6pbWvv8LVMxwTmm7aK99GXHmI2-2UxMZUd2bhOdQXevkf2FH4k1-NPlVanaeEwWzYwlUR2_0ypov-iN0HXRqak2amfDv0TR6EZQFvBKwMf0Bul3MTcN7euXXgzK9PA2OZq2oMmo-m8JOhM3ZcjxWLUaCA9-COQkEsiiHRJzivFJvBS-EigEWO9UQwjecfXkS6zBwo7sOdFZfULTOn-2apq7KBaQzqP7LyCku5I3IvgAQCRFj2N_awnpqJmBIzYZvnCgvuH3ihhFYxtYFXfMvimL9kV8FpBijCFmmgI1A8vJMwbXtlrep&c=VEvC324QzCVU9ZC6G7CTQyxHfMbPqlrgRTnu-2gdT6xeEgh1TQ2brA==&ch=U1dx2L_e23HZ93-vgNgx_c_cFiVRG6cTMCLJCVqwaBBFHY5bosBQkw==)
There is a one time Taxpayer relief check $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers.
Education:
The education budget has 10 Billion Dollars, the largest investment in education
There is a 2% Pay Raise for teachers.
Mental Health:
156 million invested.
I led the charge with Senator Cosgrove to get one million dollars in funding for Va Tech to research groundbreaking Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) - a procedure that uses magnetic fields to stimulate nerve cells in the brain to improve symptoms of major depression - available for veterans, first responders, and law-enforcement officers. This amazing procedure has helped Navy SEALs, Rangers in Regiment, and other special ops folks overcome combat related Traumatic Brain Injuries and in many cases they returned to service.
Public Safety: $5.1 million to support TDO/ ECO transportation activities and local law-enforcement agencies $15 million to increase support for operation cease-fire grant program 1.2 million for Internet crimes against children task force to backfill reduce financially revenue receipts
Water Quality:
644.5 million dollars for Fiscal Year 2024
My continued efforts to help led to 1 Million additional dollars for the Louisa County Algae Bloom Mitigation Lake Anna.
State Employees:
2% Pay Raise during middle of fiscal year (Jan 1 paycheck). There are targeted salary increases for; Community service boards, indigent defense commissioner: Public defenders, deputy sheriffs, regional Jail officers, commonwealth attorney staff, general district court clerks, circuit court clerks, VDH chief medical examiner's office, crime commission staff, Virginia sent us in commission staff.
Drug Overdose:
A few years ago I passed a bill to allow elementary, middle, and high school nurses to store and administer naloxone. Unfortunately overdoses are up and there is a shortage of kits. This budget includes $2 million to counter the [shortage of naloxone kits](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uyCtOdbWqoFZ6pbWvv8LVMxwTmm7aK99GXHmI2-2UxMZUd2bhOdQXevkf2FH4k1-hHOcr4haCHhFU7O21tqqhCI9FDNulCHH6Xn-mhZBCTVpaHrX_T-IH_Vdv2sPYo8u6V0LZChXyjoCZdW37g0UFe0HWDqLHlm3QjLqNb8TrPqoC8nx9uDfMEOlQ00CUCstTMIeBYUmgjQ=&c=VEvC324QzCVU9ZC6G7CTQyxHfMbPqlrgRTnu-2gdT6xeEgh1TQ2brA==&ch=U1dx2L_e23HZ93-vgNgx_c_cFiVRG6cTMCLJCVqwaBBFHY5bosBQkw==).
Yesterday, we voted for and passed the update to the [23-24 budget](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uyCtOdbWqoFZ6pbWvv8LVMxwTmm7aK99GXHmI2-2UxMZUd2bhOdQXevkf2FH4k1-tUKLiErSWKU7XmfGezKscQDMdxi1hXU2QVkA17P1uJ4rC9CHxoJWbCsiBG20MBqH8QyOpmySrIp0eA8yGLnZ0vTenoTBRyiJ3_ACsOjQYjWs7qiE3MqbUWRBl1EH7WkRMb-DhQvlqy1g1vR-THyFIg==&c=VEvC324QzCVU9ZC6G7CTQyxHfMbPqlrgRTnu-2gdT6xeEgh1TQ2brA==&ch=U1dx2L_e23HZ93-vgNgx_c_cFiVRG6cTMCLJCVqwaBBFHY5bosBQkw==).
FYI, the all new General Assembly building is open to the public October 11. I'm looking forward working and representing you as your next State Senator of District 10 there soon!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Friends, We hope you had a wonderful Labor Day weekend with family and friends. We are back at it working hard to improve Virginia. Yesterday we were back in the General Assembly doing the people's work. It was bitter sweet because Wednesday was probably my last day on the floor as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. God willing, I will win in November and continue serving you in the Virginia State Senate! We Have a Budget! When you have divided government, as we do here in Virginia, you don't get everything you want. I don't like everything about the budget, but I do like more than I don't. Governor Youngkin, Speaker Gilbert, Chairman Knight, Conferees, and many others put in many hours to get this done. Here are some highlights of this bipartisan budget: Tax Policy Changes: This bill includes a total of $1.05 billion in tax reductions. This is an addition to the $4 billion tax relief adopted by the 2022 general assembly. This bill also reinstitutes the sales tax holiday for school supplies, hurricane preparedness, clothing, footwear, and energy efficient durable goods which had expired. This year the sales tax holiday will be held the third weekend in October (Oct 20-22). The standard deduction has increased to $8,500 for single filers and $17,000 for joint filers. We reduced taxes for all retired veterans by removing the age 55 requirement. == There is a one time Taxpayer relief check $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers. Education: The education budget has 10 Billion Dollars, the largest investment in education There is a 2% Pay Raise for teachers. Mental Health: 156 million invested. I led the charge with Senator Cosgrove to get one million dollars in funding for Va Tech to research groundbreaking Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) - a procedure that uses magnetic fields to stimulate nerve cells in the brain to improve symptoms of major depression - available for veterans, first responders, and law-enforcement officers. This amazing procedure has helped Navy SEALs, Rangers in Regiment, and other special ops folks overcome combat related Traumatic Brain Injuries and in many cases they returned to service. Public Safety: $5.1 million to support TDO/ ECO transportation activities and local law-enforcement agencies $15 million to increase support for operation cease-fire grant program 1.2 million for Internet crimes against children task force to backfill reduce financially revenue receipts Water Quality: 644.5 million dollars for Fiscal Year 2024 My continued efforts to help led to 1 Million additional dollars for the Louisa County Algae Bloom Mitigation Lake Anna. State Employees: 2% Pay Raise during middle of fiscal year (Jan 1 paycheck). There are targeted salary increases for; Community service boards, indigent defense commissioner: Public defenders, deputy sheriffs, regional Jail officers, commonwealth attorney staff, general district court clerks, circuit court clerks, VDH chief medical examiner's office, crime commission staff, Virginia sent us in commission staff. Drug Overdose: A few years ago I passed a bill to allow elementary, middle, and high school nurses to store and administer naloxone. Unfortunately overdoses are up and there is a shortage of kits. This budget includes $2 million to counter the ==. Yesterday, we voted for and passed the update to the ==. FYI, the all new General Assembly building is open to the public October 11. I'm looking forward working and representing you as your next State Senator of District 10 there soon! | RIP Mia Ethridge | == | Mia Ethridge, a 20-year-old Louisa County firefighter passed away on Saturday after fighting injuries from a July crash. (Courtesy: Stafford Volunteer Fire Department) Thank for inspiring others to get involved in firefighting. RIP Mia. ==) | VHDA Shrimp Fest Fundraiser Powhatan | | | | | | | | | | | | | We had a wonderful time in Powhatan County at the fundraiser for the ==. Their President Kirby Burch and his team did an incredible job bringing out supporters from all over Virginia. Thank you for all you do to fight for hunters! | God and Country Rally | | | | Pastors from all over Central Virginia gathered for a God and Country Rally. I was honored to be one of the featured speakers there to talk about "Voting Bible". Unfortunately a large segment of the churchgoing population does not vote. We are working to get more churchgoers to participate in elections at the local state and federal level. | Monument Terrace Troop Rally | == | | | | | | | | | | | I made new friends and spoke to many fellow veterans at the weekly Monument Terrace Troop Rally in Lynchburg. Thank you for all you do to honor, support, and remember our veterans! == | Liberty University Convocation | | | | I was invited to attend a weekly convocation at Liberty University by my niece who sat with her fellow students. She had just completed her first week of school and is loving it. Liberty is an accredited Christian college that offers an education that is both academically challenging and rooted in a biblical worldview. We need more schools like this. Fellow veteran and President of Liberty University Dondi E. Costin, Ph.D. saw me looking for a seat, approached me, and invited me to sit with him and his wife Vickey. Thank you for the hospitality, I had a wonderful time! | A Wonderful Message | | This is a great message for Senate District 10, our Commonwealth, and our Nation. Just a reminder early voting starts 20 days from now September 22 and Election Day is November 7. I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Happy Birthday Dad! | | My dad turned 82 years young in September. Life is tough, but so is my dad. Dad, you did a great job, teaching us, perseverance, and the importance of always staying positive. I love you dad! | Tom Leonard Jujitsu Tournament | | I had the honor of attending a jujitsu tournament where my friend Tom Leonard was the oldest competitor in the tournament. Thank you for the inspiration and wisdom. We are proud of you! | Three Crosses Distillery Celebrates 5 Years in Powhatan | | Three Crosses Distilling Company celebrated 5 years of business in Powhatan County. I enjoyed celebrating this accomplishment with fellow veteran John, his wife Michelle, and others. During the pandemic they adapted by producing hand sanitizer. They also do events to support the community including events for our law enforcement. Congratulations on this significant milestone! == | Upcoming Events | Rally for Henrico Candidates September 18 | | We are working hard to get a majority in the State Senate and the House of Delegates. It is very important we get Senator Siobhan Dunavant re-elected, and we help elect David Owen and Riley Shaia to the House of Delegates. Come out to the Dominion club September 18 and support our candidates! As Governor Glenn Youngkin says, we "must lock arms" and win in November. Because, right now, that is all that matters! | Human Trafficking Update Goochland | | Meet The Candidates Buckingham | | 10th Annual Beaverdam Brew Jam Hanover | == | Come on out and support the largest Beaverdam Ruritans Club fundraiser September 9th in Hanover County. == | Constitution Day Goochland | | The Goochland Tea Party works hard each year to support experienced Republicans who focus on policy not politics. They put this event on each year to encourage patriotism and educate the community. We hope to see you then! | Re-elect Senator Siobhan Dunnavant Henrico County! | | Two Delegate Tara Durant for State Senate Events! | | | RSVP to Tara Durant Events, contact Kathy Roberts at krobertshd28@gmail.com (mailto:krobertshd28@gmail.com) or (540)538-1119 | Field Day of the Past Amelia County | | Spirt of Virginia & Rally Virginia Henrico County | | It really is amazing how much effort Governor Glenn Youngkin, Rooz Dadabhoy, and the Rally Virginia folks are making to help strong Republican candidates win across Virginia. We hope to see you then! | Powhatan Meet & Greet | | Goochland Tea Party Tent | | Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent each Saturday 10am to 4pm at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103 next to the Food Lion in Centerville each Saturday from now to November 7. Stop by and learn about local politics, meet local candidates, get yard signs, Trump gear, McGuire gear, and more. Please bring a friend! | Trump | | The first former US President to get a mug shot. This is ridiculous. We definitely have a two-tiered justice system. Are we a Banana Republic or what? Please pray for Trump! == | Be "numb to the dumb", keep it positive, and stay focused on the mission. God willing, I will win in November and continue to serve you in the Virginia State Senate. Our goal is to get as many fellow Virginia Republicans elected as possible so we can stop the nonsense. Don't forget early voting begins September 22. Please consider supporting Governor Youngkin's effort to "==". Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! | New: 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Republican Nominee for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2uggu04ideropepacuip7bkj2lj836c6fali08_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6eo72cjh2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4kim9r5qtq0sn5ted5ru9i8jqicknitjes8fqgo_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6eo72cjh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now")** , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zplu7r7vts3kjm8654h4u6uk0ob7ptd2bubs8lio_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6eo72cjh2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9a50hhj3f1q2k5fjag3t2ru6kmqj7onero35too_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6eo72cjh2bs)
---
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlbatmis2bojgunl0ih54o8isjc4eub8of1ei8d8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chg6eo72cjh2bs "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

name: Attention Trump Patriots [via Team Marsha]
subject: President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION
body:
See it for yourself:

| |
---
| | | President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION on the latest criminal arrest and attempt to END his 2024 campaign.

See it for yourself:

_"Isn’t is TERRIBLE that a Political Opponent can haphazardly charge you with FAKE crimes in the middle of your campaign in order to interfere with your time & message, and there is nothing you can do to stop this travesty of 'justice.' They had 2.5 years to file, long before the campaign started. Another Russia, Russia, Russia HOAX. Should not be allowed to happen!"_

Donald Trump is holding nothing back. He's made it clear that this witch hunt is nothing more than a SHAM that must end immediately!

He was just indicted for the FOURTH time meaning another court appearance is on the way.

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: How are we going to do it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPR0Om7oqZnvVeFv3bcsaYCSh40kr-3BuX44i6sNgYez8dHbxXiU8sE2-P4x02EXbr7RLcQXbI8wrz63de7NVfSvSQrT8W-qBhItpxcxCgIR9QPrsI129TNroOooBqzEI_-X7_SsxatC5f9FqWwVgkJs)
---
Peter, Every day, I’m asked the same questions.

_How are you going to beat Tim Kaine?_
_Can you really win in Virginia?_
_Do you know how much money Tim Kaine has?_

It can get exhausting, but I understand. People in Virginia are used to business as usual from entrenched Democrat politicians.

Our mission is something different.

I’m not a career politician. I’m a proud husband, father of five, combat veteran, and a proud patriot.

I’m the Democrats’ worst nightmare, because I’m living proof that no matter where you came from or what you look like, you can make it in America.

While Tim Kaine was sitting in his cushy K-Street office, I was fighting for our country. And even though I’m back stateside, it doesn’t mean my fight is over.

**[It’s time to defend the American Dream with someone who’s lived it. Please, join my fight today and help me take back the U.S. Senate and send Tim Kaine packing!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPSNL5ahV2_e2Bwofiqdqy8hEupNQCh9DUaH8eNPomJ8FIiQqu2MghBYM9lMrVi6p3h7yClROndL1jz8YLzVOzP1y9r9U3BpIFUxMP0cZKyCQPJhaZxvUbV2sJhTl4MpDKiPqp8lWJupWLUaDdBMAWkr)**
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPRJdjXJmahbwnRqVjuYTCPNamLSgWsHsY3jOMSigGWm5cjU59vMV1bOYNAZnYAt1nCKUKAL8wvTgAUs5Z1BD-g4WI9FpNjtvnmkWHTdUPUVePCPP21KEV5miFi7AsKfEJgCZ7AM6NXVM3uh0K3b3sXY)
---
I don’t have blank checks from mega-donors from inside the beltway, Peter.

But I DO have a team of dedicated patriots like you who are sick and tired of business as usual in our state.

I never said this mission was going to be easy. But I know from my time in the Navy that with hard work and dedication, victory is always possible.

I’m not afraid of a challenge, and I know you aren’t either.

**[Please, pitch in now and join our fight to TAKE BACK THE U.S. SENATE and FIRE Tim Kaine!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPTf7vBmKy6c_deO5Ol6n-JanuHhkViHmgoU00AA9-tpE7N197cgeFmT_zHCNRlovE5XP_xlL4HEKVN84obh7fL1HQEQVC-mLZh8xInc4jyMtnFSUHDEqEMc9qUXv0ZOvK7GmxIIp0O87EY7QrewdQrL)**
---
[**JOIN OUR FIGHT**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPRZTFhQIyQ-VCGwVvzdooDc5yvnIKqOFd3b9r0biAJp5uYmQDPei_GJN5BFrhnRGIRqm_ou2-N7un04XH4pW1Y1BlnfaPcG_vCQjuEBNk93EEAbZseFApJyMuNk3C3Zl5wxc621iQtEuC0t8vTNXrTi)
---
In Liberty,
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8c36a5c9d90945bfbf897e8347ace97a&_e=H2ormYv7fnrYRv66yITb8rBzmq3a9HmNc1Ownwvq1n7LRHWS13rjuzdL5P_j08NMO-V5G49HZfG2HIV0D8ZXfc6EgTx1vZtAjiJUaCezqSXBZnn7yi1XE4EKfVME56unefQyOTrdvTF38F030QbyaN71UzgpYPg-aJ93BKifpuqyZ4w9lU5eD_-vgb0HodQ_fDZ9V4FrSR-11P9ubW4HNXjftJQeyfX3GAqQXAzGgPS6WoVK1yxvG_fsPlyx7VzI77vRRLEKpkCvQUBt2nWih6wdB4drAm8mh0eT_0_etu6Wspqui4eVfpInUz0dmlNs-HlQZS9rxqpdwl0-O_L1LSMMjajb5HsttAMC32QMgBNlLFOOvTsqjiJgasCPbPBH)
---
CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) P.S. I know how hard Virginians are suffering under Joe Biden and Tim Kaine’s leadership. If you are one of them, please ignore this request for a donation. Save your money and let’s get ready for a huge election in 2024. Thank you.

name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c7d33ddd47d4e3d83f8b173c61e39d4&_e=bchG9bUKhsYK8_CYLT-KVnxEuSZZVH42RIIOTKoNy7k9k-8tijxT3QmsIj1XY8hc_5gJgKorDNXuE0RWA3j-Sp8PGfPjF0WGcRY7mj5vsgu8Dys76IrZPbQ7mLO_dUMBdjBHN7hUE9dM6Si2Kx273JqRcy1M9VO0Hicp7y4MvejBXIstU0gkS_1IYK8xs_0_BFl6_z-L5VHoJ6q6TNjOjIm83Fiz4mgMABNZlJHkhm70aQaP2xzGH264H4v0Gn7ZYd_5sVq39nbQxmtwQ1CCz5cm7g-DQDnfxsaQH_8RwSCiGU5tMn3abjvc-HFL86h5LX6cq_OaFbiMGmRxnFDnVXPpie6J4KI4cglo-VodNJpN2QKFLeSwscgwjFr1MYhSCYu9m-WikeQRNIPl4DqptcCeuUCcDg4Ap2vwDb2LpzU%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

### YOU WRITE THE BILL WORKSHOP - SEPT. 14

Join us Thursday September 14th, 5:30 pm, at the Melrose Branch Library Community Room, for our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop". You'll be able to learn about how a bill becomes law here in the Commonwealth, as well as work with others that share your passion to draft bills. All are welcome! Please share with anyone you think may be interested.

### VIRGINIA TECH LAUNCHES TWO UNIONS

I am excited to support the Virginia Tech graduate student workers, faculty, and staff who announced their unions on September 5th, the UCWVA-VT and the VT GLU.
Virginia is for Unions!
