### [Rob Banse for HD-30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_GlDzblDHN8xrpCUUiTXcM5iV4KMcWG0waZdkF0RQK9E_L2hNRgEBMlkdVYcJF6ZDnDNNsBiGw5pDPsvjmR_lyIARi0U_WO6VlRPn5l_3tWnAtaD5fvGyRf2llcDgpPReq035dKCzac=&c=LCThtXQQC9I4AYUsCkMg6N4B5X8dbPPmvsw49Hb8PdgqW8RDW56Vlw==&ch=LyJH7GNg8HKmXOEwjY71riRJ98KQ_YzL4Sa_5h1obuz5CZfGJWknLA==)

Rob Banse believes that integrity and reason matter. A church leader who has served in Western Loudoun and Northern Fauquier Counties for 17 years, Rob is now stepping up to represent his home district in the Virginia House of Delegates.
Rob considers it the greatest honor to have spent his career caring for people, celebrating life's great moments and supporting them through life's greatest challenges. Through years of leadership, he has learned real progress is made when we bring together a diverse group of people, listen carefully, and respond to their needs.
Rob strongly believes there is more that unites us than divides us. His candidacy represents a desire to move away from inflammatory politics and toward real service that responds to the needs of his district. He will bring this unifying approach to his work in the House of Delegates.

### Canvass for Lily Franklin!

On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645.

### Roanoke Run for Refugees - Sept. 8
---
Support literacy instruction for re-settled families living in Roanoke in our Run for Refugees 2023 Welcoming Week Event!
All proceeds go to support families learning English and job skills currently living in Roanoke.
On the day of, participants may register in person by visiting our registration table by 5:30 at Wasena Park.
The kids 1k race will begin promptly at 6 pm and the full 5K at 6:20 pm.

Each participant pays tribute to a FDNY firefighter by climbing the equivalent of the 110 stories of the World Trade Center.

name: Charles Eisenstein
subject: The America that almost was, and yet may be
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Up until this year, I never thought I would be involved in politics. I had completely given up hope in the political system. Change, I thought, would have to come from the outside. If it happened at all, it would be through a profound collapse and rebirth from the ground up.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Up until this year, I never thought I would be involved in politics. I had completely given up hope in the political system. Change, I thought, would have to come from the outside. If it happened at all, it would be through a profound collapse and rebirth from the ground up. Then last April I met Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., and a dormant hope—a hope I didn’t know I had—was ignited. That is why I put a successful career as a writer and philosopher on the back burner, to devote myself full time to the campaign. I brought with me a vision encapsulated in the phrase, “The America that almost was, and yet may be.” It comes from a sense that America harbors a potential to live up to its founding ideals. Never in history did our nation meet those ideals, but for a brief, golden moment, it looked like we might. That moment was the early 1960s. America was far from perfect, but powerful movements were afoot to right many of its historical wrongs. The civil rights movement, women’s liberation, and other social movements showed the possibility of justice. Meanwhile, our country was at the very pinnacle of its wealth and power. We carried a boundless can-do spirit and belief in our national capacity. No challenge was too great for us to face, no achievement too difficult. Thus it was that John F. Kennedy was able to inspire Americans with the words, describing the moon mission, “We choose to do these things not because they are easy, but because they are hard.” Even though the United States was a dominant global power, JFK was an anti-imperialist who was sympathetic to liberation movements throughout the Third World. He recalled figures of the Roosevelt administration like Henry Wallace and Harry Hopkins who wanted not to take over the disintegrating British empire, but to disband it. They, and Kennedy after them, envisioned a world of free, equal, and peaceful relations among nations. When asked what he wanted to be remembered for, he said he hoped his epitaph would read, “He kept the peace.” Thus it was that he defied his cabinet and Joint Chiefs of Staff in refusing to bomb Cuba after the Bay of Pigs, in negotiating with Kruschev, and in ordering US advisors out of Vietnam. He was appalled by the runaway power of the military-industrial complex and the CIA, vowing to “split [the CIA] into a thousand pieces and scatter them to the wind.” It was shortly thereafter that JFK was assassinated. America then took a very different path—the path of empire and war. The hopes of uplifting its oppressed minorities and ending poverty were bankrupted by the catastrophic expenditures of the Vietnam War, one of a long series of imperialistic wars that continue to this day. Our infrastructure, our civil society, and our national character hollowed out from the inside. The violence and oppression we visited upon the world was mirrored at home. Sixty years and tens of trillions of dollars later, we have become what imperial powers inevitably become. Staggering wealth inequality, chronic disease, loss of civil liberties, corruption in government, and an epidemic of cynicism and despair—these all plague America today. Yet, the alternate historical timeline our country could have walked if JFK had prevailed is (like my own hope) only dormant. It is not dead. The incredible response to RFK Jr.’s campaign shows that the popular will still exists to make America what it almost was and yet could be. It is an incredible quirk of history that the man who might rejoin this broken timeline is none other than the nephew of John F. Kennedy and the son of Robert F. Kennedy, also assassinated in 1968. No leader on his own can reclaim a country like ours. It can only happen through a massive popular movement that unites left and right, Black and White, young and old, rural and urban, the dispossessed working class and even members of the elite who are ready to defect from the establishment. Only such a movement could carry a man like RFK Jr. to the White House in the face of the unrelenting hostility of the media and other mainstream institutions. The elites, the foreign policy establishment, the corrupt corporate interests, and the transnational financial behemoths recognize a threat when they see one. Possessed of intelligence, charisma, and above all, courage, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is indeed a threat. I am writing to you to perhaps explain a bit of why so many of us feel an unreasonable hope around this candidacy. The tide of history is turning. This isn’t a fundraising letter. But I would like to make a request. If this letter helps illuminate some of your reasons for hope, could you please forward it to your friends, who may be wondering why you follow this campaign? And if you are one of those friends, please visit our [website](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=2) to learn more about our candidate and the policies we are developing for peace, freedom, fairness, and economic vitality. And when you get there, please join our mailing list! That’s the core of the movement we need to build. Most of our emails are from the team of course, but some will be from Bobby himself, and I will also write another letter some months down the road. In times of cynicism and disappointment, thank you for being willing to hope. Charles Eisenstein Advisor to Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. [https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=3)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=4) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=5) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=6) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_america_that_almost_was6&n=7)

body:
On far too many college campuses across the country, extremists have placed major barriers between students and the ballot box. |

| | Do you agree that it’s essential for students to have the opportunity to make their voices heard in every election? On far too many college campuses across the country, extremists have placed major barriers between students and the ballot box — banning student IDs as valid forms of voter identification, eliminating nearby and on-campus polling locations, tightening mail-in voting laws, and more. This is no coincidence: Student voters have turned out in record numbers to reject extremists' agendas in previous elections, and they'll continue to if people like us stand up for their freedom to vote. That’s why we launched the Fair Fight U program on college campuses throughout Georgia. [**_To start the 2023 school year off strong, and to protect and expand students’ access to the ballot box, we’re asking you to contribute to our Fair Fight U program!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69336930/425835342/630858577?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230907_f_backtoschool1_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGFmZmUxMi04NzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGBcmLnoklwpLSIsYQaHEUn0TWUXDvHo86IvKUFzeXk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69336931/425835343/630858577?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230907_f_backtoschool1_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGFmZmUxMi04NzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGBcmLnoklwpLSIsYQaHEUn0TWUXDvHo86IvKUFzeXk=) This fund will keep student organizers energized with coffee and snacks, provide them with tabling supplies for voting information like clipboards and pens, and more — so they can continue to engage and educate other students on Georgia campuses ahead of local and presidential election cycles. **We did the math, and in order to fund this work for the beginning of the school year, we need to raise $7,000 by tomorrow at midnight.** Thank you for helping empower college students! The Fair Fight Action Team

CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Jack Bergman has a 'Very Poor' grade with the GOP Accountability Project, and has repeatedly violated his oath to the constitution and to our military. He compromises our democracy, national defense and military readiness.
As we observe Bergman's approval of Sen. Tubberville's blockade of military appointments, questions also linger regarding his alleged relationship with Proud Boys.
Among other rumors of connection, Bergman coordinated a 2020 event with John James, at which members of the Proud Boys volunteered. He refused to answer reporters about it.
Most notably, Bergman was involved in an election lawsuit, during which he collaborated with conspiracy theorists to schedule their amateur audit of ballots.
The flawed results of Bergman's audit ignited the Big Lie, which led to insurrection. He played a big role in Jan 6.
Most recently, Bergman teamed up with Lauren Boebert to co-sponsor amendments that challenge diversity in the military. His ties with the so-called Freedom Caucus need to be scrutinized.
Friend, thank you for your help [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] in holding Jack Bergman accountable. Extremism has no place in rural America.
v/r -Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Democrat for Congress

Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. **Unlike everyone else who was on the debate stage last month, I am NOT bought and sold by a Super PAC._This campaign is funded by _YOU__!**

Team Vivek is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I won't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say **[but I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=1dae9947696b49429f47afa73f4741e8&_e=oY1wWQsX0BKwmBg8-mr83o1_Xx0PR1Ku9_hlQeg0tG2lEM6bnDaq2nmZkik2efegyA_XoYKTxW2Y4_vmrMUq2YFkcLAfLv6O2PoNLmnZuOkNI75HnkD49HxdgIov_0P9z27cu0-rJ-AcZgRn9VphB9gDJUFGTzR0qGvZOUncvOAAGqBxtVFPDNBk4WQs4fMkunkJf819PxAWYfprfKo08N9aPVuATq6zPH1CyaksZvKcTDrpfp755EwujzHBOav3zVJsv6B5G6i9aeZ7kTIdsaLGl7LVjFOW_bLwfCk6sdv8xBNJW3Q4pXtp_-6doYe4kgF5DGNjTbDStGPflFT_dOZn0g88czo0nqODw6-gf46PXFU3jTUNMyzfMMn1wnqvbgf-ukll_dYF8Jvgt0o_eA%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Unlike everyone else who was on the debate stage last month, I am NOT bought and sold by a Super PAC.This campaign is funded by YOU! Team Vivek is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I won't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. subject: Follow along with the Kings and LWFAA!
body:
Below are some updates from our recent endeavors. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/follow-along-with-the-kings-and-lwfaa?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

When Janelle and I decided to continue our political journey with Let’s Win for America Action, we had one main goal: to bring a winning message to diverse communities. While we may face criticism from the “culture,” it’s the love that we have for our country and the good we know we can bring to underserved communities that keep us going. Below are some updates from our recent endeavors.

It was an honor to sit with Congressman Byron Donalds right here in our great State of Georgia earlier this week. We had a great meeting discussing the power behind engaging and empowering men. It is always a pleasure to exchange ideas with like-minded conservatives who share our vision of strengthening the American Dream, which includes combatting the destructive narrative of toxic masculinity and promoting pro-family policies. We thank Congressman Donalds for his insight and continued leadership in the House!
---
|
---
| Janelle has been on fire, meeting with outstanding grassroots groups like the Middle Georgia Republican Women. We’d like to thank Whitney Ondike, Rachel Ferraris, and the entire group for the invitation. Janelle also appeared on Fox News, where she flipped the narrative regarding Dr. Fauci and the recent change in rhetoric surrounding COVID and new mask mandates. We are huge supporters of health and safety, but we’re no fools. We will continue to use our voices to advocate for personal autonomy and common sense regarding the government’s role in healthcare.
---

Over the last nine months, we have seen evidence of a change in our party and our country. With the most diverse slate of Republican presidential candidates of our time, a monumental move away from affirmative action, and a growing population of conservatives throughout America, we know that we’re headed toward the right direction, and that our mission must continue.

LWFAA is funded by conservative activists like you. To our supporters, we cannot thank you enough. We will need your help to continue our efforts through 2024 and beyond, and we ask that you consider giving to our mission. Kelvin King

name: Team Gallego
subject: Here’s the problem.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Blake Masters isn’t any old GOP candidate.
#

Peter, we’ve got a bit of a problem.
The people we’re running against in Arizona are so far-right, the positions they take are so extreme, that it’s easy to think they’re not serious candidates.
Even President Obama couldn’t help but make fun of Blake Masters.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=1&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)
But then we get back to those positions. And to be perfectly honest with you, they’re frightening.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=2&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)
Beyond that, they don’t adhere to basic, common standards of day-to-day life. Whether that’s something as simple as respecting our military, or as serious as personally assaulting a senior citizen that you disagree with.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=3&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)
This just is not normal behavior for a candidate running for Senate.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=4&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)
And yes, that is an assault rifle in the back seat of Blake’s car.
You see, Blake Masters isn’t any old GOP candidate. He’s dangerous. He came inches from winning against Mark Kelly in 2022, and raked in millions of dollars doing it.
And once Masters announces his campaign, he will raise millions more — money he’ll use to attack Ruben Gallego and use this second chance to take back Arizona’s Senate seat for the GOP for good.
We have to be ready for that, and we need your help so we can fight back when the time comes.
So we’re coming to you with a humble request:
[**We need you to make your first donation today. $5, $10, $20 — the amount isn’t important. Just make that donation of whatever you can afford and help us keep Blake Masters out of the Senate. Please.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=5&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-sept23.OJUjMA&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=24&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-sept23.R355ly&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=25&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-sept23.YPi0nf&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=26&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-sept23.GEIAVR&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=27&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-sept23.6P_dy0&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=28&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230907-1-ASP&t=29&akid=1146%2E734936%2EboC0KS)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Gallego

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin is no stranger to close elections -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | In just a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and the DSCC ahead of our crucial deadline tonight.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12735?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=11867%2E9716520%2EX4PU3P)** But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so important — especially right now.

Wisconsin is no stranger to close elections. Four of the last six presidential races in our state have been decided by less than a single point. And after pouring $77 million into the state, Republicans won Wisconsin’s Senate race last year by just 1%.

So as the GOP looks to flip the two seats they need to reclaim the majority and hand the gavel over to Mitch McConnell, you better believe they’ve got their eyes on my race in Wisconsin. They’ll do and spend whatever it takes to flip my seat.

With Republican leaders threatening everything from Social Security cuts to a national abortion ban, we can’t allow them to take my seat and the Senate majority with it. But it’s no secret this could be my toughest and most expensive race yet, **and the hard truth is that Republicans could easily squeak by here and win if we do nothing to stop them.**

That’s why our team has set an ambitious fundraising goal to build the resources we’ll need to fight back and protect this seat, but right now, we’re coming up a little short, which is why I’m asking:

**[Will you please consider splitting a donation between the DSCC and my reelection campaign to help us reach our $50,000 goal before the deadline and defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12735?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=11867%2E9716520%2EX4PU3P)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tammy Baldwin for Senate and the DSCC.

| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/12735?amount=5&t=8&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=11867%2E9716520%2EX4PU3P)

The path to victory for Democrats runs right through Wisconsin, and any contribution you can give will keep me out on the campaign trail talking to voters across the state. It’s going to take all of us pitching in to win — I'm up to the task, and I'm hoping I can count on you to join me.

Thanks for everything,

Tammy

Tammy Baldwin
U.S. Senator, Wisconsin

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12735?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230907-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=11867%2E9716520%2EX4PU3P)

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Ready for the Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Congresswoman Jen Kiggans here. For those I haven’t met yet, I’m a Mom, Navy veteran, and Nurse Practitioner who pulled off a HUGE victory last year when I flipped a Democrat seat into Republican hands in one of the closest races in the entire country. But now I’m the Democrats’ top target and a Biden Democrat JUST launched her campaign against me for this battleground seat. But I have three simple words for the Democrat Machine: BRING. IT. ON. I’m not a career politician, so their political attacks and petty games don’t scare me. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=9b4569f8abd3a7c67777687042b0a5bf58faf168bc4cfa68059198ca5a5f859dd87186e16852f1857d61cf205f637515f80a8102de469560 I’m ready for the fight ahead because I know the facts are on my side. I’m incredibly proud of all we have accomplished in just a few short months. From voting to secure the border to fighting for better care for our veterans, I’ve hit the ground running and focused on delivering results. But we’ve seen how this goes…facts don’t matter to the Democrats…they will lie and spread misinformation about me and Republicans…they will call us every name in the book, and sadly the Mainstream Media and Big Tech will have their back…we are going to be up against A LOT. But as a veteran, military spouse, and Mom of four, I’ve never encountered a challenge too big, and I’m committed to running hard and WINNING in 2024. But, the reality is I can’t do it alone. Folks,

The stakes are simply too high for this race in Pennsylvania to remain "obscure" any longer.

**Right now, Democrats Bob Harvie and Diane Marseglia are in a neck-and-neck race with Republicans over control of the Bucks County Board of Commissioners — which oversees how people vote in the county.**

If Republicans control the county commission, they could make it a lot harder for people to vote, swinging the district for Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. [And if MAGA Republicans sue the county like Trump did after 2020 (11 times!), we _have_ to make sure it's Democrats defending voters' voices not election deniers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69342024/425853576/-1457126989?refcode=email_090723_bucksunited&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJkNzIzNy04ZjRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Lhdzm8EiI4EctIN8pUcwkIab65TeP1HdQReRNn4wPI=)

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: It’s time for us to show up for Freddie O’Connell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Chip Forrester, treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
I’ve endorsed Freddie O’Connell for Mayor because he’s unquestionably the right candidate for the job in this runoff. Every single one of us needs to show up to vote because the stakes couldn’t be higher.
Nashville is currently at a crossroads in our relationship with the state government. Put more bluntly - we’re facing a hostile takeover from our state legislature.
The decisions we make at the ballot box will shape the future of our city and our ability to stand up for our values and priorities.
In this critical moment, we need a mayor who possesses a deep understanding of the political dynamics driving this process.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/Screenshot%202023-09-07%20at%209.18.06%20AM.png]
Freddie O'Connell is the right person for this vital role. His leadership, vision, and dedication to Nashville are unwavering. He has even published a list of 15 Fixes [https://www.readyforfreddie.com/15-fixes] he’ll begin to implement on his first day in office, demonstrating his readiness to hit the ground running as mayor.
He understands the complexities of both state and Metro government and has a proven track record of building strong relationships. Freddie's history of team-building, leadership, and achieving results uniquely qualifies him to lead our city during these challenging times.
Nashville, our future is hanging in the balance.
It's imperative that we come together as a community to make our voices heard.
Early voting is open from now until September 9th, and Election Day is September 14th. I urge you to get out and vote for Freddie O'Connell as Mayor of Nashville.
Sincerely,
Senator Heidi Campbell
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Chip Forrester, treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

| | | Annie and I wanted you to be the first to see:

We just launched our new ad. Now, we need your help to spread the word. Will you click here to watch the video and contribute to make sure it’s seen?

_**Warning—video contains images some viewers may find disturbing**_

Will you click here to watch the video and contribute to make sure it’s seen? Warning—video contains images some viewers may find disturbing Here’s why this video is important—and why we put a warning on it. Gun violence is a public health crisis, and the fear of mass shootings is traumatizing our children. We cannot afford to ignore this issue for a second longer, which is why Their Future PAC is leveling up our fight with this new ad. But Annie and I need your help to make sure this video does just as it was intended to do: raise awareness, inspire change, and compel you to act. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Until the kids are alright, Renee Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

name: Mike Pence
subject: Open Borders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Border security is national security.

| |
---
| | | |
**Exclusive: Smuggler with ties to ISIS helped migrants enter US from Mexico, raising alarm bells across government**

_CNN 8.29.23_

---

Biden’s actions on day one as president to stop the border wall construction and undo our border security policies had nothing to do with keeping Americans safe. It was all politically motivated.

Now, we have ISIS members helping illegal immigrants cross into the U.S., putting every American life at risk.

Let me be clear: _**Border security is national security.**_

**[We must put an end to Biden’s open border nonsense. That’s why I need you to rush your support to my Secure The Border Fund. Whether $1 or $100, any donation will be crucial to ending the invasion at our southern border.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22207%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DC7oumqFAKV7a2oYtpC4rQ&sysid=1 "We must put an end to
Biden’s open border nonsense. That’s why I need you to rush your support to my
Secure The Border Fund. Whether $1 or $100, any donation will be crucial to ending
the invasion at our southern border.")**

I know what it takes to secure our southern border, and I have the record to prove it. As your Vice President, I was responsible for negotiating the “Remain in Mexico" policy, which required asylum seekers to stay in Mexico while their cases were being processed.

On day one, as your president, I will restart the border wall construction and restore our policies that work.

_**[Please join me in this effort.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22208%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3RR%2bZQa7Y5aHTgm7PrK9WA&sysid=1 "Please join me in this
effort.")**_

---

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: We can stop Fox News, Donald Trump and right-wing misinformation
body:
If our democracy is going to endure, news organizations must learn from the mistakes of 2016.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)
Peter — in 2016, Donald Trump masterfully used cable news outlets like CNN and Fox News to draw attention to his campaign and spread dangerous misinformation.
Trump won because they put ratings and profit first, and our country hasn’t been the same.
**We founded COURIER as a direct response to these failures.** We believe that restoring public trust in journalism can strengthen our democracy. Building that trust starts with calling out misinformation and bringing quality, local news to the communities that need it most.
[**You can pitch into power this critical work with a $5 contribution today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230907?refcode=em20230907&amount=5&refcode2=1521_120351_qipfN6&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)
**[Pitch in to support our mission »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230907?refcode=em20230907&amount=5&refcode2=1521_120351_qipfN6&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)**
At Courier, we will never compromise the truth just for a quick buck. Here are our promises to you:
1. **We will always call out right-wing misinformation and tell the truth.** There are no “alternative facts” or “both sides.” There is the truth, and we will hold right-wing bad actors accountable for their lies.

2. **We will restore trust in journalism by covering local stories that matter most to the communities we serve.** The best antidote to bad information is good information. We will never compromise our values just to drive clicks and profit.

3. **We will deliver our news to the online spaces where people spend their time.** Social media newsfeeds. Inboxes. Search engines. By bringing quality journalism to the online spaces where misinformation is thriving, our reporting dismantles misinformation in real time before it can spread.

Right now, our newsrooms across nine battleground states (with more to come) are committed to reporting the facts on the issues that matter and calling out and combating misinformation wherever we see it. We don’t rely on a paywall or subscription model, so we can’t keep growing without your generous support.
[**If you want to support our mission of fighting misinformation and restoring trust in journalism, will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230907?refcode=em20230907&amount=5&refcode2=1521_120351_qipfN6&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230907?refcode=em20230907&amount=5&refcode2=1521_120351_qipfN6&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1521&t=2&refcode2=1521_120351_qipfN6&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1521%2E120351%2EqipfN6)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

| Friends,
We are now entering the critical eight weeks until Election Day and early voting starts in just over two weeks. This is the time candidates need your support the most.
Republicans have the opportunity to flip the State Senate and build on our majority in the House of Delegates in Richmond. Two outstanding candidates are [Ken Reid](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUmlCRQqOt5sEkYesjEEiY96pI_Ef8plAl-bJp2bD9iDiDjDLEh99tzoDf6ctr_PytzC-ToXxPej0Y5EjG2LG6DZA==&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==), running for the State Senate in the [37th District](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUmpcHr-STduteG3Ej7ebfVPS9tqbHYAocPvrlMD4D2mW8koXq41HkHxY6JJQXVD_lwwQTWZc4r8GntA6Ckl6n0xgVc4lrmaq9VDQuIu4RhHAnwCqDOIxhSXL3Rb_lR0jEz&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==) (Vienna, Tysons and Fairfax City) and [James Thomas](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUmgs93wIfVS8avWWgr0_XuftoHmOsAopzr0xd0B3QHASuuXBSL2zqVt6vPdb_CUvEsF33lD1yVKclLJiFiPYRds77Y8JcMKDzj&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==) campaigning for the House of Delegates in the [10th District](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUm-bGPQwpTUkwmn7JwAJsuEKoYniVxoOm-c9I4gPQSGe1nnBtJFbsJyCHeBN9eHy3T3royvfX1DG9LGiMYsYiWm4Nk7YfzXZF5j6d7jLXXVzWTXD_OI6JBafzf6xLXoxQB3nIMIFJiHh4=&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==) (Tim Hugo's old seat of Clifton, Centreville and Fairfax Station). Their opponents are extreme Liberal Democrats especially sitting Delegate Dan Helmer in the 10th.
Please join my Grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf and me in supporting our Republican candidates at these upcoming fundraising events:
In Support of Ken Reid with Special Guests Former Congressmen Frank Wolf and Tom Davis And Former State Senator Jeannemarie Davis This Thursday, September 7th - 5:00 to 7:00pm Vienna Vintner, 320 Maple Ave. E, Unit#F, Vienna 22180 Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUmhTVWiQIW3u3SLxYz3aLHzTCZIMQlD4-1VEu6nNe5O8Hri_UxUN95Zg3GyPNpZQT8VnX8c6FK7szOlDkk8qr0utbK1FWcGOFCwFz3aLfS6k9iUNwx8b1jAXW-WlJoDf__3ze91a-GftOryfS4tbp3BKUWY3FZBklbmXyisQme0GLv2LbNcs5T7A==&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==)
In Support of James Thomas with Special Guest Former Congressmen Frank Wolf Friday, September 15th - 6:30 to 8:00pm The Home of Mary Campbell, 6410 Noble Rock Court, Clifton Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YiXD18BUJDvoarmMW0wNNUXdGYX6Mit2QSWBZ0-lHGjm-qxMytEZ7KTc9MyAZIUmXaWs73Wdyi8HupC8O-ss38SAyG30F8yIEstGCvrwuKZJ2sgwxCKB1Yynyrev4jqHL5k0iDtL79L614RAjEdCJO8LI8UYWmC1K1oSwMru9jIH8n3TLhaUBVU49EKtPVXM&c=jevGoEY-lBPxXdYbSIs_wLKdp0UsXiug0gpdh2QT3_XSuPzbUeqijA==&ch=bJkYNgQz6u2OFcMVrWTXagTMDkHLfCSVrkzR_bf8TRSTFfR2XOxywA==)
Thank you for attending these important fundraising events and visiting their website to donate if you can not make it. Together we can support Governor Youngkin, take control of the General Assembly and keep Virginia on a path to prosperity. The alternative is easy see as people rejected a California-style Virginia when Democrats controlled Richmond and moved away from our Commonwealth.
I look forward to continuing to work with Ken, James and all the great conservative activists across Virginia to win in the November 2023 elections.
God Bless and thank you again for your support, Caleb

name: Gabe Amo
subject: We won big on Tuesday, and we couldn’t have done it without you.
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Friend,

I am overwhelmed with pride, joy, and gratitude to be the official Democratic nominee to represent Rhode Island’s 1st District in Congress.

We could not have done this without you. This victory is all of ours. From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

From donating, knocking on doors, posting your yard signs, and helping to get out the vote, you made this win possible, and I am so grateful to have you on #TeamGabe.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/F5TX7ZbXsAEn4-g.jpeg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/F5Vx5lqXoAIskio.jpeg]

We sent a big message on Tuesday. And it meant the world to me to have my parents by my side. When I think of who I have the opportunity to represent — I think of them.

Team — now the real work begins to keep this seat in Democratic hands this November. Our freedoms and opportunity for all are at stake.

Let’s get to work,

Gabe Amo
Democratic Nominee
RI-01

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gen-sept-em]
GET UPDATES [https://www.gabeamo.com/]
VOLUNTEER [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/]

https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo] https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Connecticut Libraries Approve Content Facebook Bans
body:
Liberals can't get their 'Bans' straight | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e8d31b320026/be-brave-do-something-upcoming-events-13542904?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
---
# Connecticut Libraries Approve
# Content Facebook Bans
|
---
_In towns across Connecticut, schools and public libraries appear to be buying and promoting books targeting young people with**controversial content (pornography)**. Now Facebook says this content cannot be published on their platform. _
|
---
**Why it matters:**_Residents and parents count on their school and public libraries as places children can go to explore and learn. With Facebook’s ban of the content of the controversial books these libraries are buying and promoting, more questions should be asked._
|
---
**Key Details:** √ Town money is being used to buy and promote controversial books that some claim are “essential reading and lifesaving”, while the largest global social media platform Facebook says the same content is “pornographic”. From schools in Greenwich to all the way to Stafford in Northeast Connecticut these books are now in libraries being promoted to students and children (apparently all ages!). It appears many public libraries like the one in Putnam, Connecticut have them too. √ Seeking to highlight some of these controversial books because the Republican Town Committee in Putnam, Connecticut (PRTC) felt that they are inappropriate, the PRTC shared some of the content from the books on their Facebook account. But guess what happened next? Facebook shut it all down. Fast and firm. √ While questions are being asked nationally about the appropriate role of social media companies using content moderation as a pretext for censorship, Facebook’s clear message in this case raises questions for Connecticut public and school libraries, parents, and the public. √ The issue of controversial books targeting young people is a hot debate across the political divide. On one side we have the activists who describe the books as “crucial to ensuring representation” while calling all those who disagree with them “book banners”. On the other side, parents and others are against the inclusion of these books using public funds and being “officially” promoted to young people. √ More troubling are the reports about the treatment of parents who asked questions and complained. Camilo Riano of Westport and a Board of Education candidate explains “The radical left in Westport calls us book banners, but we are just parents trying to protect our kids from pornography, not ban books. It’s good to know that Facebook agrees with us.”
|
---
**Key Takeaways:** √ As public institutions, libraries have Boards for the purpose of oversight and compliance with local, state and federal regulations. Are these boards being kept in the dark?
√ Most town and city Boards of Education (BOE) have policy manuals that directly address controversial content like these books. For example, new content that is to be officially presented to the students within the realm of their academic course of instruction, are usually supposed to be reviewed, approved, and recommended to the BOE for their approval. Did this happen? If so, concerned residents have a right to see the documents and read the rationale for approval. If not, why not? √ Another consideration is BOE Policy Manual requirements for parental notice of the right to “Opt-Out” of “Controversial” content which includes the subject matter of these books. Were parents notified in advance of these controversial books in the schools? Also check out the BOE policy on personal opinions vs. indoctrination. Are books on controversial subjects the personal opinion of the person who placed them in the library or an official public act which could be reasonably viewed as indoctrination? √ We must stop the vilification and personal attacks on parents by a few zealots. If movie theaters do not allow children to see R rated movies how can a few activists force pornography into our libraries using our tax money?
|
---

**Closing thought:** Facebook’s crystal-clear message about this controversial content should be a wake-up call for parents and concerned residents. Start asking questions and demanding answers. See what is in your local and school libraries using this [https://www.gofollett.com/](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=4de0ce5be8&e=8763c56857)
With many school board elections this November, now is the time for voters to learn more.
**What Can I Do?** Get InvolvedBe Brave, Run For SomethingBuild a community group to monitor your local library Trust, but verify Share this email

|
---
**Special thanks to 2WINCT COO, Chris Coyle for building the gameplan to protect our youth and their precious innocence**
|
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.

On the other side, parents and others are against the inclusion of these books using public funds and being “officially” promoted to young people. √ More troubling are the reports about the treatment of parents who asked questions and complained. Camilo Riano of Westport and a Board of Education candidate explains “The radical left in Westport calls us book banners, but we are just parents trying to protect our kids from pornography, not ban books. It’s good to know that Facebook agrees with us.” | Key Takeaways: √ As public institutions, libraries have Boards for the purpose of oversight and compliance with local, state and federal regulations. Are these boards being kept in the dark? √ Most town and city Boards of Education (BOE) have policy manuals that directly address controversial content like these books. For example, new content that is to be officially presented to the students within the realm of their academic course of instruction, are usually supposed to be reviewed, approved, and recommended to the BOE for their approval. Did this happen? If so, concerned residents have a right to see the documents and read the rationale for approval. If not, why not? √ Another consideration is BOE Policy Manual requirements for parental notice of the right to “Opt-Out” of “Controversial” content which includes the subject matter of these books. Were parents notified in advance of these controversial books in the schools? Also check out the BOE policy on personal opinions vs. indoctrination. Are books on controversial subjects the personal opinion of the person who placed them in the library or an official public act which could be reasonably viewed as indoctrination? √ We must stop the vilification and personal attacks on parents by a few zealots. If movie theaters do not allow children to see R rated movies how can a few activists force pornography into our libraries using our tax money? | Closing thought: Facebook’s crystal-clear message about this controversial content should be a wake-up call for parents and concerned residents. Start asking questions and demanding answers. See what is in your local and school libraries using this With many school board elections this November, now is the time for voters to learn more. What Can I Do? Get InvolvedBe Brave, Run For SomethingBuild a community group to monitor your local library Trust, but verify Share this email | Special thanks to 2WINCT COO, Chris Coyle for building the gameplan to protect our youth and their precious innocence | 2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut. Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success. | | | | | ---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT4 Mariners WayBranford, CT 06405-4481 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

subject: Biden's budget deficit is HOW big ⁉️
body:
This report I read this week was shocking... |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hi Peter, it's Max.

We all know Joe Biden and the career politicians in Washington have a massive spending problem.

_But do you know just HOW big Biden's latest budget deficit is? _

I read a report this week projecting that _**Biden's out-of-control budget deficit will DOUBLE from last year to a shocking $2 TRILLION.**_

Thanks to leaders from both parties, our country is now nearly $33 trillion in debt. This is unsustainable. This is why I opposed the debt ceiling suspension earlier this summer. **I believe the time for kicking the can down the road is over.**

I don't want to go to Washington to be a wallflower. I'm running for Congress to be an unapologetic conservative voice for cutting spending, reducing the debt, and balancing the budget. I mean it.

It'll be a tough fight. It's worth having ... but I need to know if Orange County's conservatives will be with me on this.
[**_Can you add your name so I know we're in this fight to cut spending together?_**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=f05cb7b7c3&e=86e91e802d)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>>](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=93b26a387c&e=86e91e802d "ADD YOUR NAME >>>")
---
| The government's interest payments on the federal debt are skyrocketing.

Even worse, out-of-control national debt drives up interest rates on everyday Americans like you and me.

The time for procrastination is over. Our future is at stake.

I'm willing to go to Washington and fight to save our country ... [**but** **I need to know if you'll be standing with me on this.**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=cf1e27393f&e=86e91e802d)

I am confident we can turn our budget outlook

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: My recent trip to Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69343866/425860123/623074613?code=jtk1347-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5ZDdmNTItOTE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCYY0lsMi0YAmhHumwUVj-6tCW-95MrHeZAKVtHRZSM=&emci=e79ee5b7-0146-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d79d7f52-914d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69343867/425860124/987522247?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1347-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5ZDdmNTItOTE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCYY0lsMi0YAmhHumwUVj-6tCW-95MrHeZAKVtHRZSM=&emci=e79ee5b7-0146-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d79d7f52-914d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426) Friend, I just got back from Ukraine as part of a bipartisan delegation along with Sen. Elizabeth Warren and Sen. Lindsey Graham. I was yet again incredibly impressed with the unity and focused dedication I encountered at every turn on my fourth trip to this war-torn nation. Meeting with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, we listened as he passionately and bluntly sounded the alarm about what Ukraine needs to beat back Russia’s murderous invasion.

**President Zelenskyy doesn’t want or need our troops. But he deeply and desperately needs the tools to win.**
**I’d like to share why I believe it’s more important than ever to support Ukraine’s fight for democracy and freedom against Russia’s unprovoked invasion –[and I’d also like to get your feedback if you have a few moments.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69343868/425860126/987522247?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1347-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5ZDdmNTItOTE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCYY0lsMi0YAmhHumwUVj-6tCW-95MrHeZAKVtHRZSM=&emci=e79ee5b7-0146-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d79d7f52-914d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)** America’s own national security and self-interest are at stake in Ukraine. If Putin wins in Ukraine, he’ll roll forward against other nations – NATO allies that we have a treaty obligation to defend with troops on the ground. Ukraine is at the tip of the spear, fighting our fight for independence and freedom. That’s why I support providing Ukraine the tools it needs. President Zelenskyy needs to keep up the counteroffensive that is making solid progress in the east and south, with significant prospects of breakthroughs in the areas of Bakhmut and Tokmak. We must also get tougher on sanctions. Russia is using drones to brutalize Ukrainian civilians and troops – and these drones are being manufactured with parts and components from companies evading sanctions. A crackdown on such violations is long overdue.
**[I’d like to hear if you agree. Could you please take a moment to leave me some quick feedback via my foreign policy survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69343869/425860127/987522247?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1347-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5ZDdmNTItOTE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCYY0lsMi0YAmhHumwUVj-6tCW-95MrHeZAKVtHRZSM=&emci=e79ee5b7-0146-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d79d7f52-914d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)** Friend, it’s important to remember that Vladimir Putin has broken every so-called promise he’s ever made. He violated Ukrainian sovereignty when he claimed he wouldn’t. He annexed Ukrainian territory when he said he wouldn’t. He has violated and disrespected multiple treaties and agreements – including the Black Sea Grain Initiative, choosing instead to shell Ukrainian ports and grain terminals, destroying food that could have gone to emerging nations and hungry people.
**That’s why I am incredulous that some extremist Republicans, including former President Donald Trump, are wavering in their support of Ukraine in their fight against Putin.**

Ukraine is at a crucial moment where it cannot afford for allied support to waver. As President Zelenskyy is frank and forthcoming to say, Ukraine could not have survived without America and our allies. But his counteroffensive is far from an assured success. In the end, the only way he loses is if America pulls the plug.
**[If you care about the fight against Putin, can you take my brief new survey letting me know where you stand? From the American people to the full force of our government, we must stand up for Ukraine and its democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69343870/425860129/987522247?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1347-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5ZDdmNTItOTE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCYY0lsMi0YAmhHumwUVj-6tCW-95MrHeZAKVtHRZSM=&emci=e79ee5b7-0146-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d79d7f52-914d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)**
Ukrainians are paying an unspeakable price, inspiring the world with courage and strength beyond words. We must match it, which is why I’ll do everything in my power to keep up our government’s support of Ukraine in the face of Russia’s violent invasion.
Thank you, Sen. Richard Blumenthal
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=8jn59y4%2BTCTAEYFidGMB%2BZiufoOwSckslV0hEzZA9XqYwe20eqGltBCPnODqRJ7u6A3oaiO%2FJuZDEUpWggvjKIfH8655HZrxqoEbYIjN6wqEX4Ld7RiLOnF4gLy%2FH0n%2Fm5jryFd0xQJwdEneygs%2BD3WIJPpIZ2YoqBkMLq%2Fo0UlgDMf8SWjCsKO3UOEhH02K2Eyq6pDijxTLcALV2yG2GUokXZK%2Fo9GJDihOV3am1d51NTBRvX7qcy2ey8aLaHeWV1bgvadh0WdihKM7HzxAVfy3Z%2F4qIWuO4uxHTT2k5D4zPajZLu6aMvta5VsxMdc2YNIsQIvWcdBHjT8ftSodhf%2Fbdh4ZQy07a00C1oTUiBdxf6%2BXl6OaHgXLwNYaibfyr0yIG0CTB6Sm10kdGMGHX7JkMIKOHXyXMXuOtuBteqg5RuYOVThO%2Bg2u%2BS9Z824A) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

| | Hi Peter, it's Missy Cotter Smasal.

Since announcing my campaign for Congress yesterday, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from people here in Virginia’s Second District and across the country who are eager to replace Jen Kiggans with a Congresswoman who will _actually_ support families and veterans.

That’s why I’m so proud to be kicking things off with the support of **Congresswoman Jennifer McClellan** and former **Governor Ralph Northam** , as well as nearly **20 other Virginia leaders** who know what it means to stand up for our families, our veterans, and coastal Virginia values.

[As we close out the first 24 hours of our campaign, I’m asking you to join their ranks and support me with a contribution of $20 today. Can I count on your help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344377/425861729/215901244?amount=20&source=MCS_EM_FR_WL_230907_1_2&refcode2=0e05eab7-924d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=2a64GearVULFtsuHi+SvVKWLj9vwdM1kOGYMN+7/XEOv9kpkM+eK23KBkR9cwxwls/yTGFB+mvRb5z8jf6jVww==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgwNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwNWVhYjctOTI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL8L3Gn24mS_-0VBj3n2ptf3VGIJd7i8--mm434j-HM=)

body:
We need to make sure our voices can’t be ignored.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344719/425863123/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230906CH_N_TW_FULL_13_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=)

Hi there – we wanted to make sure you saw last week’s message about the critical fight to keep abortion medication accessible.

**Jennifer needs your help to push Congress to act, and we’re trying to gather as many signatures as possible from grassroots supporters so that our voices cannot be ignored.**

**[Will you join us and add your name to tell Congress to protect access to abortion medication today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344720/425863124/-93544187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=&emci=c55bae06-fd4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e8b1496b-934d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)**

Thanks so much,

Team Wexton

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> It was only a few months ago that a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas blocked the FDA's approval of mifepristone – a widely-used abortion drug that's been available for _over twenty years_. The Supreme Court later put this outrageous ruling on hold. But the anti-choice right hasn’t let up in their efforts to use the judiciary to implement national abortion restrictions.
>
> Just this month, a conservative-leaning federal appeals court ruled in favor of limiting access to mifepristone. This decision is not yet in effect (pending Supreme Court review), but it would prevent the drug from being taken later in pregnancy, and not allow it to be mailed directly to patients.
>
> We want to emphasize something that’s truly outrageous: **the restrictions to mifepristone would apply to _all_ states – including ones like Virginia that still recognize the right to choose.**
>
> This is all part of the far right’s plan to institute a national abortion ban. They can’t get the necessary votes to do it through Congress, and they certainly can’t win the argument at the ballot box, so they’re aiming to circumvent the will of the people and use right-wing courts.
>
> **Jennifer refuses to sit by and let that happen.** She understands that Congress has to step up and pass legislation that protects access to abortion medication like mifepristone.
>
> [**Please, will you join her and add your name to amplify her call to action? We need to keep the pressure on House Republicans – and make clear that they'll be on the losing end of the next election if they fail to act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344721/425863125/-93544187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=&emci=c55bae06-fd4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e8b1496b-934d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344722/425863126/-93544187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=&emci=c55bae06-fd4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e8b1496b-934d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) It's absurd that right-wing judges can ignore years of medical evidence and dictate what medication people can and can't use.
>
> But unless Congress acts, these right-wing judges will chip away at our rights even more.
>
> We have to fight these anti-choice forces through every possible avenue. The work ahead won't be easy, but we cannot afford to let up for even one minute — not with the stakes this high.
>
> [**So please: add your name and tell Congress to pass legislation that protects access to abortion medication >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344723/425863127/-93544187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=&emci=c55bae06-fd4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e8b1496b-934d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
>
> Thanks so much,
>
> Team Wexton
| **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344724/425863128/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230906CH_N_TW_FULL_13_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGIxNDk2Yi05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-ygNyalKqn66FAtvL5V9x0RrUXGXqA-P2uQ1wMCMc=)****

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: fascism in the classroom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/z9nIy8C35ya5AUQLvX3iLw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3HH1P0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iYWNrdG9zY2hvb2xfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlYyTllTUFBvbjJlbEJjZ3JEOFA0Qm4yYkE3JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJWMk5ZU1BQb24yZWxCY2dyRDhQNEJuMmJBNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVjJOWVNQUG9uMmVsQmNnckQ4UDRCbjJiQTdXA3NwY0IKZPD17Plk9UCeDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)
---
Peter, students across Florida have returned to the classroom, and what did Ron DeSantis send them to school with? Not pencils or books, but a fresh slate of attacks on their rights and education. DeSantis is putting every single student in Florida's future in danger. He continues to ban books about Black and brown history, reject African American Studies courses, and now he wants to teach students that there were benefits to slavery.

**_This isn’t just extreme Republican policies – this is fascism._** I grew up in Florida attending public schools, and my mom was a public school teacher for thirty years. I know the importance of a quality education. That makes this personal to me – which is why I’m building up my on-the-ground organizing team to fight back. But we need your help.
[**_We are falling behind on our grassroots organizing goal and we need to raise $4,340 before midnight to stay on track. Can you donate $27 right now to give us the necessary resources to defeat DeSantis and his fascist policies in Florida? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/z9nIy8C35ya5AUQLvX3iLw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3HH1P0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iYWNrdG9zY2hvb2xfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlYyTllTUFBvbjJlbEJjZ3JEOFA0Qm4yYkE3JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJWMk5ZU1BQb24yZWxCY2dyRDhQNEJuMmJBNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVjJOWVNQUG9uMmVsQmNnckQ4UDRCbjJiQTdXA3NwY0IKZPD17Plk9UCeDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter, DeSantis has shown that he _isn’t_ going to stop his far-right extremist agenda. It is time we start electing officials who care about our lives – not ones who push their extremist agenda in the classroom.

**That is why I started a year-round youth organizing program – to show that we aren’t going to sit on the sidelines and let DeSantis destroy our future.** We are mobilizing voters ahead of the next election, Peter, because we MUST elect leaders who will move Florida forward, not backward.

**We are ready to fight back, but we need to make sure we have the resources to keep our program fully funded. Right now, we need to raise $4,340 before midnight to keep our program on running._Peter, that means I need you to step up and join us._** [**_Will you stand up for public education and donate $27 right now to help us hit our organizing goal, take on fascist DeSantis, and defend our schools?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/z9nIy8C35ya5AUQLvX3iLw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3HH1P0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iYWNrdG9zY2hvb2xfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlYyTllTUFBvbjJlbEJjZ3JEOFA0Qm4yYkE3JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJWMk5ZU1BQb24yZWxCY2dyRDhQNEJuMmJBNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVjJOWVNQUG9uMmVsQmNnckQ4UDRCbjJiQTdXA3NwY0IKZPD17Plk9UCeDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/k8u8-kgfbvpJL6Vx1r-w9g~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3HH1P0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iYWNrdG9zY2hvb2xfZW4mYW1vdW50PTEwJmNkbWM9MlYyTllTUFBvbjJlbEJjZ3JEOFA0Qm4yYkE3JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJWMk5ZU1BQb24yZWxCY2dyRDhQNEJuMmJBNyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVjJOWVNQUG9uMmVsQmNnckQ4UDRCbjJiQTdXA3NwY0IKZPD17Plk9UCeDFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

clean_body: | ~ Peter, students across Florida have returned to the classroom, and what did Ron DeSantis send them to school with? Not pencils or books, but a fresh slate of attacks on their rights and education. DeSantis is putting every single student in Florida's future in danger. He continues to ban books about Black and brown history, reject African American Studies courses, and now he wants to teach students that there were benefits to slavery. This isn’t just extreme Republican policies – this is fascism. I grew up in Florida attending public schools, and my mom was a public school teacher for thirty years. I know the importance of a quality education. That makes this personal to me – which is why I’m building up my on-the-ground organizing team to fight back. But we need your help. ~ Peter, DeSantis has shown that he isn’t going to stop his far-right extremist agenda. It is time we start electing officials who care about our lives – not ones who push their extremist agenda in the classroom. That is why I started a year-round youth organizing program – to show that we aren’t going to sit on the sidelines and let DeSantis destroy our future. We are mobilizing voters ahead of the next election, Peter, because we MUST elect leaders who will move Florida forward, not backward. We are ready to fight back, but we need to make sure we have the resources to keep our program fully funded. Right now, we need to raise $4,340 before midnight to keep our program on running.Peter, that means I need you to step up and join us. ~ | | | ~ ~ | ~ | Thank you, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. | | It’s official, Derek, we are only two months away from the legislative elections in Virginia. The truth is, we are up against unprecedented GOP fundraising, and the only thing standing in the way of full Republican control is our 4-seat edge in the Virginia Senate. But at the same time, there is opportunity here. **Remember: Virginia is the only state in the nation where we have a real opportunity to flip the legislature blue this year.** That’s why Democrats around the country are looking to us to pave the way for the 2024 election. **And when I look back, I want to be able to say my team did everything we could to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.** _****[So I’m asking: Will you join me in my work to turn the General Assembly blue in this historic election by donating anything you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69344796/425863408/1849331550?refcode=mw_em_230907_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQxNDRhYy05MzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIAKYpMb0PAns-wSRh6x_XQiikSSrRJe9A_88lRsGw4=)****_ We have two months.
