name: Geoff Simpson
subject: AIPAC and Moderate PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

FIRST, Republican-funded AIPAC and Moderate PAC spent millions against
Justice Democrats candidates like Summer Lee last cycle, attempting to
block our movement to change the status quo and elect more bold, diverse
candidates to move our country forward.

THEN, article after article has come out revealing that these PACs are
already gearing up for the 2024 election and slated to spend millions
against us. AIPAC took $1 million from a right-wing megadonor and plan to
try ousting progressive incumbents like Jamaal Bowman and Ilhan Omar,
while Moderate PAC is putting $20 million behind protecting moderate
Democrats from any potential progressive challengers.

NOW, we need to step up our fundraising efforts and ensure Justice
Democrats has the resources necessary to defend incumbents like Jamaal,
Ilhan, and Summer and elect even more bold, young progressives to Congress
next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137690?refcode=em20230907-30734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM ]Our opponents are funded by right-wing megadonors and wealthy centrists
— we’re a people-powered organization that depends on grassroots donations
from folks like you. Can you rush $3 or more right now to
help us prepare to fight back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137690?refcode=em20230907-30734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM ]Contribute $3

Let’s show them our progressive movement isn’t going away — not now, not
in 2024, not ever!

Thanks for all you do,

Geoff Simpson, Campaigns Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230907-30734-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30734_1203867_OaZioM&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30734%2E1203867%2EOaZioM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Friend,
The rabidly anti-Trump Attorney General in New York is now seeking an **IMMEDIATE VERDICT** against me **WITHOUT A TRIAL**.
**My constitutional rights are being ripped to shreds.**
This is the same Attorney General who OPENLY CAMPAIGNED on the idea of "getting Trump."
Or, as she put it in her own kind words... **"**_**we 're gonna definitely sue him. We're gonna be a real pain in the..." (you know what... I'm not going to say it!)**_
Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me - and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man.
They've examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they're inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me.
But, after every single witch hunt, our movement has only grown stronger!
These left-wing lunatics have FAILED to break me, simply because I have countless patriots like **YOU** peacefully standing by my side.
I truly believe the people of our country are waking up to how corrupt our nation has become.
The people can see what's going on... _The ruling class is trying to eliminate its leading opponent who happens to be a political outsider with a clear mandate from the hardworking voters of our country._
But, with your support, we will continue to prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and OUR vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when we win back the White House in an electoral LANDSLIDE.
_If you 're doing poorly right now due to the people who would rather see me imprisoned than actually help the citizens of our country who are crying out for help, then don't even think about donating. I completely understand._

clean_body: | | | Friend, The rabidly anti-Trump Attorney General in New York is now seeking an IMMEDIATE VERDICT against me WITHOUT A TRIAL. My constitutional rights are being ripped to shreds. This is the same Attorney General who OPENLY CAMPAIGNED on the idea of "getting Trump." Or, as she put it in her own kind words... "we 're gonna definitely sue him. We're gonna be a real pain in the..." (you know what... I'm not going to say it!) Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me - and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man. They've examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they're inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me. But, after every single witch hunt, our movement has only grown stronger! These left-wing lunatics have FAILED to break me, simply because I have countless patriots like YOU peacefully standing by my side. I truly believe the people of our country are waking up to how corrupt our nation has become. The people can see what's going on... The ruling class is trying to eliminate its leading opponent who happens to be a political outsider with a clear mandate from the hardworking voters of our country. But, with your support, we will continue to prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and OUR vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when we win back the White House in an electoral LANDSLIDE. If you 're doing poorly right now due to the people who would rather see me imprisoned than actually help the citizens of our country who are crying out for help, then don't even think about donating. Team DeSantis

|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0df724e496904153b88369ef11db33ae&_e=0qAfpzFEuL1aJJLh3b74WzZ4YG0xzozQGshh_4yp6OK7YwZn1icBbQ0usrMfjZrL5ixE2DwyxOicgDi7U6GpLjw8vYrbFXhx4xtA076UUhdAqle_GMBp8mKzBEgILKfN5y-bTjFpP8OBP7bRB2Cwhya2_iD29LGDNXszO5fuvutabv91ccHBxFZcpBWD-g0yEwENnihTTiW5IwT4uNfJHxAowZD2u4c3AKp1AJja5NKJ2uDCOTPJmBASTgQyrp7bn_Iyf-vdLc_rF2m_V5Lg_pTUvDw98-ZZx_FcngOMQX153bgS-IZ0vGiX5hkGC46DqXP3Ka_V6OYG53Ecxgjvg8OwliPPlQqtn5PxIaQ5Du326VnCiSOO_pUdlcyt3CdOzooPlUqlx66LFj1VFBz-DQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

subject: We can’t let this opportunity go to waste→
body:
Gerrymandered maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but since Janet Protasiewicz’s victory this year, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power! | | |
---
| | **You can help capitalize on a HUGE opportunity for Democrats in Wisconsin →** Wisconsin Republicans have been in power for decades, working to restrict abortion, attack voting rights, draw heavily gerrymandered maps, and elect their ultra-conservative allies. Wisconsin’s rigged maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain ground in the legislature – but with a new liberal majority on the WI Supreme Court, we’re one step closer to fairer maps and Democratic power. ** Here’s why: A recently filed lawsuit seeks to throw out Wisconsin’s Republican-drawn legislative maps. If this lawsuit is successful and new maps are drawn, every sitting lawmaker would be on the ballot in 2024. This would mark a _huge_ political shift and a chance for Democrats to _finally_ build power and loosen Republicans’ tight grip on Wisconsin. ** [We can’t let this opportunity go to waste. name: DHS Funding Survey
subject: No security, no funding? [VOTE]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Time to get TOUGH. Read more >>>
| | | Friend, We’ve tried nearly everything to hold the Biden administration accountable for America’s border crisis. We’ve _grilled DHS Secretary Mayorkas_ and other officials for their rank incompetence in committee hearings. We’ve _passed H.R. 2_ , the strongest border security bill in the history of Congress. But Joe Biden still refuses to enforce our border laws – and _now it’s time for Congress to leverage the power of the purse._ Funding for the federal government expires at the end of this month, and we believe that no member of Congress should agree to fund a federal agency that doesn’t do its job. **_Our message is clear – no border security, no funding for the federal government. _** Do you agree? Take our one-question survey to let us know:
---
[**VOTE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/5f0a714e801cbe7b/92872f658862bd5ec3d6b838967d376c/35193)

> _The top strategist for Ron DeSantis' super PAC privately told donors that Vivek Ramaswamy posed a threat to the Florida governor - and bragged that the super PAC was behind an avalanche of opposition research targeting the rival candidate._
> - Politico 9/3/23

Fellow American - The DC Establishment is worried.

The chief strategist for the Ron DeSantis Super PAC was caught on tape privately telling donors that not only do I pose a "threat," but he is releasing "dirt" on me.

These games are why people are fed up with career politicians and their advisors. That's why I am running a different type of campaign.

Unlike my opponents, I don't have a Super PAC spending millions of dollars. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT: Call Congress and tell them No Security, No Funding!
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-lw)
---
| |
---
There are two urgent messages you need to send to both of your US Senators and your US Representative. Please call as soon as you can with the messages of “No security, no funding: no Continuing Resolution” and “no mask mandates!” See below for a sample call script and background information on both issues.
---
| |
---
| [SENATE PHONE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-FZDtz8gJrEjQ)
---
| [HOUSE PHONE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._T6dHaICI_33tddUXgzw)
---
|
---
| | **Sample Phone Script** My name is **[YOUR NAME]** , and I am a constituent calling from **[YOUR CITY]**. I’m calling to urge my **[YOUR SENATOR/REPRESENTATIVE]** to oppose a Continuing Resolution, and instead work through the regular appropriations process, no matter how long it takes, even if the process goes beyond the end of the fiscal year and there is a temporary government shutdown. If there is no security in our country, there can be no funding. I want border security and immigration enforcement funded. Even Democrats like Mayor Eric Adams and Governor Phil Murphy have turned against Biden’s open borders. Eric Adams said it will “destroy New York City.” This is what Arizona and Texas have had to deal with for years. No security, no funding. Finally, there should be no funding if our personal liberty is not secured. I oppose all mask mandates and urge my **[YOUR SENATOR/REPRESENTATIVE]** to oppose all mask mandates as well. Thank you.
---
| | **Background - Budget** The Senate Democrats and many of the Republicans, along with House Democrats and some House Republicans, are trying to cram through a Continuing Resolution (CR). A CR would mean that we cannot use the budget process to fund policies we want (like a secure border) or defund policies we don’t want (like the DOJ’s witch hunts). A CR would simply fund everything the government is doing at the same levels, with no opportunity to implement policies via funding. The House Freedom Caucus has taken a stand: No Security, No Funding. They are demanding that Congress use the regular appropriations process so that we are able to write separate funding bills, with specific policies funded or defunded, as well as being able to actually cut spending. Of course, the Democrats and the usual Republicans don’t want to do things the right way. They want to keep spending the same amount of money, no questions asked, no hard votes taken. For example, recently, Texas Republican Senator John Cornyn was on Twitter complaining that some House Republicans want to – shockingly – fight for less spending and good policy. The Republicans are also always so scared of a government shutdown, which would happen if funding did not get sorted by October 1st. We must buck them up and show them America is sick and tired of being overrun by millions of illegal aliens! In fact, the Democrat Mayor of New York City, Eric Adams, has admitted that the massive number of illegal aliens pouring into NYC are going to “destroy New York City.” [**Watch the video**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) of him announcing this. Similarly, Democrat Governor of New Jersey, Phil Murphy, has also [**stated**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTA4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/AveGQ5JI8PzdRQWgJ73DSg) that New Jersey cannot take the illegal aliens that New York wants to send them, as proposed by the Biden administration. Even Democrats who have to run cities and states can see that this current invasion is unsustainable and destroying our nation. Our government gives the power of the purse to the House. It is their duty to use that power to save our country. **Background - Mask Mandates** Senator Vance is attempting to [**ban mask mandates**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-1vQZJtw) on planes, in schools, and on public transit till 2024. The Senate Democrats are planning to object to this effort TODAY at 1:25pm ET, because they still support mask mandates. This is happening at the same time that Montgomery County Schools in MD is in the process of reinstating mask mandates. Elected officials must understand that the American people DO NOT SUPPORT mask mandates, and we must also let the American people know that Democrats _still want to force you and your children and grandchildren to wear masks._ In liberty, Jenny Beth
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._YBw)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---

name: Al Franken
subject: Peter, it's me again:
body:
I need your help
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T599fa35f-c772-4bf0-9e2b-fcbfb442e93b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country. Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby! [While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53e0c52a-d57a-4e21-ba7f-e8accad9a94f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf663107-e21d-41b0-97da-1514e541ea78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more! We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f04a9aa-ea75-4172-99dd-6d8996302c2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(The really tall guy is Josh.) After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers. Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy. [So what do you say, Peter? Will you split $15 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta50134a2-8f2e-439d-8e63-b2d20ca74469/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al
P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [So donate now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9572ab9-5e85-4887-831f-b9bfd29e2f2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0db8a34-6b01-4ba9-a450-dab99d412b3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

Peter, we're proud to celebrate Attorney General James' accomplishments every day – but _today_ , we're inviting you to celebrate with us.
**On Aug. 31, AG Letitia James attended a reception at Vice President Harris' residence.** This reception, which the vice president hosted with the Higher Heights Leadership Fund and the National Organization of Black Elected Legislative Women (NOBEL Women), celebrated Black Women in elected leadership.
It was truly a night for the history books, Peter. Black women who have dedicated their entire careers to shattering glass ceilings and amplifying the voices of the powerless came together and emphasized the unquestionable need for more Black women in office.
**But tragically, Black women in politics _continue_ to face barriers at every step of the way. **

From fundraising just _**one-third**_ of what white women in politics typically do to being the targets of violence, threats, and harassment, Black women are working within a system that was built to disadvantage them – but AG James doesn't let that discourage her from doing the work that must be done.
Peter, when Letitia James became attorney general, she _knew_ she had to fight for the families who had long been forgotten. And that's exactly what she's done, even when it meant upsetting incredibly powerful and wealthy people and organizations.
**[Letitia James is taking care of the hard fights – but it's on us to help her. clean_body: We're proud to celebrate Attorney General James' accomplishments every day – but today, we're inviting you to celebrate with us. | | | = = | | = Peter, we're proud to celebrate Attorney General James' accomplishments every day – but today , we're inviting you to celebrate with us. On Aug. 31, AG Letitia James attended a reception at Vice President Harris' residence. This reception, which the vice president hosted with the Higher Heights Leadership Fund and the National Organization of Black Elected Legislative Women (NOBEL Women), celebrated Black Women in elected leadership. It was truly a night for the history books, Peter. Black women who have dedicated their entire careers to shattering glass ceilings and amplifying the voices of the powerless came together and emphasized the unquestionable need for more Black women in office. But tragically, Black women in politics continue to face barriers at every step of the way. From fundraising just one-third of what white women in politics typically do to being the targets of violence, threats, and harassment, Black women are working within a system that was built to disadvantage them – but AG James doesn't let that discourage her from doing the work that must be done. Peter, when Letitia James became attorney general, she knew she had to fight for the families who had long been forgotten. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. AM 560 Host Jeanne Ives Has History of Slamming IR, Says Conservative Publication "Full of Lies" and "Garbage," Falsely Alleges Trump Jr. Event Can't Sell Tickets (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
In this April 29, 2020, then-Republican candidate for Illinois’ 6th congressional district Jeanne Ives is shown unloading food donated by her campaign during a food drive to the Glen Ellyn Food Pantry in Glen Ellyn, Ill. Ives would go on to lose the race by 8 points to incumbent Rep. Sean Casten, D. Seven months later, Gov. Pritzker would enter an Executive Order requiring mask wearing in certain indoor spaces. (Source: Susie Samuels/Jeanne Ives for Congress via AP)
Jeanne Ives built her brand in Illinois as a conservative grassroots firebrand who challenged the political establishment in Springfield and Chicago – and she proved it when she nearly beat incumbent Republican Gov. Bruce Rauner during the 2018 Republican primary.

And then a badly damaged Rauner would go on and lose re-election in the general election a few months later to first-time political billionaire candidate JB Pritzker by an astonishing 16 points.

In 2020, COVID hit and Gov. Pritzker shut down the state – including schools and businesses and mandated the vaccine for health care workers, certain state employees, college students and college employees.

But ever since her election to the Republican state central committee in 2022, Ives has abandoned her base for the IL GOP elites – becoming part of the establishment instead of opposing it. And her actions don’t lie.

During the 2022 election cycle, Ives served as an advisor and endorsed her close friend, Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau in his failed bid for Congress. As Illinois Review has reported in previous articles, Pekau routinely
attacks (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his constituents online; harassed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) female Orland fire district candidates – following them in his car as they campaigned and knocked on doors in local neighborhoods; called Chicago Firefighters (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-orland-park-and-chicago-firefighters-with-baseless-accusations-calls-first-responders-an-embarrassment-to-their-profession.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) an “embarrassment to their profession;” and honored progressive liberal Marie Newman, who supported vaccinating children, with a community appreciation award
(https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Keith Pekau and Jeanne Ives during Pekau’s congressional campaign announcement on Nov. 23, 2021. Ives is a close confidante and senior advisor to Pekau, and she endorsed his campaign for Congress. (Source: Facebook/Keith Pekau)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/gop-mayor-keith-pekau-compliments-liberal-rep-marie-newman-an-ally-of-aoc-says-they-agree-both-of-them-can-do-a-better-job-casten.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau praises and honors former US Rep. Marie Newman, a Democrat and member of the Progressive Caucus in Congress, with a Community Appreciation Award during a board meeting on Jan. 16, 2023. Newman promoted vaccinating children during the pandemic. (Source: Facebook/Village of Orland Park)

On March 21, Ives was scheduled to speak at an Orland Township Republican meeting – Pekau’s local GOP group, alongside Republican national committeeman Richard Porter – the architect of the failed Richard Irvin campaign for governor.

But after Illinois Review pointed out the event featuring Porter and Ives as special guests in a
March 16 article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Porter quietly backed out, but Ives remained a speaker.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau is hosting a Get Out The Vote Rally with his slate of candidates on March 21, 2023 with special guests Jeanne Ives and Richard Porter.
Porter, to this day, continues to defend Irvin’s Republican credentials despite Irvin pulling Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2014, 2016 and 2020, and spending the last several years praising (https://twitter.com/demgovs/status/1483091889607909379?s=61&t=PRMWA5ZjyteefflEsOtYwQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker – referring to him as a “great friend and a great leader.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Republican candidate for governor Richard Irvin, left, and Richard Porter, right, enjoy a Chicago Cubs game during the gubernatorial primary. (Source: Facebook/Mark Weyermuller)
During a quarterly IL Republican Party state central committee meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Bolingbrook in December, approximately 200 conservative grassroots activists filled the room in a stunning display to publicly share their grievances about the disappointing losses during the November 8th election; the lack of support they received from the party; and demanding that chairman Don Tracy resign.

The GOP leaders were visibly stunned and far outnumbered, with many of the grassroots activists driving more than five hours to attend the meeting.

The meeting was long, but the most shocking moment of the day occurred when IL GOP leader and chairman of the finance committee Vince Kolber, a multi-millionaire businessman addressed the crowd bragging about how the party raised $2.2 million this cycle – compared to Pritzker spending $152 million, and then asking the room full of hardworking grassroots conservatives,

“I assume all of you have donated to the IL GOP?”

And when the room yelled back,

“No!”

He replied,

“No, then what are you doing here?”

The belittling and out-of-touch comment drew an immediate reaction from the crowd, still stunned that a GOP leader would say something so offensive to a room full of people where many of them had driven hours, just for their voices to be heard.

But the shocking moments were not yet over.

Leaping to Kolber’s defense was state central committee member and grassroots-supported Jeanne Ives,
who screamed (https://youtube.com/shorts/RUkhmLlE8NU?feature=share&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Vince is not your problem! This man gave me $750,000 when I ran against Gov. Bruce Rauner!”

Ives’ burst, and seemingly out of body experience drew applause from state central committee members, including Tracy, but angered the majority of grassroots in the room. Proving a point that Illinois Review has made many times in previous articles, the IL GOP establishment’s obsession – including Ives – with money.

If you don’t
donate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , you don’t matter. And if you donate, you are somehow immune from criticism and can say anything you want.

And since that time, Ives has gone on the attack against this publication. In an interview with
Crain’s Chicago Business (https://www.chicagobusiness.com/greg-hinz-politics/conservative-news-site-illinois-review-critical-gop-insiders?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in April, Ives offered a stunning on-the-record quote when asked to comment about IR, stating, “I don’t read their garbage.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Jeanne Ives gives an interview in Crain’s and calls IR, the largest conservative voice in Illinois, “garbage."

Sources also confirm to IR that during that same time frame this past Spring, Ives proposed in a private meeting that the state central committee ban this publication, including editor-in-chief Mark Vargas and publisher Scott Kaspar from attending all future meetings.

The proposal was immediately shot down and the discussion shifted to another topic.

Censoring media outlets is typical in third world countries ruled by dictators – and for Ives to suggest that the state party censor the leading conservative news publication in Illinois because she is bothered by the facts is both sad and alarming.

In Russia, President Vladimir Putin signed into
law (https://www.npr.org/2022/03/07/1084870797/russia-has-reasserted-state-control-over-the-country-s-major-media-companies?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) legislation that criminalizes news publications from reporting on anything that contradicts, or is critical of his administration.

In China, a country that leads the world in jailing reporters, there are an estimated
274 journalists (https://www.theguardian.com/media/2020/dec/15/china-jails-the-most-journalists-for-second-year-running?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) currently in prison for reporting on stories that angered the ruling Communist political party – and citizen journalist Zhang Zahn sits in a Chinese prison for her reporting the facts during the pandemic.

In Iran, there are
41 journalists (https://rsf.org/en/41-journalists-prison-iran-now-world-s-3rd-biggest-jailer-journalists?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in prison for writing stories that exposed the corruption of Iranian authorities.

On Wednesday morning, Ives took to her Facebook page and continued her attacks, saying this publication is “filled with lies.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives says IR “articles are filled with lies.” (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
Ives’ Facebook comments were all over the map. After attacking this publication, she tried to walk back her support of DeSantis, and then in another comment she slammed an event with Donald Trump Jr., falsely claiming that the event can’t sell tickets.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives falsely alleges that the Donald Trump Jr. event can’t sell tickets. (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives tries to walk back her endorsement of Ron DeSantis for President. (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
The full day of Letters to Trump (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) events in Illinois on October 27th has not yet been released, and only a portion of the tickets have been public for less than 24 hours, and Ives already publicly stated that the Donald Trump Jr. event is having trouble with attendance.

The McHenry County GOPAC is hosting an event for Donald Trump Jr. at 11:00 am on October 27th. You can purchase tickets
here (https://www.mcgopac.com/event-details/exclusive-event-with-donald-trump-jr?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

A more detailed schedule of the book tour will be posted on Illinois Review as it becomes available.

Biden Back to Masking Indoors as US Education Secretary, Who Lobbied for Letter Calling Parents “Domestic Terrorists,” Joins Pritzker During Visit to Springfield Elementary School
While President Joe Biden appeared at a White House ceremony wearing a face mask this week, his education secretary, who led the charge and the drafting of the controversial letter written by the National School Boards Association (NSBA), which referred to parents who voiced their concerns at local school board meetings, as “domestic terrorists,” toured an elementary school in Springfield alongside Gov. JB Pritzker on Wednesday. US Rep. Mary Miller, R-15, was quick to respond. CLICK TO READ MORE. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/biden-back-to-masking-indoors-as-us-education-secretary-who-lobbied-for-letter-calling-parents-domestic-terrorists-joins-pritzker-during-visit-to-springfield-elementary-school.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/IllinoisReview/status/1699625301116883286?s=20&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IN CASE YOU MISSED IT
On Tuesday, Newsmax sent out Publisher Scott Kaspar's op-ed "Kaspar: Injustice of Giuliani Indictment Threatens Justice (https://www.newsmax.com/politics/giuliani-rudy/2023/08/30/id/1132649/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) " by email and text to its millions of subscribers.

The op-ed has been reprinted on
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/kaspar-injustice-of-giuliani-indictment-threatens-justice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

On Tuesday evening, Kaspar appeared on
Newsmax TV (https://youtu.be/PlQKgUZ_uXU?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to discuss the Giuliani indictment.
https://www.newsmax.com/politics/giuliani-rudy/2023/08/30/id/1132649/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9fb8a18792-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

clean_body: Donald Trump Jr. is coming to Illinois October 27th, but it seems that not everyone is excited by the news.

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [STARTING SOON] Common Ground Podcast
body:
Peter, While Bill continues to be out on the trail, fighting the good fight to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond,
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/d14822be06bb1a893dcd64660ac8f828/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVZ0whvIiKieYg6h61DLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoC0lJCT7c6eE4a7BAIxdKoKSwkVTw19fxXLZmFlRC3mLddAr88Wt4AeYzczeuBTQoNMhhH4RpksenLMlTQ6pCm47_PMzbLp5oFyQZTNNPMdaCot64W_BJdzgvKoVZRUddGf5KpFrftnlT1428mBJZrnjVne1K9GgEhVIoy8_6FIe3ZnoCG6Vi4g==)

| Peter, While Bill continues to be out on the trail, working to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, we will be airing an encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon.
Today's stream is covers**fighting mandates and changing your mindset.** As Americans, we have the right to make our own decisions about our health and well-being. We should have the right to make informed decisions about our medical treatment based on our personal beliefs, medical history, and advice from our trusted healthcare professionals. Vaccine mandates, along with other mandates, infringe upon our individual liberties and autonomy.

---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/a79850646f59a328b22a2aecac23e35f/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCXRNMKbiIhoHqLOYetQS7q7rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoSkFpBQHc6eG6a7BAI-OKo6BICirZ6-v6nrN2LKi5uCVadgqC8Wt4Aeaz421cC2hQaJDDPoyytEhOeVpkhlSlNh3_eRx_u3jiXZjmME0_xdhwinvjbiEg3eG8qOJmFR11bfgrkWoD22ayaaS4mBJRrVjdne2a92gEpVIoqs_6DIe3ZnoCGg9i4A==)
---
|
---
| The episode being streamed today features the following special guests: **Dana Wefer** is an experienced attorney in New Jersey and New York. Dana has been fighting on behalf of workers, students, and teachers who have been victims of unlawful mandates. Her recent lawsuit against President Joe Biden and the federal government challenges the vaccine mandates imposed on federal workers and contractors. She will be coming on to share her story. After all, we have the right to make our own decisions about our health and well-being, and the covid shot in particular which has shown to be both ineffective and potentially harmful, crossed the line. **Rob Gill** is the Founder and CEO of EPIC Financial Strategies, and today, he will cover why having a negative attitude towards money is one of the biggest barriers to achieving financial freedom. After performing more than 23,000 cash flow analyses, Rob and his team have noticed that most people have the mindset that money is scarce and difficult to attain. This often creates a self-fulfilling prophecy, which makes it challenging for most people to achieve financial stability and success. Rob will talk about how changing your mindset is essential to overcoming these limiting beliefs and achieving financial freedom. Make sure you [**click here to join us now (our encore stream will go live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/5284a0d61704c1f160a9ab9e9cad5c1d/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vmV4Q7EZFBcxG1DtNHDek4jE_JxP_eWOGqoO17557LHYFQ5IJYCT7c6WHbDhigsOCSo6CwEZQXr6_tuZZjGVBxcYtV00nwx6_hBZjPlrtZG0CDRI0c9kGYsCw-pSxLNClzpTv-81jedvFEu4ClME0_xVhzinrtbsEn1eG8qOR6FR1VpfkrkWx90yyaum7ERZeIclVU3dmseI9akEuJovysT3B4a6YnGHli3g==)
Common Sense Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/12832442/7315d8808cd3bdc1) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Mohona Chowdhury
subject: Sharice is fighting for our elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’m bumping Sharice’s message, because it’s important that we hear from you before midnight.

**_[Click here to answer our voting rights survey to tell us just how concerned you are about the attacks on our election integrity→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69347987/425875124/-764962693?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230907_PL_election_1.2_0_1MO_cm_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzgwZTZhZi05OTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zhTEUruDo3J4xfGMkHX_0Lsx8huIKl3NX9v-uNwKc0M=&emci=4dbbcca9-ba4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3780e6af-994d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_**

Thanks for answering,

Mohona
_Campaign Manager_
* * *
Keeping our elections free and fair is essential to our democracy.

We’ve seen an alarming number of cases of National Republicans attacking our election integrity recently. This summer, the Supreme Court ruled on two states’ attempts at gerrymandering their congressional districts to dilute the votes of marginalized communities.

Just over two years ago, I voted for legislation to protect our freedom to vote and ensure equality at the ballot box. As your representative, I will always defend our individual rights and freedoms— _and stand up for our democracy._ But without control of the House, we know real action to protect our elections from these attacks aren’t going to become law.

**_[I want to hear from my top supporters today. As we look towards 2024, how important is it to you that I keep standing up against efforts to suppress our voices? Answer before midnight tomorrow:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69347990/425875127/-764962693?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230907_PL_election_1.2_0_1MO_cm_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzgwZTZhZi05OTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zhTEUruDo3J4xfGMkHX_0Lsx8huIKl3NX9v-uNwKc0M=&emci=4dbbcca9-ba4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3780e6af-994d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_** | | [Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69347995/425875130/-764962693?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230907_PL_election_1.2_0_1MO_cm_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzgwZTZhZi05OTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zhTEUruDo3J4xfGMkHX_0Lsx8huIKl3NX9v-uNwKc0M=&emci=4dbbcca9-ba4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3780e6af-994d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---
Gerrymandering, voter suppression, disinformation, deep pocketed mega donors and corporations.... These are only a few of the tactics that extremists use to try and weaken the foundation of our country.

**These attacks will not stop. Which is why we can’t stop fighting back.**

Thanks for answering, Mohona Campaign Manager Keeping our elections free and fair is essential to our democracy. We’ve seen an alarming number of cases of National Republicans attacking our election integrity recently. This summer, the Supreme Court ruled on two states’ attempts at gerrymandering their congressional districts to dilute the votes of marginalized communities. Just over two years ago, I voted for legislation to protect our freedom to vote and ensure equality at the ballot box. As your representative, I will always defend our individual rights and freedoms— and stand up for our democracy. But without control of the House, we know real action to protect our elections from these attacks aren’t going to become law. | | Gerrymandering, voter suppression, disinformation, deep pocketed mega donors and corporations.... name: Mark Gonzalez
subject: Attacks have started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Gonzalez for Senate
body:
markagonzalez.com [markagonzalez.com]
Hi friends,
It started...less than 24 hours into our campaign to take on Ted Cruz, the attacks came. Videos, articles, and online trolling.
Bring it on.
Click here to donate to Mark Gonzalez [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas]
Bullies don’t scare me. What does is how some elected officials treat our fellow Texans. It’s deplorable. They want to scare you, but what’s scarier than Republicans controlling your healthcare?
We desperately need to beat Ted Cruz in November, and I'm in this race because -- with your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas] -- I know I can win.
I've always faced tough races in Nueces County, and my campaigns came out on top because we talked about the issues that were important to everyone - Democrats and Republicans. That's why in 2020 I was the only Democrat elected countywide from Nueces.
I make no apologies for my party -- I'm proud of it. But, I’m a Texan first, and my primary focus revolves around removing the barriers that are keeping other everyday Texans from achieving their vision of the American Dream. That's a message that transcends party.
So, while the attacks may be starting, that's ok: I'm used to them. It's just further proof the other side knows that I have what it takes to win. If you do too, I hope you'll make a contribution today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas] so that we can prove them right.
Adelante,

I introduced legislation that would require the Department of Defense to notify our service members of free tax services.

[Sign your name if you stand with me in raising awareness of free tax service for service members >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69348355/425876495/865144207?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230905_PT_taxservices_0_3MO_Jimmy_NA_NA_taxservices&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA2NWM4MC05YTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCR9CQYpPExy0nPdlIuTlz6CLxNCufMx4SWW3G3FEfo=&emci=6b9ba849-134c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=20065c80-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)

_— Original message —_

Peter,

One of Jimmy’s main priorities is helping our men and women in uniform. As a means to further support them, **Jimmy** wrote and introduced bipartisan legislation to raise **awareness** of the free **tax services** for service members.

Currently, the federal government provides a **free tax MilTax program** to service members. But, there are no legal requirements for the Department of Defense (DOD) to notify them of this program, leaving many men and women in uniform unaware of the benefits that they can receive.

In response, **Jimmy wrote and introduced bipartisan legislation** that would **require the DOD** to regularly inform service members of the program through mail, e-mail, or in person during tax season. With this awareness, military families could navigate tax season efficiently while serving our nation.

Jimmy is advancing this program through Congress and needs your support.

[Peter, sign your name today if you support Jimmy and his work to raise awareness of the free tax service for our servicemembers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69348357/425876496/865144207?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230905_PT_taxservices_0_3MO_Jimmy_NA_NA_taxservices&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA2NWM4MC05YTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCR9CQYpPExy0nPdlIuTlz6CLxNCufMx4SWW3G3FEfo=&emci=6b9ba849-134c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=20065c80-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)

Thank you,

Team Panetta

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: WAGOP Press Release: Plan to Save Basic Education in Washington State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
During the 2020-2021 school year, some 40,000 students left Washington State public schools. Clearly, something isn't working... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d7e79d3dd4&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Press Release: WAGOP's plans for Saving Basic Education in Washington State**
WAGOP guidelines to Saving Basic Education
* **Focus on Kids**
* **Engage Parents**
* **Empower Teachers**

Public education is most effectively managed by state governments, not federal. According to Article IX of the Washington State Constitution, it is the “paramount duty” of the state government to “make ample provision for the education of all children residing within its borders.” As the WA State Constitution and separate state law establish, basic K-12 education is most effectively delivered by local educators, hired and held accountable by locally-elected school boards.

During the 2020-2021 school year, some 40,000 students left Washington state public schools. Clearly, something isn’t working.

The State of Washington’s growing deference to federal education priorities and its parallel concentration of the implementation of K-12 education policy in the Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction (OSPI) have failed to deliver high-quality basic education to WA children.

**Standard proficiency testing of WA high school students show that half of the students can’t read or write at grade level—and nearly two-thirds can’t do simple mathematics at grade level. **These numbers are unacceptable.

Washington Republicans are committed to delivering a high-quality, uniform basic education to all children residing within the state’s borders. To do this, the state government must change the way it funds and manages public education here.

**The WAGOP plan for Saving Basic Education includes the following elements:**
* clarify state law to strengthen and protect the “broad discretionary power” of locally-elected school boards to develop curriculum, select textbooks, hiring teachers and do all other acts and things that a school district does
* narrow the mission and reduce the budget of OSPI and move those resources to school districts—preferably, into classrooms
* narrow the mission and reduce the budget of WA’s system of “Education Service Districts” and move money and people to school districts—preferably, into classrooms
* reform or repeal the state’s “prototypical school” budget model to fund special education programs and other specialized-learning programs more effectively
* maximize parental involvement, in part, by launching a school choice program
* properly incentivize teachers to give students the best possible education
* reduce the number and compensation of school administrators

Underlying all of these policy points is the core belief that families and local communities are best positioned to make decisions—based on evidence-based guidelines suggested by OSPI and other agencies—about delivering basic K-12 education to WA children. **As the WA Constitution says, the state’s primary duty is to fund K-12 education programs. The local school board’s duty is to build and implement those programs.**

For nearly a century, this division of responsibilities delivered outstanding K-12 education to WA kids. This state’s K-12 schools were consistently ranked among the best in the United States. The recent bureaucratization of basic education in WA has weakened the system, dropping WA schools to middle rankings nationally.

“We need to save high-quality basic education in our state,” WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh says. **“****Washington Republicans will do that. With bills. With budgets. And with the****bully pulpit.”**
###
---

These numbers are unacceptable. Washington Republicans are committed to delivering a high-quality, uniform basic education to all children residing within the state’s borders. To do this, the state government must change the way it funds and manages public education here. The WAGOP plan for Saving Basic Education includes the following elements: clarify state law to strengthen and protect the “broad discretionary power” of locally-elected school boards to develop curriculum, select textbooks, hiring teachers and do all other acts and things that a school district does narrow the mission and reduce the budget of OSPI and move those resources to school districts—preferably, into classrooms narrow the mission and reduce the budget of WA’s system of “Education Service Districts” and move money and people to school districts—preferably, into classrooms reform or repeal the state’s “prototypical school” budget model to fund special education programs and other specialized-learning programs more effectively maximize parental involvement, in part, by launching a school choice program properly incentivize teachers to give students the best possible education reduce the number and compensation of school administrators Underlying all of these policy points is the core belief that families and local communities are best positioned to make decisions—based on evidence-based guidelines suggested by OSPI and other agencies—about delivering basic K-12 education to WA children. As the WA Constitution says, the state’s primary duty is to fund K-12 education programs. The local school board’s duty is to build and implement those programs. For nearly a century, this division of responsibilities delivered outstanding K-12 education to WA kids. This state’s K-12 schools were consistently ranked among the best in the United States. The recent bureaucratization of basic education in WA has weakened the system, dropping WA schools to middle rankings nationally. “We need to save high-quality basic education in our state,” WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh says. “Washington Republicans will do that. With bills. With budgets. And with thebully pulpit.” | "Click Here To Show Your Support and Provide Feedback >>>" | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. Congress has a deadline on Sept. 30 to fund the government or else the government will shut down.

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Derek's not a millionaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | | Rep. Jay Obernolte spent over $1.4 million of his fortune to win a seat in Congress - and he’s proud to put millionaires and billionaires first. Obernolte says raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour would _“harm American workers”_ as he demands more tax cuts for the rich. Obernolte takes _thousands_ from Big Pharma as he voted against letting Medicare negotiate the cost of prescription drugs. And, Obernolte joined an amicus brief with Lauren Boebert and Paul Gosar successfully urging the Supreme Court to kill student loan forgiveness. **Democrat Derek Marshall isn’t a millionaire.** He knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck as housing and food costs skyrocket. **Unlike Obernolte, we don’t fund our campaign with huge checks from corporate PACs. To close the gap, we rely on grassroots donations from emails like this.** **[Our movement for higher wages, Medicare for All, and student debt relief needs your help to flip California’s 23rd District. Obernolte says raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour would “harm American workers” as he demands more tax cuts for the rich. Obernolte takes thousands from Big Pharma as he voted against letting Medicare negotiate the cost of prescription drugs. And, Obernolte joined an amicus brief with Lauren Boebert and Paul Gosar successfully urging the Supreme Court to kill student loan forgiveness. Democrat Derek Marshall isn’t a millionaire. He knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck as housing and food costs skyrocket. Unlike Obernolte, we don’t fund our campaign with huge checks from corporate PACs. To close the gap, we rely on grassroots donations from emails like this. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Bittersweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=439%2E52803%2EDbmopc)

| | Peter, I’m saying a bittersweet goodbye to an incredibly exciting summer. We faced our first-ever FEC End-of-Quarter deadline (and crushed it!), garnered more than 90 endorsements from elected officials and leaders from across this state, and proved that we have the momentum to see this all the way through. And on the personal side, I got to cheer for Alex at her graduation and drop her off for her first day of college. Now, it’s time to prepare for our upcoming FEC deadline, which will show whether we can sustain our grassroots energy long-term. We’ll continue to expand and invest in our campaign – getting our campaign message out online and on the air, hiring more great staff, and reaching out to Marylanders to learn more about their unique needs, concerns, and values. **We’ll need plenty of resources to make all that happen.[So, if you can, will you pitch in $25 to help us make this a real season of success?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5621?t=9&amount=25&akid=439%2E52803%2EDbmopc)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5621?t=10&amount=25&akid=439%2E52803%2EDbmopc)

Angela Alsobrooks
