**More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign**

Fellow Conservative,

In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (**donations under $200**) and major donors (**donations over $200**).

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITRGi-7hgD9_kDOMF2syf3dhghPG1iNQxrrfErz95I7JdXAnM8adxG-__Iq7Hvdzu4YuyiU9JmlqpHwsBLnXELpsRGXSbtQyRxAlmew1v0BcwA5l29b8T6XvCDxotjkh_Ctv3cKyJBBtiIunM2aaxMSHw-QcBk4lOkmmuTG5jxOu6c%3D)
**143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does.

** [**HELP ME CATCH UP ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITRu6PDHavCNKQkDCZEyv3bsZ2JxEOPUl1I17B_UlB6Vzco3lhI1eyD9Qau-WX19HZHgKHeq-V5YwhXUKUsm_OyahdC8ucdEM0hgp6MPUvfMqiS36UDoEV6eezdsonfAw8MfXJ9TZFtUxZtSWmEszQmFapD4VPP8gbQ2lrJmflLUCw%3D)
It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,**I’m concerned we’ll never catch up.**

I’m not going to ask you to pitch in $48 today **(Tester’s average donation this year**) because I know that’s a lot of money. But **[would you consider chipping in $12, one fourth of his 2023 average donation?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITRtCDiJ3VSATHa3XUHKVqYvLTSrpkrTaSMU99bBG3ZQX_xUM7I1MzsbyeLWMZY12Sqr_yELxlOsvLKDkie30Ev-HbxMqJx3AJ9IfLWhmCcnPd6maW4oQ5kS6d1rJr4GRdrY8KWD-xePajAAMCncS-uAWVfWjHSiiVrqLyBmrBs2Dk%3D) **

[**CHIP IN $12 ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITRhbcySp8uDJHZ2XS6FspBjfcZAWIqv55047hjV5rfiW7Bh16uicp37VU2hukadIv2ps-turNaL1zgfW1YHxLQgwYhGcQ9Gc4iUn_dyIzbsEg4BQI-tTaLVBy5phENyKkjNLy71aHBY5NSk1IW1FGQ7eLGgoDytt88csJwXsjlCnk%3D)

**We need all the help we can get and must start somewhere to keep this race in the Tossup column.**

Despite winning election to the Senate from a red-leaning state, Jon Tester votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time. During Obama’s presidency, his voting record was similarly liberal.

Jon Tester is the epitome of what’s wrong with Washington: **say one thing and do another**. He’s had the opportunity to pass bipartisan legislation under two different Republican presidents and has bucked the opportunity both times.

It’s time for a change. I hope you’ll invest in me. I can beat this guy; **[I just need your financial backing to get the job done](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITR4nBFElbGNwubHv_Vg7lnIy9OdjrrHJTJeekORjwjikAnZInYDO9KGdYhiHDz9ez3RZ3O3MvYZuv1rqd6U36dIWAlv0OMBgWUwJ5fl3gzGEeb_sE9RaZI4FyxijctIVRGDi9gCrrUItV5pgz0GbzdE-xIMk8wDwaFzk2ewHCmjtI%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN $12 ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8315c77484424c19a7e7640afc08d2c7&_e=oL98OinvzWOAPnGS2y7d3rBW9ElGkXA-n1AaLjV9-f3lUSU1ZhsqLAhbTHkRcIC9JjYWcemmyO5OLD4YMgPP1CH-NvgQXSGrBuGN8PKJ1Ujeb8ipM-8bZfkYKvzkukhkaZxCpbUcTZprRezl1HqZBC7eXvqyXLEIrXHevbrSVzwnxjStEpj0OubPnWi5Vy-ZshaWSiLVCgA9di2Gf7ZhZfyPv7nrXTVUJoDGgUmAxXwGTxw4z-wLVysSF9HoTITRietnKjknL5y3-nm7NOrmwvqh2hLE63_-Lv_XbSW7iW7f5rnmxTkQfbvxAMUZ6Ctd8LAusHdszEkMRx3tL0POlOwAfs44uyLULBYP7xQbdWZu9_hPkZlu5QYWmUpXpSscm_XVWMsxp5cZEyy0F1vR-YbVuBPEsUx4IPW--Hjat_o%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 07, 2023

Kamala Harris made
this revealing statement that has Joe Biden sweating bullets

Joe Biden has been one of
the worst presidents in U.S. history. But if Vice President
Harris takes over, she could easily earn that spot.

And Kamala Harris made this
revealing statement that has Joe Biden sweating bullets.

TRENDING NEWS

This interview caused AOC
to land on her face in humiliating fashion

Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez is one of the country's least respected
politicians. She shows everyone why that's the case, anytime she
speaks in public.

Friend: This is incredible news! Kirsten Gillibrand — a bold leader for gender equity — has introduced a new resolution to finally add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to the Constitution!
**The ERA would classify gender-based discrimination as unconstitutional, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights nationwide.** Activists have spent 100 years pushing to add this amendment to the Constitution, and now the required 38 states have finally voted in favor of it. But an arbitrary, unbinding deadline is blocking us from finally adding the 28th Amendment to the Constitution.
Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and ensure that all Americans are treated fairly under our Constitution, regardless of gender identity.
**We already know that right-wing extremists will do everything they can to sabotage this resolution – that's why it's so important to know if Americans support the ERA. You've been selected to represent 43614 in this live opinion poll, so please respond before midnight tonight to make your voice heard for gender equity:**
**Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69349451/425880729/419487029?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4422-su-nd&refcode=jtk4422-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhjMDU4MC05YzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4nT0ZSlrY_7qvek2XKO8-u69-_-vqCInCM6vqJywPIg=&emci=fe008390-144d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e78c0580-9c4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Friend, did you see this? Friend, did you see this update from Washington? Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is leading a brand-new effort to certify the Equal Rights Amendment! This fight has been 100 years in the making — and we can't wait any longer. The ERA would give us a legal basis to overturn the GOP's dangerous abortion bans and restore reproductive rights across the country. But when we reached out to see if you support the ERA, we never heard back from you!It's incredibly important that we have accurate data from 43614 Democrats. So please, respond before our new midnight deadline to tell us where you stand! Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Capitol Hill Update for Date: Tue, Aug 22, 2023 Subject: we can FINALLY certify the ERA: | | | DEVELOPING FROM CAPITOL HILL: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand Leads the Charge to Certify the Equal Rights Amendment! Friend: This is incredible news! Kirsten Gillibrand — a bold leader for gender equity — has introduced a new resolution to finally add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to the Constitution! The ERA would classify gender-based discrimination as unconstitutional, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights nationwide. Activists have spent 100 years pushing to add this amendment to the Constitution, and now the required 38 states have finally voted in favor of it. But an arbitrary, unbinding deadline is blocking us from finally adding the 28th Amendment to the Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and ensure that all Americans are treated fairly under our Constitution, regardless of gender identity. We already know that right-wing extremists will do everything they can to sabotage this resolution – that's why it's so important to know if Americans support the ERA. You've been selected to represent 43614 in this live opinion poll, so please respond before midnight tonight to make your voice heard for gender equity: Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | Poll will close at midnight | 5,000 Responses Required for Statistical Significance | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

I made clear that the wealthiest in our society need to pay their fair share of taxes – and that someone with my business background is uniquely equipped to shape policies that will make our economy work for everyone. **I believe we have a responsibility to help lift people up and help each generation be better than the next. I'm running because I want to be part of the solution.** Every day since we launched our campaign, we've seen how our message is resonating. People are fired up about our mission to send MAGA extremist David Schweikert packing and bring real leadership to AZ-01. I'm grateful for all the opportunities I've had to reach wide audiences – both through media and through on-the-ground events – and I can't wait for the pace to pick up even more. body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69349850/425882352/-1153890425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYzk4NjE5LTllNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aeOhQCcQkwTCc6KeZHC5H_9q9Q626iYgijqYoX-AhM=&emci=57b3e404-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=42c98619-9e4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Oregon’s US Senators have been tireless champions working to secure permanent protection for the Owyhee Canyonlands in Southeastern Oregon. In June, Sen. Ron Wyden re-introduced his Owyhee protection bill, with Sen. Jeff Merkley as co-sponsor, for the third time in four years. We are grateful to our US Senators for their efforts to protect the Owyhee, but **if Congress fails to act, we have another option–establish an Owyhee Canyonlands National Monument before the end of 2024.[Will you add your name and join a growing list of supporters calling for permanent protection of the Owyhee?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69349851/425882353/-1153890425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYzk4NjE5LTllNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aeOhQCcQkwTCc6KeZHC5H_9q9Q626iYgijqYoX-AhM=&emci=57b3e404-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=42c98619-9e4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Oregon’s Grand Canyon–the Owyhee Canyonlands–boasts more than 2.5 million acres of deep, rugged canyons, which have been 17 million years in the making. The region is home to stretches upon stretches of rolling sagebrush grasslands, rushing rivers, and hundreds of native species. It also contains sites and cultural resources significant to the Northern Paiute, Bannock, and Shoshone tribes. The Owyhee is a one-of-a-kind national treasure, but threats to the land that would change it forever are only increasing: potential oil and gas development, resource extraction, mining, climate change, and a growing problem of unmanaged recreation. **[Its timeless majesty is worthy of the highest protections, and the time to protect it is now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69349852/425882354/-1153890425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYzk4NjE5LTllNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aeOhQCcQkwTCc6KeZHC5H_9q9Q626iYgijqYoX-AhM=&emci=57b3e404-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=42c98619-9e4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** That’s why we’re joining with partners like the Oregon Natural Desert Association in launching a new campaign calling for national monument status for the Owyhee should Congress fail to act this year. [**Sign on now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69349853/425882355/-1153890425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYzk4NjE5LTllNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5aeOhQCcQkwTCc6KeZHC5H_9q9Q626iYgijqYoX-AhM=&emci=57b3e404-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=42c98619-9e4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Owyhee Canyonlands is currently the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. Together, we can secure the future of the Owyhee Canyonlands before it’s too late. Thank you for all that you do! Best,
Britney VanCitters

Organizing Manager, OLCV

name: Gloria Johnson & Katie Porter's Campaign
subject: Tennesseans deserve a leader who gives a damn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)
_Below is a message from Gloria Johnson, who just announced her candidacy for U.S. Senate in Tennessee. I hope you’ll take a moment to read her message and if you can, consider supporting her today. --Katie Porter_
[**Derek, I’m a teacher, a Tennessee state legislator, and a proud member of the Tennessee Three. Now, I'm running for U.S. Senate. I need your support in this fight—contribute any amount right now to become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and****Katie Porter****.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230907-1?refcode=EMAL07_1_SPL_20230907_V1_F&refcode2=29469_3422442_06UOSP&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)
I’m in this race because _Tennesseans deserve better_.
That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice.
So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest.
I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._
The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to_ _increase_ _access to guns._
**MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists.
_But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._
**I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period.
Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted _against_ everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote.
She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies.
**Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it.
[**But I need your help to get our campaign off the ground and make it to the Senate. Make a Founding Donation to help me defeat the GOP and deliver for our country!** **Click here to split a donation between me and****Katie Porter****.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230907-1?refcode=EMAL07_1_SPL_20230907_V1_F&refcode2=29469_3422442_06UOSP&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)
[Become a Founding Donor ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230907-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL07_1_SPL_20230907_V1_F&refcode2=29469_3422442_06UOSP&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)
With you,
Gloria

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL07_1_SPL_20230907_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=29469_3422442_06UOSP&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=29469%2E3422442%2E06UOSP)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: Believe us. It can make a huge difference. | = Hey Peter, The most competitive election of 2023 is happening in Mississippi — and we're two months away! Brandon is working around the clock to engage voters, spread his message of hope, and use our new poll momentum (we're in a dead heat at 46% a piece!) to defeat Tate Reeves on November 7th. = | = = Yes, we’re only asking for $2 today. $2 to invest in text messages, emails, mailers, yard signs, last-minute campaign staff, and TV ads. $2 to elect a governor who will clean up corruption and bring trust and transparency back to state government. $2 to defeat one of the most unpopular and self-serving governors in the nation. It may not sound like a lot, but when hundreds of supporters all contribute $2, it can go a long way in the final two months of this race. = = = Thanks, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. clean_body: = Peter, I need you to see this. = = called us to action: | = = = backed him up -- and told us the stakes of the fight for our democracy: = = = joined them: = Peter, I’ll be blunt: Donald Trump tried to overturn a free and fair election. His MAGA allies have introduced HUNDREDS of voter suppression laws from coast to coast. = = | **= = = = = =** Thank you, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. name: Sheriff Lamb
subject: Masks should be worn again, scientists say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

subject: Chair Karamo Responds to Whitmer Carbon Neutral Plan
body:
Are you aware that Governor Whitmer has committed to achieving carbon neutrality in Michigan by 2032? | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Chairwoman Karamo has released a new video addressing Governor Whitmer's recent plans, which include making Michigan carbon neutral by 2032. This date may sound familiar, as it aligns with the United Nations' Agenda 2030.
Please view the brief video below or click on the link to watch it on our new Rumble channel.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: 🇨🇦Help Send Revival North!!!
body:
| | | It's Sean Feucht with a critical call to action. As of 10am Pacific Time, we've raised just over $10,000 of our $60,000 goal. We know God has called us to Canada, and no matter what, we will go and put on these three revivals.
Tomorrow morning we will take a full accounting of what we've raised and make determinations if the revivals can be scaled back. One thing is certain—we will never charge an entry fee to a Let Us Worship revival. God will make a way!

If you can contribute to these three revivals, please contribute here: **[https://www.letusworship.us/canada/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2691c39e853843bebf6243c887ff3edb&_e=B2RhMPlFBlGcxnaOkK1wFSVqNOto8f5mDkKXCET_0yRwH1VTVhuAZ-1JRhZqXBl29oe6pH1IjXcRvtzNQ4aBxRK3gp8mKBUlFQl6U0jU5Ie9whzTfZUb5Q7im0iNPUSEDHqW6irccJ0Q3LfJq76rRoetWUv1t7rkcY41c4_fb_0RQpmq0qwQXcKGGJJjLVZ56ZN2evtaAW3_fKfl_aA6JOsW0ylyLDJKNl_6xs6op3bKtWZWbJkNYruaZTmHpvZlcObRda8ZJjxO0Sj3dYFq2kYBm-S0yA_z5fj2WMfqjHY0RkD0LmjYCnr0Mq7Sc103)**

God Bless,

Sean
---
|
---
From: Sean Feucht
Date: Tuesday, September 5, 2023
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: 🇨🇦Help Send Revival North!!!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2691c39e853843bebf6243c887ff3edb&_e=B2RhMPlFBlGcxnaOkK1wFVUu6cC7TqUHbK1La7sX7yj_0BVr2Cwc4xf9MkaVOuRhvo7eBajXtUaurjg9qRJbNHxZHM6Ajm1i4ItyRUzRN5v5-1s4n7pJKKzLftk07uUlUhaK4W4OYg5M5h52g_u2WyT0XnFo5At1djGrII22IYt3yZi7iNFVolcf-N6e3yAaKjliJWOW_uTSoBC5tKbLwgEsKsxmpsAo4SVwilzFnjjt17XqcimGz57X8GQTfmV4dAZ5jqP9UMq1D_JeWIOxFJi3Vt1dJvQaSpAm_ufr7kd7iEWBFinb6OPNN5-JWMqY)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Let Us Worship is a movement born out of the desire to see a Holy revival fall upon our nation. But the desire for revival is not held exclusively by us Americans—far from it!! We've seen a hunger for revival from Believers all across the globe, from South Africa, to India, to Iraq and beyond!!

In Mark chapter 12, Jesus taught, "Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.’ The second is this: ‘ _**Love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no commandment greater than these.**_ ” We know God is stirring the hearts of our northern neighbors, our Canadian brothers and sisters in Christ, as well as preparing to work in the lives of the lost. NOW IS THE TIME for us to bring Let Us Worship to Canada!!! To host these three revivals, we need to raise $60,000—that's $20,000 per revival. We don't have event sponsors or already pledged donations, so this is something we have to pay for all on our own.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2691c39e853843bebf6243c887ff3edb&_e=B2RhMPlFBlGcxnaOkK1wFVUu6cC7TqUHbK1La7sX7yj_0BVr2Cwc4xf9MkaVOuRhvo7eBajXtUaurjg9qRJbNHxZHM6Ajm1i4ItyRUzRN5v5-1s4n7pJKKzLftk07uUlUhaK4W4OYg5M5h52g_u2WyT0XnFo5At1djGrII22IYvbKufp85XRP1fS5x1SxvHw_JAoVaW4df4BmMGg8zM1RrJt4uyDISmbdKlUTCaCJDVcJr-OLFRSvym3_3tBsCvnlp-S-HQE_QeeI66kOxEc2qHB5r8-Oieh4yUAPuniDfU9LQbWNyTNgtV0b8XuxAM-)
---
Canada is a hostile environment for the Gospel—we've seen pastors arrested for holding services during Canada's extreme COVID lockdowns and arrested for protesting child drag shows, but we heard God’s call to go and we are answering!__ Can you help us fund these three revivals for our Canadian brothers and sisters?
---
[**HELP BRING REVIVAL TO CANADA >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2691c39e853843bebf6243c887ff3edb&_e=B2RhMPlFBlGcxnaOkK1wFVUu6cC7TqUHbK1La7sX7yj_0BVr2Cwc4xf9MkaVOuRhvo7eBajXtUaurjg9qRJbNHxZHM6Ajm1i4ItyRUzRN5v5-1s4n7pJKKzLftk07uUlUhaK4W4OYg5M5h52g_u2WyT0XnFo5At1djGrII22IYtYQ_LIn8t8kVCwQYqJi_PG6nQD7PBpDuCI-gRsVAKHtQ1EJoM_42uY11vou9tkvifjU2mHuJ1gLNAGzUmIc7GHO42wJG8XdfN9k9VoVJL3Y5a1ztqNaDKOm6m5o_VRfTpuqo1MPNzhltC2KHsRn601)

Till all hear,

Sean

clean_body: | | | It's Sean Feucht with a critical call to action. As of 10am Pacific Time, we've raised just over $10,000 of our $60,000 goal. We know God has called us to Canada, and no matter what, we will go and put on these three revivals. Tomorrow morning we will take a full accounting of what we've raised and make determinations if the revivals can be scaled back. One thing is certain—we will never charge an entry fee to a Let Us Worship revival. God will make a way! If you can contribute to these three revivals, please contribute here: God Bless, Sean | From: Sean Feucht Date: Tuesday, September 5, 2023 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: 🇨🇦Help Send Revival North!!! Dear Friend, Let Us Worship is a movement born out of the desire to see a Holy revival fall upon our nation. But the desire for revival is not held exclusively by us Americans—far from it!! We've seen a hunger for revival from Believers all across the globe, from South Africa, to India, to Iraq and beyond!! In Mark chapter 12, Jesus taught, "Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.’ The second is this: ‘ Love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no commandment greater than these. ” We know God is stirring the hearts of our northern neighbors, our Canadian brothers and sisters in Christ, as well as preparing to work in the lives of the lost. NOW IS THE TIME for us to bring Let Us Worship to Canada!!! To host these three revivals, we need to raise $60,000—that's $20,000 per revival. We don't have event sponsors or already pledged donations, so this is something we have to pay for all on our own. - Canada is a hostile environment for the Gospel—we've seen pastors arrested for holding services during Canada's extreme COVID lockdowns and arrested for protesting child drag shows, but we heard God’s call to go and we are answering! Can you help us fund these three revivals for our Canadian brothers and sisters? Till all hear, Sean | | P.S. Our new album Send Me is now available!!! The album contains old favorites like "Liberty Bells," and new ones like "Send Me." Listen to Send Me . | | International Donors— donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

name: VoteVets
subject: Warrior Poets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Tuberville needed to respond to the Secretary of the Navy yesterday. He took his best shot.
#
Well, guess Tuberville needed to respond to the Secretary of the Navy yesterday. He took his best shot.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230907-1-30&t=1&akid=15750%2E3013755%2EDVP_RO)
Poems on aircraft carriers.
Wait until this guy finds out about the U.S. Navy Band. Yes, Tommy, they have people playing instruments, too! They even sing songs.
It’s easy to joke here, but this is actually serious. War has always been intertwined with art, with song, and yes, with poetry. Even General George S. Patton wrote poetry. These things deepen a warrior’s humanity and their connection to home, the reasons they put their lives on the line for their comrades and their countrymen.
Warrior poets are a proud and honored tradition.
If Tuberville read a book once in his life he’d know that.
But he’s a politician, through and through. And he’s going to keep injecting politics into our Military, undermining our Armed Forces at the same time he works to restrict the rights of our Veterans.
[**This is the fight of the year. VoteVets is hard at work. So please, if you can afford it, chip in $3 and support our mission. We can’t beat Tuberville and the GOP without your help.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230907-1-30&t=2&akid=15750%2E3013755%2EDVP_RO)**

subject: Covid Reboot and Border Woes: What's *Really* Happening
body:
❗ New Episode Alert! Stream the latest No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a8fdbcf237&e=567664f14c)
Friend, We're thrilled to bring you the latest edition of the No Doubt About It Podcast, hosted by Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1b3567fbd4&e=567664f14c)
This week's episode is packed with intriguing discussions and stories you won't want to miss.
We start with the latest news on Covid mandates returning and the country that has been most Covid lockdown obsessed (North Korea) might be finally letting up. **This, as some in the US seek more restrictions!**
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a621327075&e=567664f14c)
---
### Our Special Guest: Fior Hernandez from Victory News
In this episode, we are joined by Fior Hernandez, an experienced reporter who has recently returned from the border.
Fior sheds light on the ongoing disaster posed by the Biden Administration's border policy, which continues to be a concerning failure that puts vulnerable lives at risk.
| [WATCH EPISODE 33](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=001a2cbd34&e=567664f14c)
---
### The Presidential Race Unveiled
Mark offers a unique and frankly crazy theory that may leave you questioning the future of American politics. **Is it possible that neither Joe Biden nor Donald Trump will be on the ballot next November?** Tune in to find out as we delve into this topic.
| [WATCH EPISODE 33](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8d7e704019&e=567664f14c)
---
### Mark's Hit and Run Tale
Also, Ella asks Mark to share a gripping personal story about the time he was the victim of a hit and run accident. **What makes this story truly bizarre is the extraordinary way Mark managed to discover who was responsible for the accident.**
| [WATCH EPISODE 33](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b5c74e29a2&e=567664f14c)
---

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b2b7beaad7&e=567664f14c)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Battling corrupt politicians and abusive bureaucrats
body:
We continue to successfully battle against corrupt politicians and abusive Biden administration bureaucrats, and for the rule of law...and new challenges to the rule of law that appear almost daily!

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I very much appreciate your commitment to our country and to our shared conservative values. And I am hopeful you will decide to stand with Judicial Watch now, as we look down the road to 2024.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

That's because it is the support of patriots like you that helps us fight through the legal system _against_ public corruption and _for_ our right to know what our government is up to:

**We continue to successfully battle _against_ corrupt politicians and_ abusive Biden administration bureaucrats, and _for_ the rule of law...and _new_ challenges to the rule of law that appear almost daily!**

[**That 's why I hope you will rejoin us with with a contribution today.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

No one fights _corrupt politicians in both parties_ as hard as Judicial Watch...and no one in Washington matches _our effectiveness or our persistence_.

That is especially critical now with the Biden administration abusing its power _to target conservative Americans who reject the radical Biden agenda_.

Fighting for the rule of law and the American people's "right to know" is why we are aggressively uncovering facts about the **Biden administration 's weaponization of federal agencies** to target and silence conservatives and other political opponents....

...and it's why we are exposing **Biden family influence-peddling** and **Hunter Biden 's** special treatment by the corrupt Biden Justice Department...

...and it's why we're fighting daily (and successfully) to preserve time-tested electoral safeguards and keep our **elections honest.**

[Your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) will help us continue to successfully meet _all_ challenges.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Only Judicial Watch doggedly uses the courts to _successfully_ fight _for_ the rule of law and _agains_ t public corruption and unlawful government secrecy and abuse.

I hope you will decide to help us continue to fight for you, and for the rule of law.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64953&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

subject: Let’s Clean Up Corruption in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/55c89754c646/party-12742868?e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=13323e5cab&e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | **Friend** ,

When I was a Senator, my office often helped constituents navigate challenges before local, state or federal government. Afterward, they would occasionally send us flowers, cookies or a fruit basket. These were nice gestures of gratitude.

But we had to send the gifts back.

Because in New York, we had passed ethics laws meant to eliminate even the appearance of impropriety. Washington sure could use some of those laws.

[Can you donate $10, $25 or $50 today so we can bring real ethics laws to Washington?](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=83ad38e021&e=a6aa651d40)

Congress needs to strengthen financial disclosure requirements so folks like our opponent [Nick LaLota can’t play fast and loose with the rules](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=c90ca47fff&e=a6aa651d40). They need to tighten up regulations about lawful gifts and end this farce of billionaires bankrolling the lifestyles of Supreme Court Justices.

[Send a donation and I’ll fight to hold powerful officials accountable to the people.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=759de8847a&e=a6aa651d40)

Because Americans deserve better.

Sincerely,
Jim
---
|
---
---
| |

name: John Fetterman
subject: Distraction + obstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I won’t let them slow down our fight for working people.
#
Derek, I have a message for the House Republicans threatening to impeach President Biden:
**Go ahead. Do it, I dare you.**
I came to the Senate to make things a bit easier for working folks across PA + the country by fighting for things like a living wage, the Union Way of Life, and protecting LGTBQIA+ equality.
But the House GOP is more concerned with their sham investigation into the President — and sometimes, you just gotta call their bullsh*t.
**[That's what I plan on continuing to do in the Senate with your help. Will you chip in to power our work today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230907-1?refcode=em20230907-1-8548&refcode2=8548_434096_1xMHbj&akid=8548%2E434096%2E1xMHbj)**
I take this job really seriously. But it seems like that's not so true of the House GOP — because nobody would respect this sham impeachment.
**It's a political loser designed to distract + obstruct the real work we have to do.** And they all know it! But while they're trying to grind the government to a halt, I won't let them slow down our fight for working people.
**[I still need everyone in my corner. So if you can, please, help build our people-powered movement by chipping in $5 or whatever you can today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230907-1?refcode=em20230907-1-8548&refcode2=8548_434096_1xMHbj&akid=8548%2E434096%2E1xMHbj)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230907-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230907-8548&refcode2=8548_434096_1xMHbj&akid=8548%2E434096%2E1xMHbj)**
Thank you 🙏
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230907-8548-footer&t=1&refcode2=8548_434096_1xMHbj&akid=8548%2E434096%2E1xMHbj)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: I won’t let them slow down our fight for working people. Derek, I have a message for the House Republicans threatening to impeach President Biden: Go ahead. Do it, I dare you. I came to the Senate to make things a bit easier for working folks across PA + the country by fighting for things like a living wage, the Union Way of Life, and protecting LGTBQIA+ equality. But the House GOP is more concerned with their sham investigation into the President — and sometimes, you just gotta call their bullsht. I take this job really seriously. But it seems like that's not so true of the House GOP — because nobody would respect this sham impeachment. It's a political loser designed to distract + obstruct the real work we have to do. And they all know it! But while they're trying to grind the government to a halt, I won't let them slow down our fight for working people. Thank you 🙏 ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Hey team, it’s Greg.

Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we defied the odds and made history as the only House Democratic campaign to defeat a multiterm Republican incumbent in 2022. _Your support means the world, and we wouldn’t be here without you._

But MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing to take back this seat. We can’t let that happen.

**That’s why today I’m asking for $1. Yes, actually just $1.**

[**This grassroots campaign is powered by folks like you, and we need to raise as much as possible this year to show the strength of our campaign as we head into 2024. $1 may not seem like a lot, but when everyone pitches in, the money adds up. | Grassroots donations of just $7.70 at a time will help us build the foundation of resources we need.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1123%2E35263%2EsUJXNh)
Here’s the truth, Peter: Republicans spent **$77 million** to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin by just one point. After their narrow victory, there’s no telling just how much the GOP will spend to flip Tammy’s seat and take back the Senate this time around. The GOP knows control of the Senate majority could all come down to Wisconsin, Peter — so you can bet dollars to donuts that they’re ready for round two. **It’s going to take all hands on deck to fight back against the GOP and their multi-million dollar campaign war chest.** But instead of calling up right-wing megadonors, Tammy is counting on grassroots support from folks like you to keep pace. name: Fairness Project
subject: Looking back at how far we’ve come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
It’s been a year since the Reproductive Freedom For All campaign was certified for the ballot. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69357219/425896913/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdmZGQxNy1hODRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hf8onC1JEc0h5a8xiesrYnqEX8_puOpdUN7hUZHPT04=&emci=729c41f6-9a4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=547fdd17-a84d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Friend, Today, we’re reminded of just how far we’ve come in our fight for reproductive freedom – one year after the Reproductive Freedom for All campaign was certified for the ballot in Michigan! After the Supreme Court’s 2022 _Dobbs_ decision, people across the country were scared and uncertain of the future for their rights — and Michiganders took action. Since then, the RFFA campaign WON, and **abortion rights were _finally_ codified in Michigan.** This victory was more than just another campaign to add to our win list. **It proved that we have what it takes to defend abortion access at the ballot, including in competitive swing states.** [PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS EVERYWHERE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69357220/425896914/1622098051?&refcode=E4026-20230908-RFFAAnniv-SB-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdmZGQxNy1hODRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hf8onC1JEc0h5a8xiesrYnqEX8_puOpdUN7hUZHPT04=) Wins like this one in Michigan show that people from all walks of life care about reproductive freedom. This can cause a domino effect across the country, and when we put abortion rights on the ballot _we can win!_ **We are still celebrating this huge win, but the work has just begun.** We have more critical reproductive rights campaigns in states like Ohio and Arizona – and our work won’t stop until we protect abortion rights everywhere we can. **[Michigan set a precedent of protecting abortion access, now it’s time to help the rest of the country follow suit. team, will you chip in $15 or more to help us continue to fight for reproductive freedom nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69357221/425896915/1622098051?&refcode=E4026-20230908-RFFAAnniv-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdmZGQxNy1hODRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hf8onC1JEc0h5a8xiesrYnqEX8_puOpdUN7hUZHPT04=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69357222/425896916/-549801322?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4026-20230908-RFFAAnniv-EG-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdmZGQxNy1hODRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hf8onC1JEc0h5a8xiesrYnqEX8_puOpdUN7hUZHPT04=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69357223/425896917/-549801322?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4026-20230908-RFFAAnniv-EG-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdmZGQxNy1hODRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hf8onC1JEc0h5a8xiesrYnqEX8_puOpdUN7hUZHPT04=)**

clean_body: It’s been a year since the Reproductive Freedom For All campaign was certified for the ballot. | | Friend, Today, we’re reminded of just how far we’ve come in our fight for reproductive freedom – one year after the Reproductive Freedom for All campaign was certified for the ballot in Michigan! After the Supreme Court’s 2022 Dobbs decision, people across the country were scared and uncertain of the future for their rights — and Michiganders took action. Since then, the RFFA campaign WON, and abortion rights were finally codified in Michigan. This victory was more than just another campaign to add to our win list. It proved that we have what it takes to defend abortion access at the ballot, including in competitive swing states. = Wins like this one in Michigan show that people from all walks of life care about reproductive freedom. This can cause a domino effect across the country, and when we put abortion rights on the ballot we can win! We are still celebrating this huge win, but the work has just begun. We have more critical reproductive rights campaigns in states like Ohio and Arizona – and our work won’t stop until we protect abortion rights everywhere we can. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your continued support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Peter,

The frustrating part about politics is these career politicians tend to stay in office so long that they lose touch with the people who sent them there in the first place.

That’s exactly what happened to Montana’s liberal U.S. Senator Jon Tester – **who as it happens is also my opponent in the U. S. Senate race.**

For a quarter of a century Senator Tester has spent his life in politics, and that has changed him...

Not only does Jon Tester vote with President Biden’s agenda 91% of the time (**out of 723 votes on nominations and legislation, Sen. Tester has voted against Biden just SIX TIMES**), but he’s also been on the wrong side of some of the most consequential issues:
* **Failing to secure our southern border**
* Supporting radical job-killing Green New Deal policies
* **Permanently protecting the right to an abortion until the moment of birth**
* Killing the Keystone XL pipeline
* Opposing constitutional Supreme Court nominees

Jon Tester has become so out of touch with Montana values that he may as well be New York’s third senator. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69358709/425899922/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230907_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjA2ODVlYTMtYTg0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Axta73k1sTjDnbxtfhiUKdFxXZ5FQbvNjk4bgkC1lzY=)

Rep. Ruben Gallego said it best: “[Arizona is] the barometer and we're symbolic of where this country is going.” It’s true — Arizona is ever changing. New residents are pouring into our state, Maricopa County is the fastest growing county in the country. That’s why it’s critical we stand against the rampant election denialism that remains a threat in Arizona and beyond. Local political figures say it will be the _most critical_ battleground state to watch. But here’s the good news: **Arizona Democrats are outraising the Arizona Republican Party seven to one.** It’s incredible, and we need your help to keep up that momentum. The Arizona Democratic Party is on the front lines of the fight against MAGA extremists in our state — preventing them from banning books, obstructing access to abortion, and limiting the voting rights of disadvantaged communities. To continue to fight back against these concerning attacks, _we need more recurring contributions._ **So, will you help ensure we can continue our fight? From working to codify Roe, reduce healthcare worker shortages, and ensure women have the freedom to decide if and when they want to start a family, Andrea has proven herself as one of the fiercest advocates for reproductive healthcare. And she’s not slowing down anytime soon.

**But these out-of-touch Republicans didn’t account for one major roadblock in their plan to roll back our rights: They’ll have to go through Andrea Salinas.**

From working to codify _Roe_ , reduce healthcare worker shortages, and ensure women have the freedom to decide if and when they want to start a family, Andrea has proven herself as one of the fiercest advocates for reproductive healthcare. And she’s not slowing down anytime soon.

After only eight months in Congress, Andrea’s proven that she’ll never back down from this fight. Not now. Not ever.

And she’s not slowing down anytime soon. = Here’s the deal: Extremist Republicans won’t be satisfied until reproductive healthcare is illegal in every state – including right here in Oregon. But these out-of-touch Republicans didn’t account for one major roadblock in their plan to roll back our rights: They’ll have to go through Andrea Salinas. From working to codify Roe , reduce healthcare worker shortages, and ensure women have the freedom to decide if and when they want to start a family, Andrea has proven herself as one of the fiercest advocates for reproductive healthcare. subject: For Your Eyes Only
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Our national ad is hitting the airwaves. Be the first to see it!
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=81780c23bc&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# For Your Eyes Only
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, Your support has given us so much, and we want to return the favor. We’re rolling out our national campaign ad, and we wanted to give our valued supporters a sneak peek: [**WATCH OUR ADVERTISEMENT HERE**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=f212006be4&e=0be619cbaa) The RNC tried to silence us by keeping us out of the debate, but they can’t stop this ad from appearing in living rooms across the country. [**BUT I NEED YOUR HELP to keep our momentum rolling. Television ads are expensive. The next presidential debate is right around the corner. Every donation, no matter the size, allows more Americans to see this ad and allows us to run more like it. Together, we can share our message of American Restoration with millions of Americans.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=1a02fc4e60&e=0be619cbaa) The RNC kept us out of the last debate, even though we met or exceeded their requirements. We filed a complaint with the FEC to correct this injustice, but we know they’re going to do everything they can to keep us off that next debate stage. I won’t let that happen again. That’s why it’s important that this time, **WE LEAVE NO DOUBT.** **[To qualify for that next debate, we need 50,000 donations, and we need to be at 3 percent in at least two national polls. Your donation, no matter how small, helps us spread the word.](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=e79961b8d3&e=0be619cbaa)** **This election is too important. We can’t let the Democrats ruin our great country like they ruined my home state of California.** I’ve spent my campaign talking to patriots like you all around the country, and it’s increasingly clear that I am the only candidate addressing the issues that you care about. I’m not afraid to discuss the crisis of fatherlessness that’s driving American decline. I have pledged to fire the Soros backed prosecutors letting dangerous criminals roam our streets and destroy our great cities. I’m not afraid to take on those who spread the myth that America is systemically racist. **We filed an FEC action against the RNC** because these issues can’t be ignored. Folks, we’ve got a country to save. We can’t allow the Democrats to win this election and turn this country into California. They are fighting for the special interests and the criminals. I’m fighting for the law abiding, hardworking citizens who make this country the greatest place on earth. I want to keep it that way. **[I want to bring about a new American Golden Age, but I can’t do it without your continued support. Let’s Restore America together!](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bcded5df8b&e=0be619cbaa)** Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: [take action] The unhoused crisis in America is a public health emergency.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We have the power and the money to guarantee housing as a human right, but to do so we need Congress to reorient its priorities. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvVdNQ3nngPm4VgRMEOG6tYeGcOBpaVWPJl2LtevcnwJMm3WLsOT0uoqBakEQIkLOI_pzMh5V41E_qpguUq3qNKeIci7aJj9Azynv5rsuVCs6Sd2Rs5a6KUP1uCARaRwJ-zqbMRpAL0mVA3fEKvl1F9osUfiU1eQBERXXYDqMU-WyoZLzu7KwGZRGrnYUQppwVzoObhFRaZFbzZKCl9n57vEQCM_Dh1krGgJ5DzUJ4n4eYNVZ249UbY5295PCU2cfTsX7GJqxtOfBG3cmNC0zh7g/3ze/mhcl98A5Rwi-uo-8xdEgHg/h0/yKMvAggwbk2xMnkAOwFvywEWpCO0gwSqWShCCq-Rr2A)
---
Friend, The unhoused crisis in America is a public health emergency. **That’s why I’m joining with my sister in service, Rep. Cori Bush, urging Congress to pass the**** _Unhoused Bill of Rights_****.** This resolution would make critical federal investments in homeless assistance programs, affordable housing initiatives, and wraparound services that keep people permanently housed. [**Add your name and become a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Unhoused Bill of Rights_****today to demand Congress act.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I-fr6E2B3NYIl6n6nsHmDGPC5Oi8lK-Z4R_COLaUGLBKqJjI6uOWT3AvSXRpMIW8QixTmtnOxVL-cTz3rtXPAsvV-XJz-imXFAzrAnTUDd15Xs21AflgTOpFnKfc6FxXRa4yaRgpHeKjV6UVA3nRy26A7xz6U4YdYZoNdO2B1430k2BlIce2_wmqTIyM3iOb_eyvuQJ1sTnmZuJKXhiUZrz1AyXfFXzxd1lIef7q2vuvFCeZKqKRBB8kSXLyc6NJUcH-XLGXqNegeJOmLYXM97O63SOrQwfw546zGsJm_l4u2QTgVhoDkIqRBrWG8UIjN0UjqR-oJVRJR6P7rWMxUbC6DeZ3nMrhyBulLtJ4C_7a5fAfVARMXLb4mzGPQ9jL9R0u8Q_1BS6lrz0QSQXyuEIRdhYzavLob3InfvTvEsoZYmli_sGQY3_Mo0ZTF7tE66AkfqrT7n9DDPG-DuKaB0TAALdPkY6GOdSdSx2JSr_DlP--A/3ze/mhcl98A5Rwi-uo-8xdEgHg/h1/M4rsvZU2yrWGEam0LXYCbTuQVc-5B9pAik3TVNUTRKw) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I-fr6E2B3NYIl6n6nsHmDGPC5Oi8lK-Z4R_COLaUGLBKqJjI6uOWT3AvSXRpMIW8QixTmtnOxVL-cTz3rtXPAsvV-XJz-imXFAzrAnTUDd15Xs21AflgTOpFnKfc6FxXRa4yaRgpHeKjV6UVA3nRy26A7xz6U4YdYZoNdO2B1430k2BlIce2_wmqTIyM3iOb_eyvuQJ1sTnmZuJKXhiUZrz1AyXNFFuo-prNk9DPPbGZVcj-rQ5klenzWPU3MA9UXBjhuditZjnTYX62-MycbjO4L60HINGnLr7PDeK4HEEuRYXCiT9nl3JUvcNXnc7SDZYHe0zZzxR8hEEtHlf7G7DgJXaJ2e2j2exBJDFqy3x59hWEYBbdRXTLLJvVrjl705PdBBKr2S_ow0f4dDMJLE2TNZUfhFUv3P9H9U3BeU9FsL8lG_47RGilw-QHXl0ZrB1F0Bl8mGGvcoaLgeiTIPXMSH7-WxeQyaIzHogfSxNm3sMKw/3ze/mhcl98A5Rwi-uo-8xdEgHg/h2/8E2md2bdBRgseKa9NlO2qF0qx7dktx_Sjpf4Qx8l5p4)
---
This is urgent. **With rising rental costs rapidly outpacing wages, more and more families are forced to live on the streets, where they are criminalized and dehumanized.**

Now the far-right is demonizing unhoused people for not being able to afford housing. But we know that **everyone deserves a safe place to live, and housing is a human right.**
We have the resources to permanently end the unhoused crisis. We just need the political will to make it happen.
**The**** _Unhoused Bill of Rights_****will:**
* Provide a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027 by drastically increasing the affordable housing stock, providing universal housing vouchers, and bolstering funding to federal housing programs, shelters, transitional and permanent housing programs, social services, and permanent emergency rental assistance;
* Call on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency;
* Protect unhoused individuals from the violation of their fundamental human rights to housing, health care, livable wages, education, employment opportunities, access to public facilities, and freedom from harassment by law enforcement, private businesses, property owners, and housed residents;
* Support historic federal funding levels for state and local governments to provide 24-hour support for unhoused people, including: shelters, transitional housing programs, supportive services, public restrooms, hand-washing stations, showers, laundry facilities, and water fountains in coordination with grassroots and community-led organizations;
* Develop holistic, health-based, and non-carceral solutions to the unhoused crisis in coordination with the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), community-led organizations, and unhoused advocates from a health-based approach that addresses both the unhoused and public health crises.

[**We have the power and the money to guarantee housing as a human right, but to do so we need Congress to reorient its priorities. Click here to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Unhoused Bill of Rights_****and demand Congress take action to secure housing for those in need.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuS2wP78g8snemAOnz1tBEMhhxF3hGlBZJ_p5n6I-fr6E2B3NYIl6n6nsHmDGPC5Oi8lK-Z4R_COLaUGLBKqJjI6uOWT3AvSXRpMIW8QixTmtnOxVL-cTz3rtXPAsvV-XJz-imXFAzrAnTUDd15Xs21AflgTOpFnKfc6FxXRa4yaRgpHeKjV6UVA3nRy26A7xz6U4YdYZoNdO2B1430k2BlIce2_wmqTIyM3iOb_eyvuQJ1sTnmZuJKXhiUZrz1AyX38jSlKWynzHGit_B-E2BSwxagjFOUYuljMklfcXKN73g3mCk-Jl12UoJdyswZXZSsiOsEIFWWGP7ARYhLz3_3NRDc4Tahy_A3QdIZNIADowFTAnHMofCipNE3SBu7anmVIUn9cQskAhJlnhyW0PeXjn9PkRBdm6USFir1MYKBSmBqzt8Zg85_O00qq5Aubolk6k9FPAenov4iQ6rE3geuJQgf6rE4TgitrYVrzKYueQ-m8PFvEYGXdNrCgdVbmL9KJi030-5Q1oBwbH69QATog/3ze/mhcl98A5Rwi-uo-8xdEgHg/h3/CPOFGyD-ivU9f_RghqHsYR84v8JPl4InC3PfAjt6vcw)
Together, we’re fighting for housing justice, and for the rights of marginalized people everywhere.
Always serving you,
Rashida

clean_body: We have the power and the money to guarantee housing as a human right, but to do so we need Congress to reorient its priorities. | | | Friend, The unhoused crisis in America is a public health emergency. That’s why I’m joining with my sister in service, Rep. Cori Bush, urging Congress to pass the Unhoused Bill of Rights. This resolution would make critical federal investments in homeless assistance programs, affordable housing initiatives, and wraparound services that keep people permanently housed. | This is urgent. With rising rental costs rapidly outpacing wages, more and more families are forced to live on the streets, where they are criminalized and dehumanized. Now the far-right is demonizing unhoused people for not being able to afford housing. But we know that everyone deserves a safe place to live, and housing is a human right. We have the resources to permanently end the unhoused crisis. We just need the political will to make it happen. The Unhoused Bill of Rightswill: Provide a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027 by drastically increasing the affordable housing stock, providing universal housing vouchers, and bolstering funding to federal housing programs, shelters, transitional and permanent housing programs, social services, and permanent emergency rental assistance; Call on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency; Protect unhoused individuals from the violation of their fundamental human rights to housing, health care, livable wages, education, employment opportunities, access to public facilities, and freedom from harassment by law enforcement, private businesses, property owners, and housed residents; Support historic federal funding levels for state and local governments to provide 24-hour support for unhoused people, including: shelters, transitional housing programs, supportive services, public restrooms, hand-washing stations, showers, laundry facilities, and water fountains in coordination with grassroots and community-led organizations; Develop holistic, health-based, and non-carceral solutions to the unhoused crisis in coordination with the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), community-led organizations, and unhoused advocates from a health-based approach that addresses both the unhoused and public health crises. Together, we’re fighting for housing justice, and for the rights of marginalized people everywhere. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join General Stanley McChrystal and Patrick Murphy Monday September 11th
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
Join General Stanley McChrystal and Patrick Murphy
Friend,
This Monday is the 22nd Anniversary of 9/11. That tragic day changed all of our lives. After 20 years of war, it's time for us to start defining the Post 9/11 Generation – what I refer to as 'Generation Grit'. I was hoping you can join me and some of the extraordinary leaders this Monday for an hour – you can hear from one our generation's best 'Battle Captains' Gen. (R) Stanley McChrystal, Ms. Dawn Halfaker, and I on Monday, September 11, at 2:00 pm for a Drexel Hamilton virtual webinar on the veteran's experience: empowering successful post 9/11 veterans with lessons learned.
Register for the Webinar Here: https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_TjL5sTVOTXSG1Qd0EfnPuQ#/registration [https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_TjL5sTVOTXSG1Qd0EfnPuQ#/registration]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/image003.png]
Yours in the fight,
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
https://www.patrickjmurphy.com/ [https://www.patrickjmurphy.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA [https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA] https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA [https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA] https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa [https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa] https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa [https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa]

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I won’t sit on the sidelines
body:
| | | **Joe Biden promised peace and civility. Instead, he delivered the exact opposite.** America is now more divided than _ever_. Global instability and uncertainty reign both here at home and across the globe. War ravages Ukraine and Russia threatens to bring chaos to all of Europe. On Joe Biden’s watch, violent criminal cartels have taken over our southern border, the economy is in shambles, and millions of Americans struggle to pay for basic necessities because of “Bidenflation.” Meanwhile, Biden’s ineptitude on the world stage has dragged down America from the Leader of the Free World to an impotent bystander watching global events unfurl. _**[Joe Biden’s America Last policies and failure to lead have made America a mockery on the world stage.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b46e3195a1ac4afd9d4cb39d310838e6&_e=Tn8SX22VcWGTk2GBU_5o5LIqn7gakZnitmgELA6R7Oabnz9DcPI-ngmaITtCRmBiMGJ7s07dvDlnvZ1bms6ZbHoVdMO_mzRNd_8fNg_cK9-vQQJ-NnlSa0pASc3gKLH2-w_AhgsJ815vNvB_4p4OG7RgsSfs-PJTuP4V4KcqsvP_eXmNUyIaWXKolhmB_2dCGmN6m7UJcUMFIfEauG4GoAeYWRzz-2j4OUFoJo5Xdh8NNwFx4T_ogSv74msTbrg4rlHG-g7gPGJXWtis0IFEVsU2dtjSbFvLmObMiReNWjoZoNnVsu6Bu9JeGAs0sShPo_aS-pmUffiC1MyWhGCL21haUF-KF6DJdu0a4ZIemnw6TIu86FmkEZAxQFuBFzP9)**_ Unlike Joe Biden, I won’t sit on the sidelines and watch the danger to America, and frankly the world, grow greater day by day. _And now, I’m counting on you to fight beside me. _ You see, the Federal Election Commission has raised the maximum contribution limit by **14%.**** ** That means liberal mega-donors like George Soros can pour even more money into defeating America First Republican Congressmen like me. To win reelection here in Florida, I’m going to have to lean on grassroots patriots like you more than ever. Please don’t lay this message aside without first responding to my plea for help. ** [I truly need you on my team.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b46e3195a1ac4afd9d4cb39d310838e6&_e=Tn8SX22VcWGTk2GBU_5o5LIqn7gakZnitmgELA6R7Oabnz9DcPI-ngmaITtCRmBiMGJ7s07dvDlnvZ1bms6ZbHoVdMO_mzRNd_8fNg_cK9-vQQJ-NnlSa0pASc3gKLH2-w_AhgsJ815vNvB_4p4OG7RgsSfs-PJTuP4V4KcqsvP_eXmNUyIaWXKolhmB_2dCGmN6m7UJcUMFIfEauG4GoAeYWRzz-2j4OUFoJo5Xdh-0L7_0jf3Ft274Mh-9AjD5oqS1eWcq2hwRzy-Nof8VUS89pB1m3u9lsSq2Gm2NfLFaXGuW6i3NNMdKaoHylu2JzzRvggSN4NqwHgLHJJ3ArfNOsh_6F_Kp8ZVUgOLF6EjLrYs-5heUwPQ7WnKQtKxZ)**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

| | Peter, It's been a summer of unprecedented climate crises — from a hurricane in Palm Springs, to deadly wildfires blazing across the Pacific Northwest and the Island of Maui, to extremely flooding through the Las Vegas Strip — these events serve as grim warnings of the increasingly dangerous climate crisis. **As too many politicians rely on shallow victories and empty rhetoric in the fight to protect our environment, our communities are paying the price.** Here in California, droughts are getting more frequent, aggravating an already dangerous water crisis. As climate change worsens, we're at an increased risk of wildfires, severe storms, and other extreme weather. _It's not just future generations, but people living with climate change today, who are counting on bold leadership on the climate crisis from our representatives._ That's why I cut through red tape to get shade sails installed at our schools to shield our kids from extreme heat. And it's why I'll do whatever it takes in Congress to reduce our carbon emissions and speed our transition to a clean energy economy. Because we don't need leaders who want change someday, Peter. We need leaders who'll fight for it _today_. [**Our communities can't afford anything less than a concerted and courageous effort to curb climate change's effects before it's too late. body:
shortest email in your inbox, guaranteed

| Hi Peter, it’s Emily from Team UTS.

I noticed that last month you started the process of submitting a donation to renew your President Biden membership** _... but you never finished._**

**We expect our most loyal Democrats to feel a sense of pride in helping us report to the big guys (President Biden and VP Harris) that we got the job done.**

Ron DeSantis just held back-to-back fundraisers in Pennsylvania and reportedly raised **$400,000.**

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
The Arizona Supreme Court has agreed to hear a petition about a 1864 law that would jail doctors and ban virtually all abortions.
https://www.tucsonsentinel.com/local/report/082523_abortion_roundtable/tucson-area-leaders-fear-future-abortion-rights/ [https://www.tucsonsentinel.com/local/report/082523_abortion_roundtable/tucson-area-leaders-fear-future-abortion-rights/]
Abortions are already banned after 15 weeks in Arizona. Women are being forced to travel out of state and spend thousands of dollars to get the medical care they need. And this could just be the start.
If this archaic law is implemented, it would be devastating for our state.
This ban was written and passed 55 years before women won the right to vote. Now, 150 years later, it could be determining the most private medical decisions they make.
Kirsten is unapologetically pro-choice. Politicians shouldn't be inserting themselves into the intimate decisions made by a woman with her doctor, full stop. It's a violation of our most basic rights.
We need our elected officials to protect the right to choose nationwide now . That's why we put together a petition calling on Congress to take action. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_082123_ConOpEd_act]
Our basic freedoms are under attack. It's up to Congress must defend abortion rights across the country. Will you join our call by adding your name now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FizpfCpYpk-IPWyStUx-mQ2]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FizpfCpYpk-IPWyStUx-mQ2]
Thank you so much,
— Team Engel

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090723_AZAbortion_act]

name: HER Time
subject: A real shot at codifying the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69367300/425909581/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230907_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDdmNmY1MGUtYjA0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7WT1mgIaiQc5wcNDUHq6q3juszQsbW6izXd8x3E5JQ=)
---
Have you seen the news, Peter? A group of Congressional women have introduced a joint resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after 100 years. The Equal Rights Amendment would guarantee equal rights under the law regardless of sex. The vast majority of Americans support this amendment, and it’s been ratified by the required 38 states needed to amend the Constitution. Now, this resolution recently introduced in Congress would circumvent the arbitrary deadline set many years ago so we could FINALLY see equal rights under the law — a game changer for reproductive rights and gender equality. [_**We’ll need a flood of support to see this passed through Congress. clean_body: | = Have you seen the news, Peter? A group of Congressional women have introduced a joint resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after 100 years. The Equal Rights Amendment would guarantee equal rights under the law regardless of sex. The vast majority of Americans support this amendment, and it’s been ratified by the required 38 states needed to amend the Constitution. Now, this resolution recently introduced in Congress would circumvent the arbitrary deadline set many years ago so we could FINALLY see equal rights under the law — a game changer for reproductive rights and gender equality. | This is a huge moment, team. We’re grateful to have you on board for it. — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

# [EXCLUSIVE: Ron DeSantis Fabricated GOP Debate Story About Meeting Texas "Angel Mom", Falsely Claims Gold Star Mother's Son Died From Taking Drugs Laced With Fentanyl ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=136816193&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2ODE2MTkzLCJpYXQiOjE2OTQxMTMwNDEsImV4cCI6MTY5NjcwNTA0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JJ4HjaxnGp7jjCB3fiC5KfAVcOf-fAwYFcsW4z7QAWw)
