[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Zv_QJlCjEQpZmYYaddUM2Ad0ZXrh2D3IGemnooazb-k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=136816193)
A Texas Gold Star mother is blowing the whistle on what she says is a bold face lie about her family, and her son, which was told by Governor Ron DeSantis during the first GOP Presidential debate for the 2024 cycle.
Tracy La Porte is a Gold Star mother in Texas whose son, Sergeant Adam "2Step" Huckstep- La Porte tragically passed away at the young age of 23 years old on February 1, 2012, in Georgia after his motorcycle was struck by an oncoming driver who was illegally driving a rented vehicle with a suspended license.
Tracy La Porte says that during the first US Presidential debate in Milwaukee, Wisconsin on August 23, 2023, she believes Ron DeSantis used her name without her permission to score political points with Angel Moms when asked about his border policy, and in the process, she says DeSantis butchered the facts surrounding the tragic loss of her son, and lied about her son by falsely claiming her son died from taking fentanyl, which caused Tracy and her family an avalanche of pain and emotional trauma directly following the debate.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/391ea20a-2c18-4bf6-af11-cb5bd5fdfe37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During the debate, which was hosted by Fox News, Fox News host and debate moderator Martha MacCallum asked GOP Presidential candidate Ron DeSantis the following question:
> "So, as president, would you support sending US Special Forces over the border into Mexico to take out Fentanyl labs, to take out drug cartel operations? Would you support that kind of American military use."
DeSantis responded to the question by saying:
> **" Yes, and I will do it on day one. Here's the thing. The cartels are killing tens of thousands of our fellow citizens. You want to talk about a country in decline? You have the cartels controlling a lot of parts of your Southern border.**
> **We have to reestablish the rule of law, and we have to defend our people. The President of the United States has got to use all available powers as Commander in Chief to protect our country and to protect the people.**
> **So, when they 're coming across, yes, we're going to use lethal force. Yes, we reserve the right to operate. How many more tens of thousands are we going to let to die? I am sick. I have met Angel Moms throughout this country.**
> _**I met a lady in Texas named Tracy.**_****_**And her son took one Percocet that was laced with fentanyl, and he immediately died.**_**That is happening all across this country because of the poison that they are bringing in. So, as President, would I use force? Would I treat them as foreign terrorist organizations? You 're darn right I would."**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e791af37-3e91-414e-bbbf-466239a571f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tracy exclusively told me that although she was not watching the GOP debate live when DeSantis invoked her name on the debate stage, she immediately received a barrage of phone calls and text messages from Texas lawmakers and fellow Gold Star moms and Angel Moms in Texas, asking her why DeSantis was claiming her son died from a Fentanyl overdose, when he was actually killed on active duty within hours of his second deployment to Afghanistan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d163b779-864e-4402-9468-d33015983c53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At the time of his death, Adam was stationed at Fort Stewart, Georgia, and he was assigned to Bravo Company, 1st Battalion, 64th Armor Regiment, 3rd Infantry Division. Adam was buried at the Dallas-Fort Worth National Veterans Cemetery. In the days before he tragically passed away, Adam was preparing to leave for Afghanistan in support of Operation Enduring Freedom as an infantryman/gunner.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef8baefd-3f8d-4212-9db1-91fb12df2e89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It should be noted that Sgt Huckstep- La Porte was awarded the Army Good Conduct Medal, two Army Achievement Medals, the Army Commendation Medal, the National Defense Service Medal, the Iraqi Campaign Medal, the Global War on Terrorism Service Medal, the Army Service Ribbon, the Army Overseas Service Ribbon and The Non-Commissioned Officer Professional Development Ribbon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8b74a324-22b0-4ff4-9ba8-a3084af3f4f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tracy's son was a dedicated member of the military, and was most definitely not a drug user or a drug addict. However, Tracy explained that because she is so active in the Gold Star mom community, she has also become close with many Angel Moms, even though she herself is not an Angel Mom. She also said that she is very outspoken in the need to close our borders because her cousin did die from a fentanyl overdose after taking one Percocet that was laced with fentanyl. Tracy said that throughout her legislative efforts, she often times referenced that she has had family members die from taking Fentanyl.
In an effort to court Angel Moms, DeSantis appears to have used and misrepresented a personal story from a Gold Star mother who told me she has never spoken to Ron DeSantis and has never met DeSantis. Not only did DeSantis lie about meeting Tracy, and not only did he lie about the cause of her son's death, but he falsely stated that Tracy is an Angel mom.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd2a1c2e-9b3e-4381-b2f2-3818eb472aa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tracy said the messages she received in the days and weeks after the debate made her sick to her stomach as she was not only forced to relive the death of her 23 year old son, but also the death of her cousin and other family members.
In an exclusive statement, Tracy said,
> "It is actually sick that I have already lost a son which created a hole in my heart that can never be repaired. DeSantis's comments ripped open those wounds and I have had to relive trauma that I already relive everyday. It also caused me to have to defend my son, my credibility, and the facts around how my son was killed as I have been using his story to try to create a law called The 2Step Act."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/504a42f8-539c-4ba3-83cb-5dc315c3ad3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Following her son's tragic death, Tracy was inspired to advocate for policy changes in the state of Texas as a way to prevent other people from dying at the hands of illegal drivers. Tracy drafted what she calls "The 2Step Act" in an effort to get legislation on the books to force rental car agencies to validate driver's licenses before handing over the keys to a car that can be used as a weapon or for illegal transport.
She says many people are unaware of the fact that Rental Car Companies can rent to anyone without a requirement to run driver's licenses to ensure they are valid. She believes that if the renter of the vehicle that slammed into her son's motorcycle and killed him would have been screened at the time of renting the vehicle, her son would still be alive today because the driver of the vehicle was not supposed to be driving. The driver who killed Tracy's son had a physical license, but at the time of the accident, their license was revoked and not valid.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Zv_QJlCjEQpZmYYaddUM2Ad0ZXrh2D3IGemnooazb-k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136816193)
Living in Texas, Tracy says a lot of people are killed by not only illegal drivers, but also by illegal aliens who are not licensed to be driving vehicles. However, because there isn't a national law requiring rental car companies to check whether or not a renter has a valid license, she says many illegal aliens who are crossing into our country via the open, porous US-Mexico border in Texas have been able to rent vehicles, and kill people while driving illegally and also transporting and trafficking humans and fentanyl in cars, illegally.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b714f80f-88bd-4e25-ba02-8957a51c6b16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For this reason, Tracy has formed close alliances with Angel Moms. Angel Moms are mothers whose children were killed by illegal aliens. While Tracy herself is not an Angel mom, she is however a Gold Star mother and is a member of an Angel family since her cousin [Javier Vega Jr, a US Border Patrol agent, was murdered by two illegal aliens ](https://substack.com/redirect/6fa0f548-36a0-4d3c-93cb-a23874c81ea1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)who shot and killed him on August 3, 2014 during a robbery while he was fishing with his wife, children, and parents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18c6cf30-2049-4e8d-9acb-c781e146697d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to one memorial posted in Adam's honor,
> "Adam served his country with distinction during the Iraqi Sovereignty campaign in Tikrit and was preparing for his second deployment later this year, this time to Afghanistan."
Along with the horror of her son being falsely branded as a Fentanyl user on stage by a GOP Presidential candidate during a LIVE televised Presidential debate, Tracy said DeSantis's claims were so reckless that they could have damaged her credibility with Texas state legislators and lawmakers in her effort to get "The 2Step Act passed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2fa37e51-5c45-4937-9da9-10fe2aa82817?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On May 9, 2013, the [Texas Senate passed resolution No. 866](https://substack.com/redirect/6493b4f0-a465-4a41-b9de-ec4b9123e1ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in memory of Adam Huckstep- La Porte, in which they recognized his service to the United States and the fact that he died on Active Duty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b83a6005-45f1-4a35-b2d7-ff9d1e91a0dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tracy La Porte, Adams mother, said her son's patriotism made him join the US army in 2008, and is what inspired her to found Military Moms of Texas, an organization committed to supporting American troops serving at home and abroad. She said her son's nickname was "2Step" while growing up in Roundrock, Texas. For this reason, she decides to name her legislation ["The 2Step Act". ](https://substack.com/redirect/e276da8f-a914-42eb-a102-92189100be5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f2605dd4-31ac-4cde-8f29-ff5f8666b9e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After DeSantis used Tracy's name and created a whirlwind of pain for her family by lying about her son's cause of death and lying about meeting Tracy, numerous media outlets including Breitbart News and Epoch Times ran articles about how Ron DeSantis mentioned Angel Moms during the Presidential debate. However, nobody bothered to fact check Ron's story about "Tracy" from Texas who he said was an Angel Mom. Tracy is not an Angel Mom. She is a Gold Star mom. And yet nobody bothered to investigate DeSantis's dishonest claim that he made in an effort to win over support from Angel Moms across the country and convince Angel Moms to vote for him instead of President Trump.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Zv_QJlCjEQpZmYYaddUM2Ad0ZXrh2D3IGemnooazb-k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136816193)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d89fe171-d5cd-4da0-ad02-f63790f14b44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac51dbc2-2f41-4c24-8980-c4da3c1eca08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Additionally, one day after the Presidential debate, Tracy said she posted a tweet on her Twitter account @ 2stepAct about how she has the transcripts from the debate and would like to go public about how Ron DeSantis used her name and story without her permission. She said she tagged me and President Trump in the tweet, and hours later, she was banned from Twitter. In a message, Twitter said her account was banned for "manipulating and interfering in elections."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b886d0fe-c9a0-4d58-921c-4b37c01783a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4286e542-3b85-4b39-9ccf-de812c3f0c9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While it is unknown who ultimately banned Tracy's account after she publicly tweeted that she wanted to go public about DeSantis, in May 2023, Twitter's owner [Elon Musk hosted a Twitter Space for Ron DeSantis](https://substack.com/redirect/a37e2cdb-1c37-4255-9293-5a45287e205b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on May 23, 2023, which is the same day DeSantis officially kicked off his 2024 Presidential campaign. [Musk is also on the record previously stating that he would support Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign.](https://substack.com/redirect/da28af3e-78b5-45fd-be13-688240e6a530?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Unlike Ron DeSantis, President Trump doesn't need to lie about meeting with Angel moms, he doesn't fabricate elements of stories to score political points, he doesn't disrespect Gold Star families, and he certainly never used Tracy's story for political gain.
Tracy LaPorte says this experience has fortified her support for President Trump and makes her realize Ron DeSantis is not fit to serve as President.
> "While DeSantis uses moms for political gain, President Trump was working with me on a federal level to propose the The 2Step Act to the Federal Transportation Department. President Trump immediately recognized me as a Gold Star mother and took the time to write me directly out of respect, care, and compassion. He never once used me or my story on a debate stage or anywhere. His respect and care for a Gold Star mother made me feel like he was a family member who cared for me, my son, and our country by recognizing the fact that what had happened to my son while he was on active duty was a National Security Risk everywhere. President Trump validated that he cares about our troops, and that my son mattered."
Tracy said she didn't want to have to go public with her story and the letter that President Trump sent her in 2020, but she said she now feels compelled to do so after DeSantis lied to the nation by invoking her name, her dead son, and her dead cousin for political gain.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Zv_QJlCjEQpZmYYaddUM2Ad0ZXrh2D3IGemnooazb-k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136816193)
According to Tracy, President Trump sent her a letter while he was President. Tracy provided me with a copy of the letter President Trump sent her on July 27, 2020.
In the letter seen below, President Trump wrote,
> "I am especially grateful you took the time to share your thoughts on issues currently facing our country. You son's death is a tragedy, and no parent should ever undergo the incredible heartbreak you have experienced. Please know that I have shared your proposal, the 2StepACT, with the appropriate Federal Agency."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e8a2310-3164-4e28-82d3-2fee89199dfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When Tracy's son died on February 1, 2012, , she received a generic letter from President Obama with a Presidential Seal, but it was not a personalized, and did not contain a hand signed letter. Tracy's son died during the Obama administration, which is worth noting since President Trump was not obligated to send her anything since her son didn't die with he was Commander in Chief. However, he took the time to write Tracy a personalized letter and he assured her that he would pass her proposal for the 2Step Act along to officials in his administration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1f69ff5-7f93-4d49-955f-c8119588314a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tracy said when President Trump's term ended in 2021, it ended the federal progress she was hoping to have with regards to passing The 2StepACT on a federal level.
Tracy said,
> "When President Trump left office, I had to start all over and rebuild in Texas and form relationships with Texas lawmakers. This is one reason why I want Trump back in office, and why our country needs him back in office. Unlike Ron DeSantis, President Trump knows what a Gold Star mother is and he recognizes their loss of a child for our country's freedom. President Trump is the only politician who immediately recognized the national security risk that is created by Rental Car Agencies not vetting the licenses and legal status of drivers who attempt to rent vehicles. I always say that the wrong people are well aware of the fact that there is a loophole because Rental Car agencies don't conduct DMV checks to make sure all drivers are legal."
When asked what she wants from Ron DeSantis, Tracy said,
> "He needs to get more educated on what a Gold Star mother is, and what an Angel mom is. As a veteran himself, of all people, DeSantis should know what a Gold Star mom is and he should know that it is inappropriate and hurtful to exploit our dead service members and the dead children of Gold Star Parents for political gain. That is an open wound forever, and poking that wound is like ripping a mother's heart open. I think Ron DeSantis needs to apologize to me and correct the record on my son as an exemplary, well-decorated combat soldier who served our nation for our freedoms."
Tracy added that the only politician who has permission to use her story and her name as an example is President Donald Trump, because she says he's "the only one who cared enough to actually hear and understand the facts of my story."
**To learn more about "The 2StepACT", visit: [https://2stepact.com/](https://substack.com/redirect/e276da8f-a914-42eb-a102-92189100be5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

clean_body: The absentee Governor of Florida has been caught distorting the truth about a Gold Star Mother who says she has never even met Governor DeSantis and is accusing him of lying about her son's death. | | ---|---|--- | | | ? ? The absentee Governor of Florida has been caught distorting the truth about a Gold Star Mother who says she has never even met Governor DeSantis and is accusing him of lying about her son's death. | | | Sep 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please consider upgrading your for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. A Texas Gold Star mother is blowing the whistle on what she says is a bold face lie about her family, and her son, which was told by Governor Ron DeSantis during the first GOP Presidential debate for the 2024 cycle. Tracy La Porte is a Gold Star mother in Texas whose son, Sergeant Adam "2Step" Huckstep- La Porte tragically passed away at the young age of 23 years old on February 1, 2012, in Georgia after his motorcycle was struck by an oncoming driver who was illegally driving a rented vehicle with a suspended license. Tracy La Porte says that during the first US Presidential debate in Milwaukee, Wisconsin on August 23, 2023, she believes Ron DeSantis used her name without her permission to score political points with Angel Moms when asked about his border policy, and in the process, she says DeSantis butchered the facts surrounding the tragic loss of her son, and lied about her son by falsely claiming her son died from taking fentanyl, which caused Tracy and her family an avalanche of pain and emotional trauma directly following the debate. During the debate, which was hosted by Fox News, Fox News host and debate moderator Martha MacCallum asked GOP Presidential candidate Ron DeSantis the following question: "So, as president, would you support sending US Special Forces over the border into Mexico to take out Fentanyl labs, to take out drug cartel operations? Would you support that kind of American military use." DeSantis responded to the question by saying: " Yes, and I will do it on day one. Here's the thing. The cartels are killing tens of thousands of our fellow citizens. You want to talk about a country in decline? You have the cartels controlling a lot of parts of your Southern border. We have to reestablish the rule of law, and we have to defend our people. The President of the United States has got to use all available powers as Commander in Chief to protect our country and to protect the people. So, when they 're coming across, yes, we're going to use lethal force. Yes, we reserve the right to operate. How many more tens of thousands are we going to let to die? I am sick. I have met Angel Moms throughout this country. I met a lady in Texas named Tracy.**And her son took one Percocet that was laced with fentanyl, and he immediately died.That is happening all across this country because of the poison that they are bringing in. So, as President, would I use force? Would I treat them as foreign terrorist organizations? You 're darn right I would." | | ---|---|--- Tracy exclusively told me that although she was not watching the GOP debate live when DeSantis invoked her name on the debate stage, she immediately received a barrage of phone calls and text messages from Texas lawmakers and fellow Gold Star moms and Angel Moms in Texas, asking her why DeSantis was claiming her son died from a Fentanyl overdose, when he was actually killed on active duty within hours of his second deployment to Afghanistan. | | ---|---|--- At the time of his death, Adam was stationed at Fort Stewart, Georgia, and he was assigned to Bravo Company, 1st Battalion, 64th Armor Regiment, 3rd Infantry Division. Adam was buried at the Dallas-Fort Worth National Veterans Cemetery. In the days before he tragically passed away, Adam was preparing to leave for Afghanistan in support of Operation Enduring Freedom as an infantryman/gunner. | | ---|---|--- It should be noted that Sgt Huckstep- La Porte was awarded the Army Good Conduct Medal, two Army Achievement Medals, the Army Commendation Medal, the National Defense Service Medal, the Iraqi Campaign Medal, the Global War on Terrorism Service Medal, the Army Service Ribbon, the Army Overseas Service Ribbon and The Non-Commissioned Officer Professional Development Ribbon. | | ---|---|--- Tracy's son was a dedicated member of the military, and was most definitely not a drug user or a drug addict. However, Tracy explained that because she is so active in the Gold Star mom community, she has also become close with many Angel Moms, even though she herself is not an Angel Mom. She also said that she is very outspoken in the need to close our borders because her cousin did die from a fentanyl overdose after taking one Percocet that was laced with fentanyl. Tracy said that throughout her legislative efforts, she often times referenced that she has had family members die from taking Fentanyl. In an effort to court Angel Moms, DeSantis appears to have used and misrepresented a personal story from a Gold Star mother who told me she has never spoken to Ron DeSantis and has never met DeSantis. Not only did DeSantis lie about meeting Tracy, and not only did he lie about the cause of her son's death, but he falsely stated that Tracy is an Angel mom. | | ---|---|--- Tracy said the messages she received in the days and weeks after the debate made her sick to her stomach as she was not only forced to relive the death of her 23 year old son, but also the death of her cousin and other family members. In an exclusive statement, Tracy said, "It is actually sick that I have already lost a son which created a hole in my heart that can never be repaired. DeSantis's comments ripped open those wounds and I have had to relive trauma that I already relive everyday. It also caused me to have to defend my son, my credibility, and the facts around how my son was killed as I have been using his story to try to create a law called The 2Step Act." | | ---|---|--- Following her son's tragic death, Tracy was inspired to advocate for policy changes in the state of Texas as a way to prevent other people from dying at the hands of illegal drivers. Tracy drafted what she calls "The 2Step Act" in an effort to get legislation on the books to force rental car agencies to validate driver's licenses before handing over the keys to a car that can be used as a weapon or for illegal transport. She says many people are unaware of the fact that Rental Car Companies can rent to anyone without a requirement to run driver's licenses to ensure they are valid. She believes that if the renter of the vehicle that slammed into her son's motorcycle and killed him would have been screened at the time of renting the vehicle, her son would still be alive today because the driver of the vehicle was not supposed to be driving. The driver who killed Tracy's son had a physical license, but at the time of the accident, their license was revoked and not valid. Living in Texas, Tracy says a lot of people are killed by not only illegal drivers, but also by illegal aliens who are not licensed to be driving vehicles. However, because there isn't a national law requiring rental car companies to check whether or not a renter has a valid license, she says many illegal aliens who are crossing into our country via the open, porous US-Mexico border in Texas have been able to rent vehicles, and kill people while driving illegally and also transporting and trafficking humans and fentanyl in cars, illegally. | | ---|---|--- For this reason, Tracy has formed close alliances with Angel Moms. Angel Moms are mothers whose children were killed by illegal aliens. While Tracy herself is not an Angel mom, she is however a Gold Star mother and is a member of an Angel family since her cousin shot and killed him on August 3, 2014 during a robbery while he was fishing with his wife, children, and parents. | | ---|---|--- According to one memorial posted in Adam's honor, "Adam served his country with distinction during the Iraqi Sovereignty campaign in Tikrit and was preparing for his second deployment later this year, this time to Afghanistan." Along with the horror of her son being falsely branded as a Fentanyl user on stage by a GOP Presidential candidate during a LIVE televised Presidential debate, Tracy said DeSantis's claims were so reckless that they could have damaged her credibility with Texas state legislators and lawmakers in her effort to get "The 2Step Act passed. | | ---|---|--- On May 9, 2013, the , in memory of Adam Huckstep- La Porte, in which they recognized his service to the United States and the fact that he died on Active Duty. | | ---|---|--- Tracy La Porte, Adams mother, said her son's patriotism made him join the US army in 2008, and is what inspired her to found Military Moms of Texas, an organization committed to supporting American troops serving at home and abroad. She said her son's nickname was "2Step" while growing up in Roundrock, Texas. For this reason, she decides to name her legislation | | ---|---|--- After DeSantis used Tracy's name and created a whirlwind of pain for her family by lying about her son's cause of death and lying about meeting Tracy, numerous media outlets including Breitbart News and Epoch Times ran articles about how Ron DeSantis mentioned Angel Moms during the Presidential debate. However, nobody bothered to fact check Ron's story about "Tracy" from Texas who he said was an Angel Mom. Tracy is not an Angel Mom. She is a Gold Star mom. And yet nobody bothered to investigate DeSantis's dishonest claim that he made in an effort to win over support from Angel Moms across the country and convince Angel Moms to vote for him instead of President Trump. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Additionally, one day after the Presidential debate, Tracy said she posted a tweet on her Twitter account @ 2stepAct about how she has the transcripts from the debate and would like to go public about how Ron DeSantis used her name and story without her permission. She said she tagged me and President Trump in the tweet, and hours later, she was banned from Twitter. In a message, Twitter said her account was banned for "manipulating and interfering in elections." | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- While it is unknown who ultimately banned Tracy's account after she publicly tweeted that she wanted to go public about DeSantis, in May 2023, Twitter's owner on May 23, 2023, which is the same day DeSantis officially kicked off his 2024 Presidential campaign. Unlike Ron DeSantis, President Trump doesn't need to lie about meeting with Angel moms, he doesn't fabricate elements of stories to score political points, he doesn't disrespect Gold Star families, and he certainly never used Tracy's story for political gain. Tracy LaPorte says this experience has fortified her support for President Trump and makes her realize Ron DeSantis is not fit to serve as President. "While DeSantis uses moms for political gain, President Trump was working with me on a federal level to propose the The 2Step Act to the Federal Transportation Department. President Trump immediately recognized me as a Gold Star mother and took the time to write me directly out of respect, care, and compassion. He never once used me or my story on a debate stage or anywhere. His respect and care for a Gold Star mother made me feel like he was a family member who cared for me, my son, and our country by recognizing the fact that what had happened to my son while he was on active duty was a National Security Risk everywhere. President Trump validated that he cares about our troops, and that my son mattered." Tracy said she didn't want to have to go public with her story and the letter that President Trump sent her in 2020, but she said she now feels compelled to do so after DeSantis lied to the nation by invoking her name, her dead son, and her dead cousin for political gain. According to Tracy, President Trump sent her a letter while he was President. Tracy provided me with a copy of the letter President Trump sent her on July 27, 2020. In the letter seen below, President Trump wrote, "I am especially grateful you took the time to share your thoughts on issues currently facing our country. You son's death is a tragedy, and no parent should ever undergo the incredible heartbreak you have experienced. Please know that I have shared your proposal, the 2StepACT, with the appropriate Federal Agency." | | ---|---|--- When Tracy's son died on February 1, 2012, , she received a generic letter from President Obama with a Presidential Seal, but it was not a personalized, and did not contain a hand signed letter. Tracy's son died during the Obama administration, which is worth noting since President Trump was not obligated to send her anything since her son didn't die with he was Commander in Chief. However, he took the time to write Tracy a personalized letter and he assured her that he would pass her proposal for the 2Step Act along to officials in his administration. | | ---|---|--- Tracy said when President Trump's term ended in 2021, it ended the federal progress she was hoping to have with regards to passing The 2StepACT on a federal level. Tracy said, "When President Trump left office, I had to start all over and rebuild in Texas and form relationships with Texas lawmakers. This is one reason why I want Trump back in office, and why our country needs him back in office. Unlike Ron DeSantis, President Trump knows what a Gold Star mother is and he recognizes their loss of a child for our country's freedom. President Trump is the only politician who immediately recognized the national security risk that is created by Rental Car Agencies not vetting the licenses and legal status of drivers who attempt to rent vehicles. I always say that the wrong people are well aware of the fact that there is a loophole because Rental Car agencies don't conduct DMV checks to make sure all drivers are legal." When asked what she wants from Ron DeSantis, Tracy said, "He needs to get more educated on what a Gold Star mother is, and what an Angel mom is. As a veteran himself, of all people, DeSantis should know what a Gold Star mom is and he should know that it is inappropriate and hurtful to exploit our dead service members and the dead children of Gold Star Parents for political gain. That is an open wound forever, and poking that wound is like ripping a mother's heart open. I think Ron DeSantis needs to apologize to me and correct the record on my son as an exemplary, well-decorated combat soldier who served our nation for our freedoms." Tracy added that the only politician who has permission to use her story and her name as an example is President Donald Trump, because she says he's "the only one who cared enough to actually hear and understand the facts of my story." Team, Marcus Flowers here. I’m the Democrat and Army Veteran who proudly ran against Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022, and now I’m expanding the fight to take on MAGA Extremists all across the country. My friend Tamie Wilson’s opponent **Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)** is among the worst of these far-right extremists which is why I’m writing to you today. **Let me get straight to the point:** Our government is being held hostage by the radical-right extremists like MTG and Jim Jordan and it’s on us to stop them before it’s too late. That’s why I co-founded Mission: Democracy - to help defeat extremists all across the country. **_But, I’ll be honest, I can’t do this alone. That’s why I’m reaching out. I’m writing in support of Tamie Wilson - who is running AGAINST Jim Jordan, and she needs your help._** **[Can I count on you to rush a contribution to Mission: Democracy and Tamie Wilson’s campaign TODAY?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69367728/425911162/-1328097453?refcode=tw-md-splitNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmUxZGVmYzEtYjA0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9Gxrk0Y91lKpKjKPiGEnnZndK2RYEP5xmj6n5UqFEsU=) **Together we can defeat Jim Jordan and his ilk.

subject: I spend more time rubbing elbows with bikers than lobbyists

body:
This Congressional race is about building community and not being afraid to reach across the aisle. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69367759/425911285/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230907_fr_Bikers_cb_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQzYWUwMjItYjE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-YtZQFD5xM__zmNLDTFrDKOGOJ-NgzpiQGK-Lh472to=)
---
Dear Peter, This Congressional race is about building community and not being afraid to reach across the aisle. Case in point: Last month, I went to a biker rally. I went to the Fair. I’ve reached out to business owners and folks wearing Trump 2024 t-shirts. To talk to voters. **As a Democrat.** And you want to know what? **We agreed that being American was more important than any political party.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69367760/425911286/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230907_fr_Bikers_cand_sm_90da_xx_img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQzYWUwMjItYjE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-YtZQFD5xM__zmNLDTFrDKOGOJ-NgzpiQGK-Lh472to=)
---
The truth is, Northern & Upper Michigan need a representative who's focused on getting things done, not on which party you've registered with.
**For me, that means talking to voters from _all_ walks of life and finding common ground.**
As it turns out, we want to protect our democracy, we want good paying jobs. We want a safe future for our kids.
Ultimately, some conversations started with "_I could never vote for a Democrat_ " and ended with us agreeing on the many ways that our government could do better for us here (healthcare, jobs, veteran benefits, early childhood education - the list goes on)– and a promise that they'd consider my name when they see me on the ballot because being from here and for here - folks know that we are in this together.
This is the type of campaigning we need in Northern & Upper Michigan: Leaders who aren't afraid to get to know people and find common ground.
[If that's the type of work you'd like to see our next member of Congress undertake, chip in today and help pay for the gas to get to these events. We've got a huge fundraising deadline at the end of the month, and every bit helps us build the community that protects our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69367761/425911287/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230907_fr_Bikers_cand_sm_90da_xx_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQzYWUwMjItYjE0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-YtZQFD5xM__zmNLDTFrDKOGOJ-NgzpiQGK-Lh472to=)

Bad News: Thanks to the Republican-controlled state legislature, we still don’t have a fair, representative map in Alabama.

Good News: A federal court struck down the state’s redistricting plan and appointed a special master to redraw our congressional map and create TWO majority-black districts!

[This is good news and the right decision, but we have a LONG way to go until this battle is won. body:
You need to see this ASAP.

| |

---
| | | _Friend, did you see this?!_
**Far-Left prosecutor prepares to unleash BRAND NEW charges against President Donald J. Trump!**
If his scheme goes according to plan, Trump will be staring down his FIFTH indictment. Any honest Patriot knows this isn’t a fair prosecution – it’s a political hit job orchestrated from the very top.

**Radical Democrats will do anything to throw Trump in prison, disqualify him as a presidential candidate, and establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL by any means necessary.**

_The clock is ticking, so whatever you do before the charges are official... DON’T LEGITIMIZE THE CORRUPT WITCH HUNT WITH YOUR SILENCE!!!_

It’s not enough to sit around and complain. Not at a time like this.

_**[That's why we're taking matters into our own hands. We just launched a new petition to drop all federal charges against President Trump.](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/k_QglODZzQaGp5QFGLRtAQ~~/AAAHUQA~-mTb7VRxUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABHeg~~ "That's why we're taking matters into our own hands. We just launched a new petition to drop all federal charges against President Trump.")**_ We’re counting on every single Patriot reading this email to sign their name right here, right now.

---
**OFFICIAL HOUSE GOP PETITION:**
Drop all federal charges against Trump

**Goal:** 5,000,000 Signatures

name: Lesley Lopez
subject: Listen, I’ll keep it to 3 bullet points.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lopez for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=img_logo]
Hi there -- I know your time is valuable, so I'll only write three bullet points:

1. I'm running for Congress in an open competitive seat that national Republicans want to flip red to stop us from taking control of the House.

2. As the only proven progressive woman leader in this race -- with a real record protecting abortion rights, standing up for commonsense gun safety, and advocating for marginalized communities -- I’ll take on anyone who stands in the way of getting things done.

3. To stay on track to electing the first woman to this seat in thirty years, we need 41 more donations this week toward our end-of-quarter goal. Will you pitch in now?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=link_CTA]

- Lesley
Lesley Lopez is a Democrat running for the open competitive seat in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. When she’s not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Lopez for Congress
Lesley Lopez for Congress
PO Box 86931
Montgomery Village, MD 20886-6931
United States

name: Murray, Patty
subject: Meeting with folks from around the state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
But unfortunately some parts of my job aren't quite as enjoyable – even though they're still incredibly important
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368638/425914594/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2NjMDI4Yy1iMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNv_7KvgVDfCVdEPI_DbXh7cnA-M-lr7ZqIoR6akQ4k=)
---
Peter, I've spent the last few weeks back home in Washington state.
**Spending time in Washington state gives me a chance to meet families and people all across our state, hear their stories, and bring their priorities and concerns back to the other Washington to inform my work in the Senate. It’s my favorite part of my job as Senator.**
I know what the priorities are for the people of Washington state – and you can bet I’m going to fight for them in every room and every meeting in the Senate – but if we don’t protect our razor-thin Senate Democratic majority, we risk Republicans not just halting our current work, but rolling back the progress we’ve already made to lower costs for families and build a clean energy economy.
There’s so much work we need to do to build a stronger, fairer economy – and the stakes of this election could not be higher. We need all hands on deck early to make sure we stay on track to keep the Senate and take back the House.
**I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important: we're still $5,283 short of my midnight fundraising goal and we simply cannot afford to fall short.** **[So please, Peter, will you make a donation of $5 – or anything that you can spare today – to help me defend our Democratic majority and continue delivering for the people of Washington state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368639/425914595/657691562?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2NjMDI4Yy1iMzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNv_7KvgVDfCVdEPI_DbXh7cnA-M-lr7ZqIoR6akQ4k=)**

name: Team Nguyen
subject: Kim is a proud product of Orange County’s public schools – and she’s ready to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | **Public education is under attack right now. Extremists like Michelle Steel are fighting tooth and nail to undermine our public schools and attack our educators.**

Kim is a proud product of Orange County’s public schools – _and she’s ready to fight back._

**Read Kim’s message below –[and then sign our petition demanding action to protect public education from GOP attacks!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368688/425914760/1342398469?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_3MO_230907_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViZWM1ZWQtYjM0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceG1aRd9q4srmWzTchQwO14dJO-4CTEsdDowCprhaXk=&emci=cea8cd82-e04c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebec5ed-b34d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)** | | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368689/425914761/1342398469?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_3MO_230907_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViZWM1ZWQtYjM0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceG1aRd9q4srmWzTchQwO14dJO-4CTEsdDowCprhaXk=&emci=cea8cd82-e04c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebec5ed-b34d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**
---
* * *
**_Forwarded Message from Kim Nguyen:_**

**It’s back-to-school season!**

Students across CA-45 are heading back to the classrooms as we kick off the new school year. _And this year, the fight to defend public education has never been more important._

MAGA Republicans like Michelle Steel attack our educators, oppose critical funding for K-12 education, and rely on fear-mongering to distract from their dangerous agenda. **Michelle Steel has even supported *eliminating* the Department of Education (_big yikes!_).**

[We MUST invest in our public schools and take immediate action to defend public education from right-wing attacks. Sign on if you agree:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368690/425914762/1342398469?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_3MO_230907_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViZWM1ZWQtYjM0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceG1aRd9q4srmWzTchQwO14dJO-4CTEsdDowCprhaXk=&emci=cea8cd82-e04c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebec5ed-b34d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368691/425914763/1342398469?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_3MO_230907_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViZWM1ZWQtYjM0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceG1aRd9q4srmWzTchQwO14dJO-4CTEsdDowCprhaXk=&emci=cea8cd82-e04c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebec5ed-b34d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**
---
**I’m a proud product of public schools** – from elementary school all the way to college. As a lifelong resident of CA-45, I attended Clinton-Mendenhall Elementary, Doig Intermediate, and Santiago High School (_go Cavaliers_!).

I will always work to invest in our schools and protect public education. And I will always stand up to the anti-education extremists in Congress when they try to attack our students and educators.

**If you’re ready to join me in this fight, please sign our petition here:** [https://go.votekimnguyen.com/a/education](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69368692/425914764/1342398469?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_3MO_230907_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViZWM1ZWQtYjM0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceG1aRd9q4srmWzTchQwO14dJO-4CTEsdDowCprhaXk=&emci=cea8cd82-e04c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2ebec5ed-b34d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)

Thank you,

Kim

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. clean_body: | | Public education is under attack right now. Extremists like Michelle Steel are fighting tooth and nail to undermine our public schools and attack our educators. Kim is a proud product of Orange County’s public schools – and she’s ready to fight back. Read Kim’s message below – | | Forwarded Message from Kim Nguyen: It’s back-to-school season! Students across CA-45 are heading back to the classrooms as we kick off the new school year. And this year, the fight to defend public education has never been more important. MAGA Republicans like Michelle Steel attack our educators, oppose critical funding for K-12 education, and rely on fear-mongering to distract from their dangerous agenda. Michelle Steel has even supported eliminating the Department of Education (big yikes!). | I’m a proud product of public schools – from elementary school all the way to college. As a lifelong resident of CA-45, I attended Clinton-Mendenhall Elementary, Doig Intermediate, and Santiago High School (go Cavaliers!). I will always work to invest in our schools and protect public education. And I will always stand up to the anti-education extremists in Congress when they try to attack our students and educators. If you’re ready to join me in this fight, please sign our petition here: Thank you, Kim | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation. The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I can’t do this alone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I believe that one of the most important things a representative can do is show up and listen. That is a philosophy I have carried all throughout my time in office.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3761%2E5257348%2E971b7o)
Derek,
I believe that one of the most important things a representative can do is show up and listen. That is a philosophy I have carried all throughout my time in office.
That is also why, for the past few weeks, I have been on the road — meeting incredible people across the state of California and hearing their stories firsthand.
**It would be the honor of my life to represent the people of California in the U.S. Senate.** To be the leader you deserve, to fight for affordable housing, to end homelessness, to stand up to MAGA extremists trying to corrupt our democracy, and more.
To level the playing field for working families.
To defend every Californian’s civil and reproductive rights.
To curb climate change.
To get things done.
I’m all-in, and I’m ready to work hard these next 400-odd days before Election Day to share our message.
**But I can’t do it alone, Derek. We are running in the most populous state in the nation, meaning my campaign will need a lot more resources — and a big, grassroots team — to come out on top.**
One of the most impactful things you can do right now is to start a monthly donation. Recurring gifts — even just $5 or $10 every month — help our team plan ahead, so we know how much we can budget to fund new ads, reach voters in swing precincts, and win.
**[So Derek, will you start a monthly recurring donation to help send me to the U.S. Senate? I’m ready to fight for our working families, but I will need your help to get there.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2138?c0=sep2023_abs_em_recurring.5zMD-6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230907_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3761%2E5257348%2E971b7o)**

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: An underrated holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090]
Hi Friend, a quick message –
Labor Day was this week, and while it might just be another day off to a lot of people, it gives me a chance to talk about one of my biggest heroes, my grandpa.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090]
Living just down the street from me and my mom, he was a huge influence on how I saw the world.
He raised my mom on a union job, and he made sure I knew how important unions were to giving working families a voice.
That's why, as Senator, I'll always be a strong voice for our working families, fight for what they need to really thrive and stand in solidarity with labor movements.
I'm working my hardest to make my grandpa proud, but I'm reaching out to my friends and neighbors for help in ensuring my message is heard by Hoosiers across Indiana. Friend, can my team and I count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090]
SUPPORT OUR TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230907_em_fr_b1_KP_3090]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, a quick message – Labor Day was this week, and while it might just be another day off to a lot of people, it gives me a chance to talk about one of my biggest heroes, my grandpa. [] Living just down the street from me and my mom, he was a huge influence on how I saw the world. He raised my mom on a union job, and he made sure I knew how important unions were to giving working families a voice. That's why, as Senator, I'll always be a strong voice for our working families, fight for what they need to really thrive and stand in solidarity with labor movements. I'm working my hardest to make my grandpa proud, but I'm reaching out to my friends and neighbors for help in ensuring my message is heard by Hoosiers across Indiana. Friend, can my team and I count on your support? [] SUPPORT OUR TEAM [] Thank you, Keith Potts Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council. [] Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment. He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to Keith Potts for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 SUPPORT KEITH [] [] Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate Keith for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

In a televised debate, she even went so far as to say that she supports cutting Social Security and a full national ban on abortion. **My opponent represents the politics that so many Utahns are tired of.** They're tired of seeing their representatives threaten the jobs and livelihoods of public sector workers. They're tired of the attacks on our democracy. They're tired of the government legislating our basic freedoms, and they're tired of seeing their healthcare and retirement security used as political pawns. Every day on the campaign trail, I meet more voters – Democrats, Republicans, and independents – who tell me they're ready for a new direction. And if we sustain the momentum that we've built over the past couple of months, our coalition is only going to keep growing. [**So Peter, are you ready to help me defeat MAGA extremism and bring Utahns fresh leadership? **More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign**

Peter,

In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (**donations under $200**) and major donors (**donations over $200**).

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3634443e098a47159fe89aaca793a603&_e=CWE8FzxZY9JYwlT728EMm0lTWy93TPo1ilNHO7T6pfhFU4m-Im1NiNqIYmsE62eFrg8ul3WBS-O_JMFXhslmmExXBTK0tgwpHxLC5HDLNdPkWp2QGB7bU0fr2VhYjVN8hLsYEmrYVgOoPwcjfB1Z_oJOMswrQcrn7ciiHJvN6e33CtvRkqLD-ViLmgayEKZeor_uHFbxFkegntbI2wzXHRw-pXhaPtDmb9NF2vf796ep8o81swGBujtTYSjKuYE600ZK4KwdVbswyT4KvoH84RDKDRvZ3PCRzojeDANqFcO2YTW7Xqoh2uy9nidrTnR8ftpZUdbXXsNyv5j-Wt7DHGLEhMSaMslSdW5Wd-XORCVXMVXdJMXse0TGpbQAG77BS4B8TsIODA6_Fj4I6IaW7WeCkoboKtd19qrRJByCmPg%3D)
**143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does.

** [**HELP ME CATCH UP ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3634443e098a47159fe89aaca793a603&_e=CWE8FzxZY9JYwlT728EMm0lTWy93TPo1ilNHO7T6pfhFU4m-Im1NiNqIYmsE62eFrg8ul3WBS-O_JMFXhslmmExXBTK0tgwpHxLC5HDLNdPkWp2QGB7bU0fr2VhYjVN8hLsYEmrYVgOoPwcjfB1Z_oJOMswrQcrn7ciiHJvN6e33CtvRkqLD-ViLmgayEKZeor_uHFbxFkegntbI2wzXHRw-pXhaPtDmb9NF2vf796ep8o81swGBujtTYSjKuYE65u65zIUIph-buxlQVJtps5TQOy-onW2wsQW7m9V1xqJ5nuTse870owhmCBQ3IwheQr4uKiuhMZEFdsmoWPnRWRvOgTweF48o_GJ9iQis6EUNAEJKLYtWI4a3NJwYZnrWJZXSpX1hAIfKh2WPY8N8sOGoE3bDvFU10BMmpXb6jfo%3D)
It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,**I’m concerned we’ll never catch up.**

clean_body: The special interest RINOs are coming for us... | | Friend, Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO’s who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the primary are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month? And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, “We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days”? Well, I’ve been thinking... What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully? And I know just the thing... We’re going to kick off our largest fundraising SURGE of the entire campaign to date! Which is why I’ve set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of 60,000 grassroots donations over the RINO’s“60-day window.” Because what we’ve PROVEN to be true time and again is that no amount of special interest money from shadowy RINO Super PACs can stop our beautiful movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, September 3, 2023 Subject: Another $50 MILLION?! To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, The amount of money the special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat OUR beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd. By now, I’m sure you’re already aware of the $370 million that they’ve pledged to spend against us in the primary... ...But LEAKED reports now reveal that the RINOs’ chief Super PAC is plotting to add *ANOTHER $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE! These cowards were even caught saying... “Now let me tell you a secret — don’t leak this... We’re making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we’ve got to beat him in the next 60 days.” How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their own Party’s undisputed FRONTRUNNER leading by 50 and even 60 points? Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country’s justice system to try andJAIL his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator. Well, here’s the TRUTH about them: They don’t care at all about Republicans winning back the White House. These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at YOUR expense for decades! And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda – and nothing more. Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and HELP Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the ONLY candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST (yours truly) never again steps foot in the White House. Friend, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices. But, as we’ve already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots. And now, we need to show these RINOs that every time they attempt to BUY this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks. Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking us , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe’s flailing campaign. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Why are some people mad? 🤔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I am the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. I was a waitress. I am Latina. I come from a low income background and am one of just a few working class people who get elected to Congress.
That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230907-2.BLykjt&refcode=em20230907-4946-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)
But together, we’ve built a movement fighting for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[If you’d like to help support our movement, could you donate $5 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230907-2.BLykjt&refcode=em20230907-4946-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230907-2.BLykjt&refcode=em20230907-4946-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230907-2?refcode=em20230907-4946-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4946_2526796_CgZP6H&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230907-4946-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4946%2E2526796%2ECgZP6H)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: 🚨CALL TO ACTION: Call everyone BUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Amnestony Gonzales | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/78ebf3710314/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12650238?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=7c5251f380&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Almost a month ago, 15 brave Texas Congress member wrote [this letter](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=9a449b89a4&e=c982eb7ad4) urging their colleagues to withhold funding from DHS unless the following were agreed upon:
1. Strong border security legislation was passed,
2. Policy adoption giving law enforcement and/or the military the necessary tools to target dangerous cartels,
3. The removal of DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas from office for failure to do his job, and
4. Federal reimbursement of $10 billion to Texas for Operation Lonestar and related border security efforts – since the state was forced to step up to address the crisis due to the absence of action by the federal government.

**Tony Gonzales’ record of past behavior is plenty of proof that no mountain will move him to represent his constituents or the American people. **

I helped in the censure of Rep. Gonzales by the Republican Party of Texas because I believe elected officials should be accountable when they do not deliver on their promises to the American people.

[**In this resolution**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=61fb9c0a30&e=c982eb7ad4) **there are 7 distinct actions where Rep. Gonzales took the position that was _in opposition to securing our border_ OR _prioritized foreigners over citizens_!**

Peter, 15 members of Congress are urging their colleagues to take the stand that **IS NEEDED** to address this growing border crisis. **Today, I ask you to join me in reaching out to their colleagues, EXCEPT Amnestony Gonzales, and urge support of their action. **
---
| [CONTACT CONGRESS MEMBERS »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=a9669012bc&e=c982eb7ad4 "CONTACT CONGRESS MEMBERS »")
---
| For America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=b06222ca51&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| [**P.S. Phone numbers are listed for Congress members on the page at this website, but to send an email you’ll need to click on their name, visit their website and reach out to them through a contact form.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=abdad09e33&e=c982eb7ad4)

name: Josh Harder HQ
subject: The GOP’s “dream candidate”
body:

clean_body: California Democrats are taking steps once again to attack parents’ rights to protect their children. | | Peter, A key recent poll shows me leading my Democrat opponent Adam Schiff in the U.S. Senate race here in California, where Democrats are indoctrinating our public school children with their gender fluidity propaganda from the very moment they begin their education. To ensure their indoctrination is not interfered with, they’re removing you,the parent , from the picture by preventing school officials from notifying you if your child wants to “transition.” Thankfully, parents across the state are standing up and fighting back – and, as a parent, I stand with you 100%. In the Chino Valley Unified School District, parents and the school board stood up and REQUIRED school officials to notify parents, preserving parental rights and protecting these minor children. But now, California Democrats are taking steps once again to attack parents’ rights to protect their children by suing the Chino Valley USD. Gavin Newsom, Adam Schiff, and Democrats in California and across America want control over your children. They want to force feed them their propaganda and will be more than happy if your child succumbs to constant in-school and social media pressure to change their gender. I stand with the Chino Valley USD, I stand with parents in defense of our children, and I stand against Newsom & groomer-in-chief Schiff and their attempts to control our children with their disgusting sexualized education curriculum. - Thanks, Eric Early Republican for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: David Hogg
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=ELyRKEkwF8WFbJN2IYl1yBQ%2F07wvU51XYIrU3yRf4Mas%2BIN4swbfawDBBjVXvdYP7n0%2FJLK5%2Be0XNqYiCKd%2FgIb9iuAxlm%2BrPJ1X5gy4BXCBMgYC8Ee5G2Jk08YrXvHtKwMhCHcmkC2SnGWeUUAZy4UHX7Cm%2BZhTwkJKm9ECJO2Gs1wGkOGaM%2BSUWuQNxQ0A%2F2mjdPPs8PqYza3hzq33z6B%2BwrNIa%2BemIaRb%2BFTMop8OlmL2MTyKOPKcrpsgGlPrVcvzzoDvYEo11bU77gaQgX0VmpfCYQf5SHF%2BV0OjpI6MtsGIHMGFCV9RmC7KqJX3DCwv46IHpIl81ooss%2Fz1KFGu%2BKwGSG6BUTblMOeafihUzj0zCJQam1xUqs%2Bc%2BKF%2B4VEBTRuDDlwXyz8mD97WlzNSmFzMrK6%2BiGZwky0SPjNhhvM9rW%2BvZm8GRAWsDlMc .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, Peter.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Let’s do this,

clean_body: You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. [] Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [] I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [] Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. Peter,
We need your help to keep Oregon roads toll-free and protect our communities from unfair taxation!

Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer is launching the No Tolls on Oregon Roads Act, a groundbreaking piece of legislation that could permanently stop tolling on I-5 and I-205.

Lori Chavez-DeRemer, a dedicated member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee's Highways and Transit Subcommittee, she understands the importance of protecting our communities. She firmly believes that families should not be burdened by regressive toll taxes, and businesses should not suffer due to increased transportation costs.

**Here's how you can help:
**
[_**Your contribution will directly support the campaign to pass the No Tolls on Oregon Roads Act. clean_body: | | | | 🚨🚨🚨 Peter, We need your help to keep Oregon roads toll-free and protect our communities from unfair taxation! Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer is launching the No Tolls on Oregon Roads Act, a groundbreaking piece of legislation that could permanently stop tolling on I-5 and I-205. Lori Chavez-DeRemer, a dedicated member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee's Highways and Transit Subcommittee, she understands the importance of protecting our communities. She firmly believes that families should not be burdened by regressive toll taxes, and businesses should not suffer due to increased transportation costs. Here's how you can help: | | It's time to take a stand for fair and toll-free roads in Oregon. Let's ensure that the No Tolls on Oregon Roads Act becomes law and secures a better future for all Oregonians. Together, we can protect our communities from the negative impacts of tolling. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer HeadQuarters | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | LCD HQ 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.
