subject: 📸 Campaign memo from AZ-01:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370596/425921509/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzOTdlZDAtYjk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9EdxmjSVE99VF1002beI8ZzAROt_VKUL2SXOWPmJrs=)
Friend, we just wrapped up a busy summer on the campaign trail here in AZ-01!

Over the past few months, we’ve met hundreds of AZ-01 voters and attended dozens of community events about our campaign to flip this seat. **It’s never been clearer how important it is that our district is well-represented in Congress, and to do that we must flip this seat from red to blue.**

So today, I want to lift the curtain on and share a few highlights from the trail. If you have a minute to spare, I hope you’ll read through how we’ve been prioritizing reaching out to voters and listening to their stories.

[**But if you are short on time, will you chip in a $3 donation toward our grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370597/425921510/-898110066?refcode=em-9.7.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzOTdlZDAtYjk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9EdxmjSVE99VF1002beI8ZzAROt_VKUL2SXOWPmJrs=) The end of September marks the end of the quarter, and we’re preparing to make our fundraising numbers public. I would love to see your name on our report.

Thank you,

Marlene
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370598/425921511/-898110066?refcode=em-9.7.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzOTdlZDAtYjk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9EdxmjSVE99VF1002beI8ZzAROt_VKUL2SXOWPmJrs=)****
---

* * *

**We hosted a Women for Marlene campaign event in Scottsdale with Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes.** It was great to speak to this crowd about my campaign platform and the stakes of our race in AZ-01.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370599/425921512/-898110066?refcode=em-9.7.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzOTdlZDAtYjk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9EdxmjSVE99VF1002beI8ZzAROt_VKUL2SXOWPmJrs=)
**In July, we met with Democrats in Fountain Hills.** Listening to voters and answering their questions about how I would represent them in Congress grounds me and reinstills the importance of winning this race.

clean_body: | = Friend, we just wrapped up a busy summer on the campaign trail here in AZ-01! Over the past few months, we’ve met hundreds of AZ-01 voters and attended dozens of community events about our campaign to flip this seat. It’s never been clearer how important it is that our district is well-represented in Congress, and to do that we must flip this seat from red to blue. So today, I want to lift the curtain on and share a few highlights from the trail. If you have a minute to spare, I hope you’ll read through how we’ve been prioritizing reaching out to voters and listening to their stories. = The end of September marks the end of the quarter, and we’re preparing to make our fundraising numbers public. I would love to see your name on our report. Thank you, Marlene | **= We hosted a Women for Marlene campaign event in Scottsdale with Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. It was great to speak to this crowd about my campaign platform and the stakes of our race in AZ-01. = In July, we met with Democrats in Fountain Hills. Listening to voters and answering their questions about how I would represent them in Congress grounds me and reinstills the importance of winning this race. = I met with Dems in LD 5. This was a great opportunity to discuss my vision for the district to Democratic voters, and listen to their thoughts. = And on a more personal note, I celebrated my birthday a few days ago, and had the chance to visit Zion National Park! = Thank you for your support during the summer months. As we look ahead to the end of the quarter and even toward the election year, I hope you’ll stay connected with our campaign! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Marlene | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Mark Mullet
subject: I’m calling for a special session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | The climate crisis is very real, and the investments in clean energy and green jobs made possible by the Climate Commitment Act (CCA) that we passed in 2021 – and that I voted for – are important.

But with families and small businesses taking the financial hit, the CCA could use some work to lower the impact it’s having on gas prices.

**That’s why I’m calling for a special session of the Washington State Legislature to pass my new legislation to lower prices and increase transparency in gas pricing – all while keeping our climate commitments.**

[Add your name to the petition below if you agree that we need our state government to take action on this issue ASAP:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370635/425921689/-910402451?contactdata=JM2I4TGMwBiLbYr6asUteGK9fP68RXIib6kf2cglEgF79DIoX1tHk6hZu+EX8tFrin8NDt8JY34ea7Owa8NiZ+9NQaE2OQL4ZfMorOpnbN4yi7qdv4YjIanI8A1Na8PJlh1wsV2OhvyVKPS5wKYddw==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230907_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM5N2VkMC1iOTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIVU55njdNZxD2H-Flj3uzsPrwj3WJBer1IMlz2gOx0=&emci=b366fb69-ae4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fc397ed0-b94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370636/425921690/-910402451?contactdata=JM2I4TGMwBiLbYr6asUteGK9fP68RXIib6kf2cglEgF79DIoX1tHk6hZu+EX8tFrin8NDt8JY34ea7Owa8NiZ+9NQaE2OQL4ZfMorOpnbN4yi7qdv4YjIanI8A1Na8PJlh1wsV2OhvyVKPS5wKYddw==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230907_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM5N2VkMC1iOTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIVU55njdNZxD2H-Flj3uzsPrwj3WJBer1IMlz2gOx0=&emci=b366fb69-ae4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fc397ed0-b94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**

We need to be innovative and take care to avoid putting policies in place that make Washington unaffordable. **Our transition to a green economy won’t be strong if we don’t protect working folks in our state.**

We can't sacrifice working families who are struggling to fill up their tanks at the gas station in our efforts to stop climate change -- we need to find a balance as we carve the path forward.

[Sign on now if you agree that we need action to lower gas prices, improve fuel price transparency, and help ensure Washington’s climate action is balanced with affordability.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370637/425921691/-910402451?contactdata=JM2I4TGMwBiLbYr6asUteGK9fP68RXIib6kf2cglEgF79DIoX1tHk6hZu+EX8tFrin8NDt8JY34ea7Owa8NiZ+9NQaE2OQL4ZfMorOpnbN4yi7qdv4YjIanI8A1Na8PJlh1wsV2OhvyVKPS5wKYddw==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230907_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM5N2VkMC1iOTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIVU55njdNZxD2H-Flj3uzsPrwj3WJBer1IMlz2gOx0=&emci=b366fb69-ae4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fc397ed0-b94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69370638/425921692/-910402451?contactdata=JM2I4TGMwBiLbYr6asUteGK9fP68RXIib6kf2cglEgF79DIoX1tHk6hZu+EX8tFrin8NDt8JY34ea7Owa8NiZ+9NQaE2OQL4ZfMorOpnbN4yi7qdv4YjIanI8A1Na8PJlh1wsV2OhvyVKPS5wKYddw==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230907_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM5N2VkMC1iOTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fIVU55njdNZxD2H-Flj3uzsPrwj3WJBer1IMlz2gOx0=&emci=b366fb69-ae4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fc397ed0-b94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**

clean_body: | | The climate crisis is very real, and the investments in clean energy and green jobs made possible by the Climate Commitment Act (CCA) that we passed in 2021 – and that I voted for – are important. But with families and small businesses taking the financial hit, the CCA could use some work to lower the impact it’s having on gas prices. That’s why I’m calling for a special session of the Washington State Legislature to pass my new legislation to lower prices and increase transparency in gas pricing – all while keeping our climate commitments. | | We need to be innovative and take care to avoid putting policies in place that make Washington unaffordable. Our transition to a green economy won’t be strong if we don’t protect working folks in our state. We can't sacrifice working families who are struggling to fill up their tanks at the gas station in our efforts to stop climate change -- we need to find a balance as we carve the path forward. | Thank you, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Elect Mark Mullet 401 2nd Ave S Ste 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States

body:
[ NEW POLL ] Josh Hawley (R): 44% | Lucas Kunce (D): 43% | Undecided: 12%
#
**_BREAKING: MISSOURI’S U.S. SENATE RACE IS IN A DEAD HEAT_**
**Josh Hawley (R): 44% | Lucas Kunce (D): 43% | Undecided: 12%**
_First reported by the St. Louis Post Dispatch, 9/7/2023_
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36355?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV)**
* * *

Peter: GOP insiders have worried about what Lucas Kunce means for their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat since the day he got into this race — and now, a new poll released just this morning proves they’re right to be scared.
**We have a real chance to flip this Senate seat, and your support right now could be what tips the scales in this neck-and-neck race.[So please, will you rush a donation of any amount to our campaign today so we’ll have what it takes to take the lead, defeat Josh Hawley, and send Lucas to the Senate?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36355?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36356?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36356?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36356?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36355?refcode=em20230907-3716&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3716%2E614464%2EbGWMAV)
---
This poll is HUGE. After nearly eight months of holding Hawley accountable for betraying our country and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters across the state, we’re putting this race on the map — and we’ve shown everyone that the record-breaking, people-powered, and worker-led movement we’re building together is a real force to be reckoned with.
**But let’s be clear: this isn’t _just_ good news for our campaign.** GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors have already made our race one of their top defensive targets for 2024. And now that they’ve seen how real of a threat we are, they’ll do whatever it takes to maintain Hawley’s lead.
You know how it goes. Political insiders and corporate elites like Hawley, the same ones who’ve spent decades stripping our communities for parts, will do, say, and spend anything it takes to keep their grip on power. They’ve even already set up a brand new Super PAC with more than $1 MILLION to make Hawley look strong and fund their desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to close the gap in this neck-and-neck race, we need the resources to cut through their inevitable onslaught of new attacks and keep reaching voters with Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri. **That’s why we’re asking for your help today, Peter:**
**[Will you please rush a donation of $25, $10, or anything you can afford toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce? name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: BIG NEWS: We have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race.

| Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: **After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race.**
---
| [Donate Now ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69372016/425926572/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230907-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZWVlNGRiLWJmNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6mgS1salvr6Ke4RechDgS_HISbip_-I6fgWamZfLap4=)
---
While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to get into this race. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary on the other side. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat.

But as we always do here on Team Slotkin, we've done our homework, and we’re prepared to tell Michiganders about Mike Rogers and any other Republican who may enter the race.

But as the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who Mike Rogers is: He was on the Trump national security transition team and was in talks to be Trump’s Director of FBI, but then got fired. Then, he became a critic of Trump.

Regardless of his record on Trump, he's a true conservative.**He supports extreme abortion bans with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage; he voted to cut Social Security and Medicare; and, with an A rating from the NRA, he voted to *expand* access to guns.** He represented a version of my current congressional district 4 years before I flipped it – but with a different set of values.

Unfortunately, his entry into the race will make this race competitive -- and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more).**Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.

[_So, given this important inflection point in the campaign, I’d love for you to consider splitting a contribution of $25 between my campaign for U.S. Senate and Fight for Progress. Every donation in these first 24 hours following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69372017/425926573/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230907-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZWVlNGRiLWJmNGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6mgS1salvr6Ke4RechDgS_HISbip_-I6fgWamZfLap4=)**

clean_body: After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race. | Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race. | = While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to get into this race. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary on the other side. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat. But as we always do here on Team Slotkin, we've done our homework, and we’re prepared to tell Michiganders about Mike Rogers and any other Republican who may enter the race. But as the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who Mike Rogers is: He was on the Trump national security transition team and was in talks to be Trump’s Director of FBI, but then got fired. Then, he became a critic of Trump. Regardless of his record on Trump, he's a true conservative.He supports extreme abortion bans with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage; he voted to cut Social Security and Medicare; and, with an A rating from the NRA, he voted to expand access to guns. He represented a version of my current congressional district 4 years before I flipped it – but with a different set of values. Unfortunately, his entry into the race will make this race competitive -- and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more).Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Many, many thanks for your support. Elissa * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: UPDATE: The state of abortion access in the U.S.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
In the year since the Supreme Court gutted abortion rights and reproductive freedoms, we’ve watched as state after state enacts draconian measures to control women.
In the past month, Indiana abortion providers have stopped providing services in anticipation of a sweeping abortion ban going into effect (despite the best effort of last minute petitions by organizations like the ACLU of Indiana), and an all-male South Carolina Supreme Court has upheld a strict six-week abortion ban, reversing the court’s own decision from earlier this year.
This map from the New York Times illustrates the current state of bans across the country:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/366A47747054704E4F6A7337336C43504B792F4C456448622B376B704B73724C366E4E6F684B515A4B72466B4173557A434A4550414C69342F64746944304730/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202023-09-06%20at%2011.51.35%20AM.png]
Those shaded states represent more than 40% of the American population - meaning nearly half of all Americans live in a state with abortion care restrictions in place.
And what’s more, research has found that increasingly, places in the U.S. that restrict abortion also have fewer doctors who provide care for pregnant people. Right now, there are 3.7 million women living in a county that provides no access to abortion care and no or low access to maternity care.
Take this heartbreaking new report out of Texas: In 2022, after banning abortions, the state saw an 11.5% increase in infant mortality. Experts in Texas attribute this awful development at least in part to the impacts of forcing people to carry nonviable pregnancies to term.
This is all painful to read and reflect on.
But it is the reality of what is happening in our country - so I want to feel that pain, and I want to get angry. I hope you do, too - because we’re going to need that anger if we want to fight for change, and win.
Here’s the good news:
We can codify the right to abortion in federal law. All we need to do is take back our House majority in 2024 (and of course, hold our Senate majority and the White House!).
I can’t promise it’ll be easy, but I know that this team has what it takes to get it done, because I’ve seen your incredible passion over the past several years.
Will you donate any amount to my re-election campaign right now to ensure I can hold onto my seat and support other Democrats running in key districts next year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t donate now, will you commit to keeping up with my campaign and reading these updates? It means a lot.
Thank you so much.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Before my time in Washington, I served on the local school board, where I worked to support students, teachers, and schools.
Later, I served in local government, including establishing the Genesee County Land Bank, which led to tens of millions of dollars in economic redevelopment in Flint.
In 2012, I was elected to serve mid-Michigan in Congress – and since then, I’ve done everything I can to put hard-working Michigan families first.
I’ve always fought to ensure every Michigander has access to a good-paying job, quality health care and clean water.
And just last year, I helped lead the fight to lower the cost of health care and allow Medicare to finally negotiate lower drug prices for millions of seniors.
**I’m proud of this progress, but there is more work to do. And now, I’m one of the national Republicans’ top targets. They know to hold on to their House majority, they need to defeat me.**
[_**I first ran for Congress to deliver much-needed progress and results to Michigan – and that goal hasn’t changed one bit. But I can only beat back the GOP’s attacks and keep up the fight with your help. So today I’m humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help me defend this House seat for Democrats and keep fighting in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372231/425927334/2025394003?refcode=email_090723_Bio&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWVhMDIxOS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xwWLc5Rv0-q-lhezXXUB9YiEzSjR5hr0lSdihGhNsY=)

subject: We can enshrine abortion access in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2]
Hola Peter – Raquel here.
As a legislator, I traveled to El Salvador, where there is a total abortion ban. Our delegation met women who were incarcerated for having obstetric emergencies or miscarriages.
We’ve seen across our country the systemic attack on reproductive freedoms since the overturning of Roe last summer, including here at home in Arizona.
We’ve also seen individuals across this country fight back against these attacks. Here in Arizona, major abortion rights groups are working to launch a bid that would enshrine abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution in 2024.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2]
This is not a hyperbole, and this is our reality. That’s why I fully support ensuring that Arizonans have access to legal and safe abortion. Join me in support of this by adding your name to our petition >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CpHgECSSqEe1TDvbeg9ufQ2]

clean_body: [] Hola Peter – Raquel here. As a legislator, I traveled to El Salvador, where there is a total abortion ban. Our delegation met women who were incarcerated for having obstetric emergencies or miscarriages. We’ve seen across our country the systemic attack on reproductive freedoms since the overturning of Roe last summer, including here at home in Arizona. We’ve also seen individuals across this country fight back against these attacks. Here in Arizona, major abortion rights groups are working to launch a bid that would enshrine abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution in 2024. [] This is not a hyperbole, and this is our reality. That’s why I fully support ensuring that Arizonans have access to legal and safe abortion. Join me in support of this by adding your name to our petition >> [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Let’s ensure women’s rights are enshrined into the Arizona Constitution. Sign on today >> [] A ganar, Raquel [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: It’s been a busy few weeks!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372349/425928275/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)
Hi Peter,

It’s been a busy few weeks on the trail in IL-17!

I’ve been spending a lot of time meeting new folks and attending some fun events, so I thought I’d share some updates below.

I hope you enjoy these last few weeks of summer. Thanks again for all your support!

_\- Eric_
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372356/425928292/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)
---

* * *

Last month, I attended ‘Floatzilla,’ an annual fundraiser to support River Action, a local nonprofit in the Quad Cities dedicated to protecting the Mississippi River. Over 5,000 folks come together from all over the country to kayak - and you can even go through the canal system! 😁
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372363/425928309/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)**
Just outside the district in Hennepin, I had the opportunity to visit Marquis Energy, an innovative company fighting to reduce plastics consumption and produce more environmentally friendly ethanol. They’re also working to produce sustainable aviation fuel, which is so important since aviation is responsible for 2.5% of all global emissions!
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372381/425928323/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)**
In Peoria, I had the opportunity to engage in meaningful conversations with members of the local NAACP chapter and participate in a walking tour of the 61605 neighborhood. This community is historically economically disadvantaged, and in Congress, I’m actively working to secure over $1 million in federal funding for crucial infrastructure and housing projects for the area.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372400/425928361/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)**
And finally, we brought together the Illinois Democratic Party county chairs from all 14 counties in the district, as well as our central committee members, to thank them for their hard work this cycle and last cycle. **Meeting the folks who fuel our campaign is an important reminder of the power of grassroots organizing.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372411/425928370/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)**
I think traveling across the district and hearing from residents all along the way is one of the most rewarding parts of running a campaign. **Because it’s so important to meet the folks I represent in Washington face-to-face.**

[Summer is soon ending – and so is our third fundraising quarter. If you can, would you be able to make a small contribution to keep us moving on the ground? Every cent helps us connect with voters across the district!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372419/425928383/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372435/425928397/2043242937?refcode=em-9.07.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=)
---

Thank you,

Eric
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372452/425928417/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=&emci=cc1249e5-c04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb0f181-c14d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372460/425928430/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=&emci=cc1249e5-c04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb0f181-c14d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372474/425928441/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=&emci=cc1249e5-c04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb0f181-c14d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372481/425928454/2043242937?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=) To volunteer on Eric's campaign, [sign up to volunteer here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69372488/425928460/1476167333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIwZjE4MS1jMTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kclyH8UMt3mi_EIgpbvADJzVYZK0vpq1iWgvqEW7zM=&emci=cc1249e5-c04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb0f181-c14d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=DtcCOgik3tcllkwIX58Hw%2F0LQZAFBfL1ms7mYadDKS%2FEOk%2BLjnkya9vOxNz%2Bi47dFPBxDjg7x5GECuleHu2vTi2vrR5fM6q1Y9ynWSFnnv64A2WORhtPLkMUidsoNz8685wYGq70NGQf6fGrmLhwCez50oNskVsASvwYR%2FlISxWQ9IKQzNfMiV3rDZS6C%2FGN88taZ6sO%2BQSQDJIeoLr%2FUlbUHidUPVcGtk4u58YBkSh1fiEb0AcFqECOCzyMh0uhYDcQoMBWnS2ZTZ7Dx59GeF%2FVp%2FhVh3r71vx%2B6DDZNfjrM3QJBZPLTKU0xsHSslmmalt%2FkCCM0PQkzIU26E0GJKapSPFUI2K1sxYJ%2B0mdHfXsxe%2Fz9MG6zCA7xqMDK4k5QzyxJzhU0fVzxsHkxqZewvJkP%2FSOIKbiJjkw%2FqmwddXVTyEosiGaxU%2FuXiZUi89F). Team, Earlier today, Ohio's Supreme Court tossed out challenges to the gerrymandered districts drawn up by Republicans last year. Their ruling means that the maps in place last November will remain in place again for 2024. This is now the second election Ohioans will vote in with unconstitutional maps. Multiple outlets have rated Marcy's district as a _**TOSS UP**_ race and already Republicans are lining up to try to defeat us next November. We cannot let them. name: Team Peterson
subject: FWD: I’m comfortable in a hard hat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter – Team Peterson here! We wanted to make sure you saw Lynn's earlier message below. **Let us tell you, Lynn is one the hardest working leaders we've ever seen.** Whether it's a tough conversation or a construction site — Lynn is consistently doing anything it takes to help her community – _and she delivers_. **[We're building a coalition of people who are ready for concrete results in Congress. Will you join and help fuel the fight with an $3 donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373133/425930569/974409837?refcode=2023-09-07-hardhatfwd&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8ef2cb54-c24d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWYyY2I1NC1jMjRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG4H-KDqWqVvZzBZ-hgiGOnajMD0KUZFITZi9aEFet8=)** More soon, _Team Peterson_ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Lynn Peterson <info@electlynnpeterson.com> Date: Fri, Aug 18, 2023 at 9:14 AM Subject: I'm comfortable in a hard hat To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Forwarded Message |
---
Peter, **_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373134/425930570/974409837?refcode=2023-09-07-hardhatfwd&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8ef2cb54-c24d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWYyY2I1NC1jMjRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG4H-KDqWqVvZzBZ-hgiGOnajMD0KUZFITZi9aEFet8=)_**
I've been wearing a hard hat since I was 19 years old and testing the welds on bridges. So you can trust me when I say **_I'm comfortable in a hard hat._**
I love being IN the work and being part of the team that gets things done.
To me, that's what good leadership is all about.
Throughout my time as a public servant, I've worked hard to bring all communities to the decision-making table. I've fought to ensure that _people_ (not powerful interests) are who drive the discussion.
**I'll bring this same leadership to Washington and build coalitions to make Congress work for**** _everyone_****, not the select few.**
I'm ready to get to work improving our infrastructure, creating more affordable housing solutions, connecting people with jobs and opportunities, and protecting our fundamental rights. I'm committed to fighting for _every_ community in Oregon's Fifth Congressional District.
I've never put up with petty obstructionism or political games, and I'm not going to start now.
**Change won't be easy. It takes work. But I'm comfortable constructing concrete solutions that build opportunities for the community, even if that means I have to put on my hard hat.**
Let's get sh!t done.
_Lynn_

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter – Team Peterson here! We wanted to make sure you saw Lynn's earlier message below. Let us tell you, Lynn is one the hardest working leaders we've ever seen. Whether it's a tough conversation or a construction site — Lynn is consistently doing anything it takes to help her community – and she delivers. = More soon, Team Peterson \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Lynn Peterson <info@electlynnpeterson.com> Date: Fri, Aug 18, 2023 at 9:14 AM Subject: I'm comfortable in a hard hat To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Forwarded Message | Peter, = I've been wearing a hard hat since I was 19 years old and testing the welds on bridges. So you can trust me when I say I'm comfortable in a hard hat. I love being IN the work and being part of the team that gets things done. To me, that's what good leadership is all about. Throughout my time as a public servant, I've worked hard to bring all communities to the decision-making table. I've fought to ensure that people (not powerful interests) are who drive the discussion. I'll bring this same leadership to Washington and build coalitions to make Congress work for everyone, not the select few. I'm ready to get to work improving our infrastructure, creating more affordable housing solutions, connecting people with jobs and opportunities, and protecting our fundamental rights. I'm committed to fighting for every community in Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. I've never put up with petty obstructionism or political games, and I'm not going to start now. Change won't be easy. It takes work. But I'm comfortable constructing concrete solutions that build opportunities for the community, even if that means I have to put on my hard hat. Let's get sh!t done. name: Sepi Shyne
subject: Six years ago, Trump tried to repeal DACA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know what it's like to grow up undocumented, friend. I know from experience that we need real immigration reform.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373158/425930650/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230907_ss_DACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY2NWY2N2EtYzI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f2hNMKQPTwy18KtIpODXpD1jPq_cptXKKVDGRIRBfvs=)
---
This week marks a disgraceful milestone in recent history, friend. Six years ago, the Trump administration announced its plan to repeal DACA, the program that allows undocumented immigrants who came to the U.S. as children to get an education, work, and pursue their American dreams. **We're a nation of immigrants, friend, and despite the right-wing talking points, we know that there's enough wealth in our country for us ALL to prosper.** I know as well as anyone that our immigration system is broken. I was undocumented until I was sixteen years old — despite calling the United States home since before I was in kindergarten. It's time to pass real immigration reform that recognizes the promise inherent in all of our people, and that provides a fair and accessible pathway to legal status and citizenship. Our communities are stronger when we're all safe, welcome, and given the opportunity to flourish. [**Friend, if you agree with me, will you support my campaign to fight for immigration reform in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373159/425930651/-1233768706?refcode=230907_ss_DACA_l1&ms=230907_ss_DACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGY2NWY2N2EtYzI0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f2hNMKQPTwy18KtIpODXpD1jPq_cptXKKVDGRIRBfvs=) clean_body: I know what it's like to grow up undocumented, friend. I know from experience that we need real immigration reform. | | = This week marks a disgraceful milestone in recent history, friend. Six years ago, the Trump administration announced its plan to repeal DACA, the program that allows undocumented immigrants who came to the U.S. as children to get an education, work, and pursue their American dreams. We're a nation of immigrants, friend, and despite the right-wing talking points, we know that there's enough wealth in our country for us ALL to prosper. I know as well as anyone that our immigration system is broken. I was undocumented until I was sixteen years old — despite calling the United States home since before I was in kindergarten. It's time to pass real immigration reform that recognizes the promise inherent in all of our people, and that provides a fair and accessible pathway to legal status and citizenship. Our communities are stronger when we're all safe, welcome, and given the opportunity to flourish. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = With gratitude, Mayor Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom | Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? = = PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Help us re-elect Summer Lee next year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Today, Justice Democrats-endorsed U.S. Rep. Summer Lee just officially
launched her re-election campaign for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th
district, and we couldn’t be more proud to stand by her again.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137866?refcode=em20230907-30745&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb ]Will you split a grassroots contribution between Summer and Justice
Democrats today to help us keep a young, bold, woman of color in this
crucial swing seat?

Justice Democrats has stood by Summer since Day 1 when she first ran for
Congress in 2022. She ran a working-class, people-powered campaign to
become the first Black Congresswoman in Pennsylvania despite the millions
of dollars in attacks from corporate and Republican-funded SuperPACs.

AIPAC alone dumped more than $3 million into this race, spreading ugly
lies in attack ads against Summer in both the primary and general
elections. With your support, we had the vision and the people to overcome
their smear tactics and to rock the political status quo last November.

But reports already indicate AIPAC is recruiting candidates to challenge
Summer in 2024 and try to make her a one-term Congressmember. We can’t let
them succeed.

Summer is a former state legislator and dedicated organizer, activist, and
advocate for social justice who has already made a big impact during her
first eight months in Congress, fighting for police reform, workers’
rights, a livable wage, and more.

Our progressive movement sent shockwaves to the system when we helped
Summer win in one of the biggest progressive electoral victories to date.
Now, we have to do it again to keep her in Congress next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137866?refcode=em20230907-30745&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb ]Please help us kick Summer’s re-election campaign off strong: split a
donation of $3 or more between Summer and Justice Democrats
today to ensure we win in 2024!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137866?refcode=em20230907-30745&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230907-30745-footer&t=1024&refcode2=30745_1203867_jpmWZb&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=30745%2E1203867%2EjpmWZb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: FW: “60 days to beat [Trump]”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
The special interest RINOs are coming for us...

The special interest RINOs are coming for us...
| | Friend,
---
Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO's who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the _primary_ are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month?
And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, _**" We've got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days"**_?
Well, I've been thinking...
_What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully? _
And I know just the thing...
**We 're going to kick off our largest fundraising SURGE of the entire campaign to date! **
Which is why I've set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of **60,000 grassroots** donations over the RINO's** "60-day window." **

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I'm releasing this limited t-shirt so you can show your support and bring attention to the Deep State's existence. We are only printing 500 of them. When they're gone, they're gone. | Buying this limited edition t-shirt, proves you support: A relentless pursuit of the truth, peeling back layer after layer of their deceptions. The bolstering of our defenses, protecting ourselves and our communities from their influence. The crafting of a future free from the strings of shadowy puppet masters. The Deep State might believe they're untouchable, hidden deep within the maze of bureaucracy and secrecy. But we're here to expose them with TRUTH. I know I can count on you. In Truth, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. We must demand a transparent, honest government without an unaccountable fourth branch. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Save Florida’s manatees from cruise ship pollution
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972444?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Manatees are DYING OUT rapidly, and Big Cruise must be held accountable for driving these beloved sea mammals closer to EXTINCTION. [Take action now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Over the last 2 years, the manatee population has drastically declined. 2021 was the **_DEADLIEST_****year on record** with **_OVER A THOUSAND_** of these gentle giants dying out. And last year, at least another 800 more Florida manatees died -- including a whopping **261** that all died in a period of _just a few weeks!_ These peaceful marine animals are **_STARVING TO DEATH_** due to _excessive loss_ of their critical food source: **seagrass**. And it’s all because corporations like Big Cruise care more about their bottom line than the survival of these beloved mammals. These profit-driven cruise companies carelessly (and sometimes illegally) dump tons of **TOXIC WASTE** into the ocean, __DESTROYING_ _sensitive manatee habitats and __WIPING OUT__ the seagrass these innocent creatures depend on for survival. **_Friend, time is running out to SAVE innocent manatees from corporate cruise ship pollution that’s driving them closer to EXTINCTION. _[Will you please take urgent action right now to fight back against Big Cruise and protect the last remaining manatees before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972447?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**_Manatees CANNOT SURVIVE without seagrass _**\-- it’s their primary source of nutrition and what they depend on for oxygen. But this vital plant also plays a crucial role in our coastal communities and environment by storing** almost a fifth** of the world’s ocean carbon, _keeping us all safe from worsening climate crisis impacts._
But the _toxic wastewater, sand, and contaminants_ that are churned up by cruise ships compromise the water quality irreparably and contribute to the **unrecoverable destruction of seagrass beds.**
Our fragile oceanic ecosystem and the survival of manatees are in **GRAVE DANGER** without seagrass, so we must **_STOP Big Cruise’s corporate greed_** from decimating what’s left of this important sea vegetation. **[Add your name right now to protect manatees and our oceans from the cruise industry’s environmental destruction!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972448?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1972447?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thanks for defending manatees and our oceans,
Friends of the Earth
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D257616&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

body:
Become a Nebraska Warrior Today | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/join-negop-and-be-entered-to-win-football-tickets?e=25844e23a8)

---
| Peter,
---
| **HELP US ELECT STRONG CONSERVATIVE LEADERS IN NEBRASKA!**
I want to let you in on a secret you may not know. In 2017, there were 504 elected Democrats across Nebraska; in 2022 there are now 902! _See the graphic from NDP Facebook page._ ******Where are the 902 Democrats?** They are on your local school boards (244 school boards in Nebraska), 19 Educational Services Units, Five Community College Boards, Natural Resource Districts, city councils, County Clerks (who run your local elections). In fact, other than the 17 Democrat State Senators and One very Liberal Mayor of Lincoln...the **remaining 884 Democrats are in YOUR local communities.**

This demonstrates that _we have no time to waste_ when it comes to gaining the ground back to protect our **Republican** values in Nebraska.

**There’s no time like the present, and from today until Oct. 18th we are holding a membership drive that complements the inner warrior in all of us. All new memberships during this time will be entered into a drawing for two football tickets to the Nebraska v. Northwestern game on Oct. 21st!

This game will be a great time to celebrate our inner warrior as this year marks the 100 year anniversary of the Memorial Stadium Celebration. We will top off the day with a Husker Tailgate celebration for NEGOP+ Booster Members, and we hope you’ll be joining us!** [****](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=86c84ff361&e=25844e23a8) By joining **NEGOP+** Peter, you’ll be joining the ranks with your active, fellow Nebraska **Republicans** while enjoying _exclusive member benefits_. Your support empowers us to leverage our momentum of advancing your Conservative values...together!
**HELP US ELECT REPUBLICANS AND DEFEND OUR PLATFORM!**
There are four **NEGOP+** membership levels to choose from, and we invite you to sign up for this extraordinary opportunity to participate during these historic times. Contribute to our **Republican** momentum by **JOINING TODAY:**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Public education was my ticket to opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wouldn’t be where I am without East Ramapo public schools
Team, students across the Hudson Valley are headed back to the classroom this week, ready to face the challenges and opportunities of the 2023-24 school year.

As a graduate of East Ramapo public schools, I understand firsthand the transformative power of education. Growing up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, public education was my only ticket to opportunity. It paved the way for me to get involved in politics and attend Stanford University and Harvard Law.

**A high-quality education is the pathway to upward mobility and the backbone of a healthy, functioning democracy.** That’s why I helped pass the American Rescue Plan Act, which brought hundreds of millions of dollars to schools throughout New York’s 17th Congressional District. It’s also why I introduced the **Strength in Diversity Act** to fund equity and inclusion programs in our schools, and **pushed for over $3.6 billion** in funding for public schools most in need right here in New York. But there’s so much work left to do to ensure our schools, including in East Ramapo, live up to the promise of this country. That’s why I will always be a fierce defender of a high-quality education for every student.

[**But I’m not done fighting. As students head back to school, add your name to join me and call on Congress to defend public education, fund mental health services, expand universal pre-K programs, and more so that every student—no matter what zip code they’re in—has the opportunity to succeed.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373754/425932661/1901465962?ms=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&contactdata=WPPeQPam2IQ4FmQS9qJuLlaYaO0zPUudLmyruzXeneDrCZIqUPPSiRQ59MZHRD9S5sgxYcm4pIjUoI+hprQKslt/CNTaMHztQ05wP8jLwzc=&refcode2=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0MmUyNC1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTD2XUdruzLGfBV-Fm4XeetWXCOraci72Da2QVm7Yno=&emci=3d4b58d5-954d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373755/425932662/1901465962?ms=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&contactdata=WPPeQPam2IQ4FmQS9qJuLlaYaO0zPUudLmyruzXeneDrCZIqUPPSiRQ59MZHRD9S5sgxYcm4pIjUoI+hprQKslt/CNTaMHztQ05wP8jLwzc=&refcode2=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0MmUyNC1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTD2XUdruzLGfBV-Fm4XeetWXCOraci72Da2QVm7Yno=&emci=3d4b58d5-954d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373756/425932663/1901465962?ms=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&contactdata=WPPeQPam2IQ4FmQS9qJuLlaYaO0zPUudLmyruzXeneDrCZIqUPPSiRQ59MZHRD9S5sgxYcm4pIjUoI+hprQKslt/CNTaMHztQ05wP8jLwzc=&refcode2=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0MmUyNC1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTD2XUdruzLGfBV-Fm4XeetWXCOraci72Da2QVm7Yno=&emci=3d4b58d5-954d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)
It’s no secret the GOP is hellbent on dismantling our public education system. This year, the House GOP proposed legislation to gut critical programs for low-income students and students with disabilities, and tried to block student debt relief for millions of borrowers.

**And last month, Republican presidential contenders went on stage calling for the _elimination_ of the Department of Education entirely.**

The path to success for millions of young people depends on access to a high-quality education, and I refuse to stand by and watch an extremist GOP continue to strip away that opportunity for our children and students.

[**Add your name to the petition to call on Congress to defend our public schools from these extremist attacks and protect the right to a high-quality education for every child today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69373757/425932664/1901465962?ms=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230907_B2S_adv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&contactdata=WPPeQPam2IQ4FmQS9qJuLlaYaO0zPUudLmyruzXeneDrCZIqUPPSiRQ59MZHRD9S5sgxYcm4pIjUoI+hprQKslt/CNTaMHztQ05wP8jLwzc=&refcode2=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0MmUyNC1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTD2XUdruzLGfBV-Fm4XeetWXCOraci72Da2QVm7Yno=&emci=3d4b58d5-954d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=dea42e24-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)

Let's go,

Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. clean_body: I wouldn’t be where I am without East Ramapo public schools Team, students across the Hudson Valley are headed back to the classroom this week, ready to face the challenges and opportunities of the 2023-24 school year. As a graduate of East Ramapo public schools, I understand firsthand the transformative power of education. Growing up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, public education was my only ticket to opportunity. It paved the way for me to get involved in politics and attend Stanford University and Harvard Law. A high-quality education is the pathway to upward mobility and the backbone of a healthy, functioning democracy. That’s why I helped pass the American Rescue Plan Act, which brought hundreds of millions of dollars to schools throughout New York’s 17th Congressional District. It’s also why I introduced the Strength in Diversity Act to fund equity and inclusion programs in our schools, and pushed for over $3.6 billion in funding for public schools most in need right here in New York. But there’s so much work left to do to ensure our schools, including in East Ramapo, live up to the promise of this country. That’s why I will always be a fierce defender of a high-quality education for every student. It’s no secret the GOP is hellbent on dismantling our public education system. This year, the House GOP proposed legislation to gut critical programs for low-income students and students with disabilities, and tried to block student debt relief for millions of borrowers. And last month, Republican presidential contenders went on stage calling for the elimination of the Department of Education entirely. The path to success for millions of young people depends on access to a high-quality education, and I refuse to stand by and watch an extremist GOP continue to strip away that opportunity for our children and students. Let's go, Mondaire | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

One candidate has the courage to stand up and say, _**" NO MORE."**_ That candidate is Matt Dolan: **[" I'm Matt Dolan. Here at our southern border, fentanyl is flooding into America. This poison is a weapon of mass destruction."](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=c2feef87778a4d98afbb574f284e7371&_e=JyaUfmXhlbljRiAc_4FZVZNBE3Kukvq5c5SVKWdvojwi0k4WghG0YBmlS2yNFXkYUYGtzhB9o0uw-RmDg1NfK63PxrPp4GZtZ9aeLJdHcNskPsxjKDxt8wnZRfnX7IRaCFNH31Mv6mLqdUFmuIuuqO4IGOlunzN674RhFTbSVN2Dkld73Y4XkvFJxrm_hDugZRE0iS7WWyA_mGuB-x07bAspD35XyMG45UX5R_zHTJB021l2MnxDM1UdSW5t_iwrH2FCmcR1YyjZbPR7MPfHNkEgvJ3BfY3rg7ShIAUFwW_T02wNNgEnf_trN_fx_M-I)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Where Are You Going, Joe?
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! Kamala is[ _ready to step into the role_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-y/) of president.**
**Don't Call 911** Police in this Texas city are**[asking residents to call 311 if they get robbed](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-j/) **near an ATM as the department struggles amid an increase in urban crime and staffing shortages. **Fauci Knew** **[Fauci had been informed by January 2020](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-t/) **that his institute had funded the discovery and study of dozens of novel coronaviruses at the Wuhan Institute of Virology. **Where You Going, Joe?** **[Joe walked off before the end of a Medal of Honor ceremony](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-i/)** for a Vietnam helicopter pilot. _What on earth could be more important?_ KJP has explained **[why Biden bolted for the door](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-d/).** **McCarthy's Job in Jeopardy?** Matt Gaetz said **[conservative Americans are increasingly frustrated with the inaction of House Republicans concerning Biden's corruption](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-h/)**, and that Speaker Kevin McCarthy may pay the price for that.

**Is This Really Illegal?** Coast Guard officials arrested a man**[after they intercepted his unusual hamster wheel contraption](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-k/) **that he was allegedly attempting to 'run' to London. [_**Let**_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-u/)**[ _'s _](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-p/)[have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-x/)! **😆
* **[Sure.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-m/)**
* Did you**[hear](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-c/)?**
* Only, well**,[everybody](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-q/).**
* No one even **[noticed](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-a/).**

**Countdown to the 2nd Republican Primary Debate!** [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-ajrjljk-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Last week’s Farm Progress show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, For decades, farmers and their needs have been overlooked by our leaders in Washington, despite being the backbone of communities across our district. **That’s why working on behalf of farmers and ensuring they have a seat at the table continues to be one of my top priorities in Congress.** As a member of the House Agriculture Committee, I have been working alongside my colleagues to advocate for young and beginning farmers to ensure they have the tools to thrive and feed our families for generations to come. Last week, I attended the annual Farm Progress Show in Decatur, Illinois, which is one of the largest agricultural events in our nation, bringing out thousands of family farmers and industry leaders to showcase the newest farming innovations. I was honored to host U.S. Agriculture Secretary Tom Vilsack at my Agriculture Advisory Council meeting at the Farm Progress Show to talk about how far we’ve come and look ahead to how we can continue investing in our farmers and communities. I look forward to getting legislation like the 2023 Farm Bill across the finish line and bringing funding back to our district to support farmers, advance farming technology, and grow our rural economies. **[But I can’t do this work alone. Friend, can you pitch in $5 today to fuel my work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69374193/425934032/1065927168?amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230907_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmNiNTdkYy1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFs3OfcAiPrStT4qbn3NVjbQqUUB7Z3HFLh7qidfTZc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69374194/425934033/-1830029554?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230907_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmNiNTdkYy1jNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFs3OfcAiPrStT4qbn3NVjbQqUUB7Z3HFLh7qidfTZc=)
