name: CADEM
subject: September Newsletter: Forever Organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state.
From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/72374C4E544D55334F7642576D577362737148414E486E555849674C78675761376C72445651494C53355450614D366567676D2F5844545A4F6274593759526F/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%2810%29.png]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/72374C4E544D55334F7642576D577362737148414E486E555849674C78675761376C72445651494C53355450614D366567676D2F5844545A4F6274593759526F/editor_images/camprofile.jpeg]
Cameron Forgey
CADEM Digital Organizing Manager
Hi Democrats!
My name is Cameron Forgey, and I'm proud to join the Forever Organizing team as the Digital Organizing Manager.
I'm also proud to be a product of California's Central Valley, raised in Visalia and currently living in Fresno. Working as a community organizer since high school, I saw firsthand the impacts local, state, and national policies have on our neighborhoods.
In 2018, I saw Congressman Devin Nunes, the Republican who represented my hometown for over a decade, put the needs of Donald Trump above the needs of my community. I couldn't sit idly by, and I found a passion working in Democratic campaigns. I joined Democrat Andrew Janz' Campaign for Congress against the disgraced Devin Nunes as an intern, training volunteers, knocking doors, and organizing online.
Although we came a few points short of flipping the district, I was amazed by the people-powered movement we were able to create online and in-district -- a movement for better Representation in California's Central Valley. Since then, I continued my work across the State, with a specific focus on activating new and young voters in the Valley.
For me, community organizing isn't just my career -- it's a lifelong passion. The ability to reach first time voters, take collective action, and advocate for our local communities drives me to continue my work.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Bundling Action
CADEM's Forever Organizing Team was proud to host a back-to-school bundling action for students in the Central Valley.
With dozens of volunteers helping, hundreds of backpacks and back-to-school supplies were prepared and delivered to students in Visalia.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Untitled%20design%20%2810%29.png]
Town Hall
CADEM Chair Rusty Hicks was joined by United States Senator Alex Padilla to be the hosts of a town hall meeting.
Together, they discussed the importance of activating rural regions of California, and the real difference a Democratic majority in Congress makes to our communities.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Untitled%20design%20%282%29.png]
Cafecito VOTA
With the help of some incredible panelists and participants, including CADEM Executive Director Yvette Martinez, Attorney General Rob Bonta, and California State Assembly Member Esmeralda Soria, we celebrated the launch of our VOTA program!
We're proud to activate and empower Latino voters in every corner of California, and the launch of the VOTA program emphasizes our commitment to activating neighborhoods of Spanish speaking voters across our State.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/IRA%20%282%29.png] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Untitled%20design%20%2812%29.png] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Defeat MAGA Republicans Day of Action
Team Forever Organizing led a powerful Day of Action targeting five vulnerable House Republicans in California by mobilizing and energizing Democratic voters.
We were thrilled to be joined by Congressman Pete Aguilar, Pro Tem Toni Atkins, and Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, along with over one-hundred activists from across California.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Campus Activation cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
In August, team CADEM welcomed students across California back to school by registering first time voters on College campuses.
CADEM Organizer Christian is leading the charge at Fresno State University, activating a new generation of Central Valley students.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/IRA%20%285%29.png] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Rally for Reproductive Rights!
Democrats in Northern California are fired up and ready to unseat Republican Kevin Kiley in CA3!
CADEM Organizer Sue led the charge against Kiley's extreme anti-choice policies by organizing rallies in Rocklin, Nevada City, Quincy, South Lake Tahoe, and Mammoth Lakes.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/IRA%20%287%29.png] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/IRA%20%289%29.png] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/IRA%20%288%29.png]
Moral Mondays
South Central Valley Democrats are also standing up to their Republican Representative David Valadao!
Forever Organizing Team Member Dave Perelman hosts "Moral Mondays" once monthly, bringing local activists together to hold Valadao's feet to the fire on issues like reproductive care, Social Security & Medicare, and support for teachers.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%288%29.png]
The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/IRA%20%281%29.png]
Yvette Benton
Tehachapi Mountain Democratic Club
Yvette Benton is the President of the Tehachapi Mountain Democratic Club in Kern County.
Yvette was born and raised in California. Originally from Orange County, she moved to Tehachapi in the year 2007.
She has always been a Democrat, and began her activism as a teenager registering voters for the Democratic party. As someone who always stood up for her truths and beliefs, she brought like-minded Democrats in her Conservative town together. In 2020, Yvette put up a billboard supporting President Biden and Vice President Harris through grassroots fundraising. In the process, she motivated a community for the first time to come out and proudly voice their beliefs. Yvette believes that putting up the billboard "introduced her to the community, and the community to each other."
Since then, Yvette and the Tehachapi Mountain Democrats have focused on becoming a household name in the community, with hopes that more Democrats will find a home in Tehachapi.
From the start of the year, Yvette has welcomed over 25 new members, and is thrilled to reach more activists in her town.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%287%29.png]
Looking for a way to get involved in mobilizing or registering voters in your community? We want you on Team Forever Organizing.
Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on College campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you.
Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground Congressional districts this year.
Statewide Organizing Actions → [cadem.org/takeaction]
Campus Voter Registration → [cadem.org/registervoters]
Day of Action: The House Majority Runs Through California September 30th 10AM → [https://linktr.ee/cadems]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20LogoBar%20%281%29.png]

Sacramento, CA 95811

Together, they discussed the importance of activating rural regions of California, and the real difference a Democratic majority in Congress makes to our communities. cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [] Cafecito VOTA With the help of some incredible panelists and participants, including CADEM Executive Director Yvette Martinez, Attorney General Rob Bonta, and California State Assembly Member Esmeralda Soria, we celebrated the launch of our VOTA program! We're proud to activate and empower Latino voters in every corner of California, and the launch of the VOTA program emphasizes our commitment to activating neighborhoods of Spanish speaking voters across our State. [] [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Defeat MAGA Republicans Day of Action Team Forever Organizing led a powerful Day of Action targeting five vulnerable House Republicans in California by mobilizing and energizing Democratic voters. We were thrilled to be joined by Congressman Pete Aguilar, Pro Tem Toni Atkins, and Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, along with over one-hundred activists from across California. cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Campus Activation cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] In August, team CADEM welcomed students across California back to school by registering first time voters on College campuses. CADEM Organizer Christian is leading the charge at Fresno State University, activating a new generation of Central Valley students. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Rally for Reproductive Rights! Democrats in Northern California are fired up and ready to unseat Republican Kevin Kiley in CA3! CADEM Organizer Sue led the charge against Kiley's extreme anti-choice policies by organizing rallies in Rocklin, Nevada City, Quincy, South Lake Tahoe, and Mammoth Lakes. [] [] [] Moral Mondays South Central Valley Democrats are also standing up to their Republican Representative David Valadao! Forever Organizing Team Member Dave Perelman hosts "Moral Mondays" once monthly, bringing local activists together to hold Valadao's feet to the fire on issues like reproductive care, Social Security & Medicare, and support for teachers. cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [] The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work. [] Yvette Benton Tehachapi Mountain Democratic Club Yvette Benton is the President of the Tehachapi Mountain Democratic Club in Kern County. Yvette was born and raised in California. Originally from Orange County, she moved to Tehachapi in the year 2007. She has always been a Democrat, and began her activism as a teenager registering voters for the Democratic party. As someone who always stood up for her truths and beliefs, she brought like-minded Democrats in her Conservative town together. In 2020, Yvette put up a billboard supporting President Biden and Vice President Harris through grassroots fundraising. In the process, she motivated a community for the first time to come out and proudly voice their beliefs. Yvette believes that putting up the billboard "introduced her to the community, and the community to each other." Since then, Yvette and the Tehachapi Mountain Democrats have focused on becoming a household name in the community, with hopes that more Democrats will find a home in Tehachapi. From the start of the year, Yvette has welcomed over 25 new members, and is thrilled to reach more activists in her town. [] Looking for a way to get involved in mobilizing or registering voters in your community? We want you on Team Forever Organizing. Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on College campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you. Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground Congressional districts this year. Statewide Organizing Actions → [cadem.org/takeaction] Campus Voter Registration → [cadem.org/registervoters] Day of Action: The House Majority Runs Through California September 30th 10AM → [] [] Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Another way Republicans are trying to drag us backwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Let me know if you agree: Congress should preserve the funding that’s helping to put our tax system on the side of working families, not the ultra-rich.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=49%2E4032634%2EyA1ZuS)
---
Here’s the way I see it: **If working people are having an easier time getting tax refunds, and the ultra-rich are having a harder time cheating on their taxes, then things are headed in the right direction.** But Republicans in Congress seem to disagree. They’re trying to strip away the new resources that have helped the IRS improve its customer service and crack down on wealthy tax cheats. They’re trying to take us back to the days when they starved the IRS of funding, which made it easier for millionaires and billionaires to avoid paying what they owe. [**I’m fighting back — and I’m asking you to add your name if you agree: Congress should preserve the funding that’s helping to put our tax system on the side of working families, not the ultra-rich.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-irs-funding/?source=EMZ16L_TAX_E_20230907_V1S1_AK_F17&t=8&akid=49%2E4032634%2EyA1ZuS) | [**ADD MY NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-irs-funding/?source=EMZ16L_TAX_E_20230907_V1S1_AK_F17&t=9&akid=49%2E4032634%2EyA1ZuS)
---
Democrats passed new funding for the IRS last year — and it’s already making a difference. Here’s some of the progress the IRS has made:
* Reduced wait times for customer service calls from 28 minutes to 3 minutes
* Cleared a backlog of over 20 million unprocessed tax returns
* Recovered $38 million from 175 millionaire tax cheats, with more to come

Great, right? Well, Republicans in Congress voted against this funding, and now they’re trying to rip it away.
If they get their way and slash IRS funding, they’ll clear the way for other wealthy tax cheats to get off scot-free.
But the improvements we’re already seeing are a sign that we can get our government to work for working people, not the wealthy and well-connected — if we fight to pass policies and funding that make a real difference. And this fight isn’t over. Side by side, let’s do everything we can to stop Congressional Republicans from taking a sledgehammer to the progress we’ve made.
[**Sign on here if you oppose the GOP’s efforts to make tax time harder for working people and to tilt our tax system in favor of wealthy cheaters.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-irs-funding/?source=EMZ16L_TAX_E_20230907_V1S1_AK_F17&t=10&akid=49%2E4032634%2EyA1ZuS)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: BIG NEWS: We have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please, split a contribution between Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for U.S. Senate and GIFFORDS PAC today
#

Hi there. Below is a message from Elissa Slotkin, the GIFFORDS-endorsed candidate running for U.S. Senate in Michigan. Just yesterday, a serious Republican opponent entered her race, and she needs our help.
[**Click here to split a contribution between Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for U.S. Senate and GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23-slotkin.n3WbRM&refcode=em230907-1-15&t=1&akid=6498%2E3935704%2EznYAx4)
-- The GIFFORDS Team
Friends --
I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: **After six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race.**
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23-slotkin.n3WbRM&refcode=em230907-1-15&t=2&akid=6498%2E3935704%2EznYAx4)**
While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to get into this race. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary on the other side. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat.
But as the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who my new opponent Mike Rogers is:
Mike Rogers isn’t just opposed to any new gun safety legislation -- he voted in Congress to protect gun manufacturers from lawsuits and to make it easier to carry deadly weapons across state lines.
Michiganders deserve better.
I am grateful to have been the first U.S. Senate candidate that GIFFORDS endorsed this election cycle. I have made it my priority in the House of Representatives to support commonsense gun safety legislation such as universal background checks and safe storage laws.
Mike Rogers’ entry into the race will make this race competitive -- and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more). **Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**
[**So given this important inflection point in the campaign, I’d love for you to consider splitting a contribution of $5 between my campaign for U.S. Senate and GIFFORDS PAC. Every donation following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23-slotkin.n3WbRM&refcode=em230907-1-15&t=3&akid=6498%2E3935704%2EznYAx4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Elissa Slotkin and GIFFORDS PAC instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/20617?c0=giffords-em-sep23-slotkin.eJMFVY&t=22&akid=6498%2E3935704%2EznYAx4)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-sep23-slotkin.lbIPp_&refcode=em230907-1-15&t=23&akid=6498%2E3935704%2EznYAx4)**
---

Many, many thanks for your support.
Elissa

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Biden is selling off our wall, bit by bit.
body:

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The DeSantis Super PAC is at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
We must be doing something right to make the DC Establishment so worried about our grassroots campaign.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=cbe66a56b25e4d7bbd28474d663dda8e&_t=61QFYYKEXSW2UTsBXWfdMdoxKNTnmhsl70dEnAx231y8O--TsHBPrRbTBbYyRPTw2odc6Z7SI6NiYjKpsFZLXxXw1vNR8DGeOL0QELl8brM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=cbe66a56b25e4d7bbd28474d663dda8e&_t=61QFYYKEXSW2UTsBXWfdMdoxKNTnmhsl70dEnAx231y8O--TsHBPrRbTBbYyRPTw2odc6Z7SI6NiYjKpsFZLXxXw1vNR8DGeOL0QELl8brM%3D)

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cbe66a56b25e4d7bbd28474d663dda8e&_e=stP9N4NTKW8sVuim8ru-40tpvwge8K_sTdKCSYSPR7u9SngYN7dWg8XZsnWzgYMGVs87XWOTlmy1C4WOSnxr-_KDfv4Ou0mWtQJ5PnQCa7XSbOvgHN9NeSb9W7HxkVS6cCHQ7eRUMG_UhJMnsPBWgMLgtp7ExKdICoNW7qRJ8qELA-o-L0iOLFhy6H2ZCehx-Jy9TRu46DpTp9XHOLpO15Ki7tADlOQ4GuxDFb-V5tmYTtvE5FZKLHdvVl6iaC1YaXd7Dvvy9IPDxPPiXVJ2rhiL_thN7ubcWXvABrEbBa2UiyRwQv1pVlTvVFAPxknrGtCpMMHq8WHWzZMktfvr9bf250CpMNCrU-BOK3mhiuYtt11Qw4JoRkGpQYFIp7CW_LoHQt2Gx4xuONrodjColA%3D%3D)

> _The top strategist for Ron DeSantis' super PAC privately told donors that Vivek Ramaswamy posed a threat to the Florida governor - and bragged that the super PAC was behind an avalanche of opposition research targeting the rival candidate._
> - Politico 9/3/23

Fellow American - The DC Establishment is worried.

The chief strategist for the Ron DeSantis Super PAC was caught on tape privately telling donors that not only do I pose a "threat," but he is releasing "dirt" on me.

These games are why people are fed up with career politicians and their advisors. That's why I am running a different type of campaign.

Unlike my opponents, I don't have a Super PAC spending millions of dollars. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

In the wake of last month's Ohio special election, the resounding message echoing there and beyond the state’s borders is unequivocal: **We have had enough.** Voters across the nation want a more representative democracy and will not tolerate the anti-democratic maneuverings of dishonest politicians seeking to diminish our voting power through the tactics of gerrymandering and deceptive ballot initiatives.
This victory in Ohio is a testament to the power of grassroots action and the unwavering dedication of people like you. But as we celebrate this moment, let us not forget that our journey towards a more fair democracy is far from over and we can’t press onward without your support.

All On The Line’s movement is not confined by a single election result; it is a relentless march towards a higher ideal – an ideal where every voter is empowered, transparency is non-negotiable, and electoral maps accurately reflect the will of the people. And while we have secured victory in Ohio, we must acknowledge that the road ahead is challenging.
In states like Georgia, Florida, and Alabama the fight for fair maps is ongoing. Map redraws are on the horizon across the nation, demanding our preparedness to engage, organize, and advocate for change that can reshape the trajectory of our democracy.
[**Make no mistake -- the forces of gerrymandering and political manipulation are persistent, but so are we.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69375065/425937098/-737394977?refcode=20230905_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4NDYzZmU2LWM5NGQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dr8rkyVA-r_8gv0u7Xl8JQM7fIVpzgHguFsCSPetopY=)
That is why your support is critical at this moment. By making a donation to All On The Line, you directly contribute to the fight for justice and fairness in our electoral system. We must work together to ensure that lines drawn across the country reflect the collective aspirations of the many, not the vested interests of a few.

body:
I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next...

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kE1zsjAUhX_NZScTTiLIIouXV3HVVUf3l-QimQZl-LBDf31Ha7u9H8955nA_xNCuloqKgC74iQDS_whYZn3m0-ltXDcHyTbH7RmXxxL_CZjXQf4uX5BUeg7xMS32ibcGnLUuEZvlpclgkCHp7E6XO2FmRutV45vS5UqEW9fuoLB1SbBQ0KpUBaA08hTsM5ezkiYXgJmMegal7Sgyd-H6IaPnENfU3fok2m6eh-kpVhPqm2_S6-KiLNPPl7v1hPqlTKjvhLr6updVZd4xk66fJei9kWw5Hu5FMlo_fIYYw5QXZNTll_IdAAD___HBX9g) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kL1y6jAQhZ9m3eGRjoSECxX3BkyVEnpZXrAm8s9YdjJ--wyEpD27--03x_dTirfNkf1PQBfbTACpfwSsi7r6y-V93nYnlrvz_or7Y4g3ApZt4r_NF6Tk3sf0SO2xaJ2Gl7dQsJOm0hIaEkXndDiIysDsK2UYzb7SlTSVFwdjrVDGFtFBQIlKWEAomBK-lcF4wY1hwHvS4vmovM3MSxeHD55bH9NWhrEvkuuWZcpPsZpQj21TDmtIvOafqzD2hPqlTKjz2uQwx2mJ45AJ9Tq8koZJ1c9G1FGzXM-nT1vMrp2-YkoxG0ta3H-R3wEAAP__jyVkCA)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views — over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjEPmzAQhX_NsYHss2PCwNCW0qljslaHfQS3NiDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2P4h78fPbQfgXExbsMiKC-AOJR1JMej5_prL-zrH_cnvi6nvgNEMu58__kp6ThSD5ctB0q12skOduKe2k6LVGjxGrplRZqEoa503dx727a0Sxn1OR0S9py5XsUqEQnWkSh0DRITlpDgifDiESgxXuomRNzWfz6h5MjH87GbrEK_VLKnt9iI-CY2R6Jm-AnToVys6UX4LjF-jd5x2tNkZO3lOvF57KlE9R4lPgrb0eyDGpYbQA0F4rs_BFBDVP6kMLpuufiJKChuB1rATWgqFLv9r8-BJ9NC1q83r52i_8CAAD__xu6coo)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated — this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books — and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him:

_“I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.”_

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W)

I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas — we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country — with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I’m super excited by this. Please donate here — every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQhX_NsYHM2RgyMLRN6dQxWavDPoJbOyDbqOLfV0RRx_vu6b2PwurdtPfQvgLi7GwCRJAvgLhleaXL5TPu5TvX5UdzxdvxxDdAzPvK_8lnScWBnD9oey5sr5DqyRTc1_qkalRYYzH3XUfWdko3shGyUbZTbNpRaHWSlhVS4XoUKMVJtIhCoq6QbG00CR41IxKBEo-haorMeXb3H46WnN8rs4TC93POa3qIDYBDYrNFrrwbOWZK1RJvgMMSym9ylu8lBY7OUCpnl_ISd5DDlsNXWrZoGOT5bjygPlBg67YA8jzGJ8kcj3vKti5ib9df571LugUlbg9Ds4S_AAAA___AXG4W)

clean_body: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next... | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views — over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated — this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books — and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him: “I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.” I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas — we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country — with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations! So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education — real, true, good education — that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too: Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens — and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69375423/425938218/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc2NTAyZDMtY2E0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-7SKFJQWlCUesQFm6CeLdl352q4G7WCaSm0UEpTsf8=)
Peter,

As the new school year begins, I can’t help but think about the critical role education plays in our children’s lives and how important it is to fight for, and expand access to, quality education.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69375424/425938219/-129347026?refcode=em-9.7.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc2NTAyZDMtY2E0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-7SKFJQWlCUesQFm6CeLdl352q4G7WCaSm0UEpTsf8=) _Here I am dropping my daughter off at college!_ As a mother of three, and a former litigator and adjunct professor, I’ve seen the power of education first hand. In my pro bono work, I fought for students with special needs to have the access and care they deserve while seeking an education.

**But in the midst of recovering from pandemic learning setbacks, House Republicans want to cut spending on education at every level.** Their proposals are not only out of touch with what our kids are facing in school, but put even more of a burden on our teachers and the most vulnerable students.

This is deeply concerning, but what gives me a chill down my spine is knowing national Republicans could implement these backward policies if they succeed in winning the Presidency and Congress.

It’s not an overstatement to say our children’s future makes winning our campaign in CA-47 even more important.

[**Republicans hold a five seat majority in the House, and are doing everything possible to not just hold power, but expand it. If we want to keep this open seat blue, flip the House majority, and pursue education policies that benefit our students, we need our grassroots supporters to step up. name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Humbly asking for $3 tonight. Yes, just $3.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
$3.
That is the contribution Ruben Gallego is HUMBLY asking you to make tonight. Yes, just $3. One time. Tonight. Please.
$3 to help us catch up on the fundraising shortfall we’ve seen this quarter. Time is ticking down before our FEC deadline on September 30th.
$3 because Blake Masters is getting into this race. Because Kyrsten Sinema is ramping up her fundraising. Because Kari Lake is hiring staff.
$3 because Ruben is going to be targeted by all of them and this campaign is funded by lots and lots of people giving $3.
More than 100,000 people have donated to this campaign. That’s huge. But even with that, we’re still projecting to fall short of our goals before our quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month. Those donors are really hoping you’ll join them and do the same. Please.
[**Can Ruben Gallego count on you to make your first $3 contribution tonight? Help us catch up on our goals so we put up a strong report for Ruben, one that will help us pull in endorsements and win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-2-asp&t=1&akid=1159%2E734936%2Ek8F01C)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230907-2-asp&amount=3&t=2&akid=1159%2E734936%2Ek8F01C)
Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means the world to Ruben, and to our chances.
\- Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1159%2E734936%2Ek8F01C). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1159_734936_k8F01C&akid=1159%2E734936%2Ek8F01C)

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: a crucial voice at the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69375651/425939023/16806365?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230907_FR_VotingRights_0_3MO_Brian_na_na_AlabamaMaps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYzZDg2ZmUtY2I0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BJPkFkYiKwYiuXaxm1LEetUvXm_CZVNN3wfWNv5YzhA=) Peter, the decision to strike down Alabama’s Congressional map is a huge win for Black voters in the state. **But let me make this clear: Republicans will not stop working to suppress Black votes anytime soon.**

58 years after the passage of the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ we are STILL fighting to ensure that all Americans have the right to vote. Through gerrymandering and repressive voting laws, Republicans have stacked election after election in their favor by excluding Black voters from our democracy.

**Why? Because they’re terrified of progress.** They know suppressing Black votes is their only means of maintaining their majority in the House and in state legislatures across the country.

I’m running for Congress because I know we need more voices like mine at the table to help expand voting rights for all — _**because our Democracy functions best when all eligible have easy access to the ballot box.**_ But I can’t do it alone.

[Will you make a contribution of $10 or any amount towards my campaign so I can serve as this necessary voice in Congress? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69375654/425939024/16806365?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230907_FR_VotingRights_0_3MO_Brian_na_na_AlabamaMaps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYzZDg2ZmUtY2I0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BJPkFkYiKwYiuXaxm1LEetUvXm_CZVNN3wfWNv5YzhA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

**Peter, our votes matter. If they didn’t, Republicans wouldn't work so hard to suppress them.**

Alabama’s attempt to minimize the Black vote is not an isolated incident — this year alone courts have overturned maps in Louisiana and Florida, and are currently ruling on maps in Wisconsin, Ohio, and Utah.

[We must do better than this, which is why I am answering the call to serve to ensure our most fundamental right as Americans is protected. Will you chip in any amount towards my campaign? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69375672/425939043/16806365?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230907_FR_VotingRights_0_3MO_Brian_na_na_AlabamaMaps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYzZDg2ZmUtY2I0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BJPkFkYiKwYiuXaxm1LEetUvXm_CZVNN3wfWNv5YzhA=)

Thank you for your continued support,

Dr. Brian Williams

clean_body: | | = Peter, the decision to strike down Alabama’s Congressional map is a huge win for Black voters in the state. But let me make this clear: Republicans will not stop working to suppress Black votes anytime soon. 58 years after the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 we are STILL fighting to ensure that all Americans have the right to vote. Through gerrymandering and repressive voting laws, Republicans have stacked election after election in their favor by excluding Black voters from our democracy. Why? Because they’re terrified of progress. They know suppressing Black votes is their only means of maintaining their majority in the House and in state legislatures across the country. I’m running for Congress because I know we need more voices like mine at the table to help expand voting rights for all — because our Democracy functions best when all eligible have easy access to the ballot box. But I can’t do it alone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, our votes matter. If they didn’t, Republicans wouldn't work so hard to suppress them. Alabama’s attempt to minimize the Black vote is not an isolated incident — this year alone courts have overturned maps in Louisiana and Florida, and are currently ruling on maps in Wisconsin, Ohio, and Utah. = Thank you for your continued support, Dr. Brian Williams | | | = | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. As the _Associated Press_ put it, Rogers' announcement "could immediately make the race one of the most competitive in the country." Mike Rogers supports abortion bans with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage; has an A-rating from the NRA; and voted to cut Social Security and Medicare.

Which is to say, based on his record, **this shouldn't be a close race, but we know it will be**. Recent polling shows a statistical dead-heat in both the Senate race and the Presidential race here in Michigan — which means we'll have two really close races to win in this important battleground next year.

Rogers' candidacy makes this race competitive — and expensive. I can't win it without the help of communities like EMILYs List, who fight hard for me and for Democratic pro-choice women like me nationwide.
****So given this important inflection point in the campaign, I'd love for you to consider splitting a contribution between my campaign for U.S. Senate and EMILYs List. Over the last couple of weeks, we’ve seen innocent people fear for their lives at school and in stores.

_This is the reality of the country we live in – we’re living through a gun violence epidemic._

**But here’s the thing: We have the power to change this.** Congress has the power to act and pass gun safety reform to protect everyday Americans.

We need to elect gun violence prevention champions who have the courage to stand up to the NRA and the gun lobby, unlike MAGA Republicans, who are beholden to them. body:
| | | Hi team -- It’s Diana, Research Director at the DSCC, and I urgently need your help. The GOP presidential primary is fast approaching, and a new CNN poll shows that Donald Trump “is in a league of his own,” with all other challengers falling _way behind._

We all know how _dangerous and destructive_ Donald Trump was during his four years at the White House, and we all remember how he brought our democracy itself to the brink...so if he’s going to be the GOP presidential nominee, **we need to know that Democrats are standing ready to fight back!**

We’ve launched our Trump Tracking Poll for 9/7/23 to _confirm_ that Democrats everywhere still reject Trump, but we don’t have your answer for today on file! Please, the poll closes at midnight, **so let us know before it's too late:**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

We recently hired our new Campaign Manager, Brody! = | = We’ve been working hard to build a winning strategy for next year’s critical election, and Brody will play a major role in helping us flip this district from red to blue. Brody is an experienced and highly qualified local campaign manager who already knows so much about our district - and has delivered decisive victories for campaigns in Tarrant and Dallas Counties. name: Team Casey
subject: We're on Roll Call's list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)
Peter,
We're on Roll Call's list of top Senate battleground states for the 2024 election.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230907-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230907-2&refcode2=585_552475_fADKYN&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230907-2?refcode=em20230907-2&refcode2=585_552475_fADKYN&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)**
We know this race won't be easy -- we're expecting a LOT of dark money and extreme Republican attacks to come our way soon.
We need the support of our grassroots team to fight back. Together, we can raise the funds that we need to amplify Senator Casey's long record of fighting for Pennsylvania's families.
**[Will you help make a contribution today so we'll be ready to fight back? We'll need all the support we can get to build a strong campaign and win this top Senate battleground.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230907-2?refcode=em20230907-2&refcode2=585_552475_fADKYN&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230907-2?refcode=em20230907-2&refcode2=585_552475_fADKYN&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)**
**The election may feel far away, but we can't afford to sit back, Peter.** National Republicans are desperate to win back the Senate, and they're preparing to spend millions of dollars to defeat Bob.
Pennsylvania is on the front lines of Democrats' fight to hold their razor-thin Senate majority. That's why we need to lay the groundwork now to create a strong campaign. **[Will you help us build a winning campaign by making a contribution? Every dollar adds up and makes a big impact.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230907-2?refcode=em20230907-2&refcode2=585_552475_fADKYN&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)**
With gratitude,
Team Casey

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=585%2E552475%2EfADKYN)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Lacey (Katie Porter's Campaign Manager)
subject: 9/7 update: CA-SEN poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29488%2E3422442%2EzRg99u)
Derek, the LA Times just released a new poll on our race and here’s what you should know:
1. We’re just three points behind the leading candidate.
2. Roughly a third of voters remain undecided.
3. Katie has a wide lead with young voters.

So here’s the plan: We need to reach millions of undecided voters who could sway this election, and turn out Katie supporters on Election Day in March so that we advance to the general election in November. [**Can you make a contribution today so we have the resources we need to send Katie to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230907-2?refcode=EMAL07_2_POL_20230907_V1_F&refcode2=29488_3422442_zRg99u&akid=29488%2E3422442%2EzRg99u)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230907-2?refcode=EMAL07_2_POL_20230907_V1_F&refcode2=29488_3422442_zRg99u&akid=29488%2E3422442%2EzRg99u)
Thanks a ton!
Lacey

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL07_2_POL_20230907_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=29488_3422442_zRg99u&akid=29488%2E3422442%2EzRg99u)**

| Peter,

_**I know the beginning of the school year can feel like things are just getting started, but Abigail has wasted no time getting to work as summer officially draws to a close.**_
* Abigail hosted a roundtable with Virginia healthcare professionals to focus on _**the**_ _**maternal health crisis.**_
* She got to work on a key issue for Virginians — working to pass common-sense gun violence prevention measures.
* Expanding upon her infrastructure work, she worked to protect a _**$30 internet discount for working families.**_
* The work to protect democracy is never done, so Abigail helped lead the charge to _**protect voting rights.**_

And that’s just in the last couple of weeks! Imagine what she can do with your support for the upcoming election. Abigail hosted a roundtable with Virginia healthcare professionals to focus on the maternal health crisis. She got to work on a key issue for Virginians — working to pass common-sense gun violence prevention measures. Expanding upon her infrastructure work, she worked to protect a $30 internet discount for working families. The work to protect democracy is never done, so Abigail helped lead the charge to protect voting rights. And that’s just in the last couple of weeks! name: Senator Chuck Grassley
subject: I’ve got a story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Catching up.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c4ae276c1a8249e480cd2dfb53d4f9af&_e=C7hdj_dHQfO6FKAMJJXIOaKLMY433vZP_gFFupCM3XuW-5WiwktQqLPV9zEQfgy4GrNinDh_yCaWs5WH1NhRfQErM6o4d7zekn2xAa3jy4QCq03nBIidbgJNQ80BXXNL7N4t6MmdxkBTVJMasCz2h852p_mp-dIJfBRdtrHnOW0mYhJPNJcQpGjoP3o0BqUCV8HJvLSCZ_akJTMvID-a4A09mFTtiAnMksJQ5TlZPpFdKcylCvK9UiP3y20rEB465LXRqWE8gkOnT7mOVK1uiz11OuOr01rMS_ADksn89uo%3D)
---
Friend,

**I can never forget what happened on October 25, 2012.**

We were minding our own business, Fred and I, on Highway 136, south of Dyersville, when a deer popped out of nowhere, hit our bumper, and scared the living daylights out of us.

It all happened in the blink of an eye. We came to a screeching halt, and the silence after the collision was deafening. We had no choice but to get out and assess the situation. When we got out to check the damage, nothing was left behind. Just some bumps on the fender, the deer vanished, and we had only one conclusion.

Assume deer dead.

The media was a little confused by this, and you might have never heard the whole story -- so there it is.

It's been a few years since I've told that story -- but I figured it might do some good to share something personal with you. Recently, I celebrated 69 years of marriage with my lovely wife, Barbara, and we want you to know how much we appreciate your prayers and support, I've been able to celebrate so many blessings this August, and I want to take this opportunity to thank you.

Together, we must keep up the good fight. When the Woke Left keeps coming after our way of life, from Meatless Mondays to pushing a radical climate agenda that's going after gas-powered cars, gas stoves, ceiling fans, water heaters, and dishwashers, you have to wonder what's next. **So -- I wanted to ask if you have a few minutes to help me out.**

**[Could you make a $5 contribution or anything you can spare to help Republicans take back the Senate and White House in 2024?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c4ae276c1a8249e480cd2dfb53d4f9af&_e=C7hdj_dHQfO6FKAMJJXIOaKLMY433vZP_gFFupCM3XuW-5WiwktQqLPV9zEQfgy4GrNinDh_yCaWs5WH1NhRfQErM6o4d7zekn2xAa3jy4QCq03nBIidbgJNQ80BXXNL_8ev1ZB8QXaUW1r9JV3fkPRcSn0pJt6FxqlpRd-a0Zdt3V16gVgn2xCfrG2m8uyiTHhTIEaQE84ht-CLgyG1SCsdB2zwyolnkf1HAmNYXT5kHY5QzT6v8j1ECIJ2_ZDJmtp5_vIkfp9Fr-PT_LhNIqlVTdexvOxm9txUlCPLnlQ%3D)** **The election is coming up fast, and we 're going to need the support of grassroots conservatives across the country if we're going to Take Back America in 2024.**

**
Best,

[](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c4ae276c1a8249e480cd2dfb53d4f9af&_e=C7hdj_dHQfO6FKAMJJXIOaKLMY433vZP_gFFupCM3XuW-5WiwktQqLPV9zEQfgy4GrNinDh_yCaWs5WH1NhRfQErM6o4d7zekn2xAa3jy4QCq03nBIidbgJNQ80BXXNLc2wQ45V6Kn0QI0VeiHg0hyLyXC3zuDPPkUHKDtaDKYlQMp-_8JQDz5hfdBe3fvwXI7IgbxLndH3fKEAx9nQJk6F1GnoYv3eChIZTJQs3y_ELUdNtchtFrBTlPC5xedYEMwezeLfUMj2bVyR5w-LYSrBW5zMC3A5Vybf1WC6iIy0%3D)

name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: Save the Date - Angela Alsobrooks in Montgomery County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=438%2E52803%2EtNjX_B)

| | Peter, Angela has been traveling all over the state talking with voters, and now she’s headed near you in few weeks! Angela has several events in Montgomery County this month and we hope that you'll be able to join us to hear more about her campaign. Angela is a proud, lifelong Marylander and as County Executive of Prince George's County, she has focused on creating jobs and growing economic opportunity, investing in education and breaking ground on 10 new schools, expanding access to health care, mental health and addiction treatment, youth outreach and making sure people are safe. Her U.S. Senate campaign is off to a strong start, and we hope that you'll be able to join us in a few weeks to learn more. Angela has built an impressive U.S. Senate campaign and has already been endorsed by over _90 elected officials from all across Maryland_ , including folks like Sen. Chris Van Hollen, Congressman Steny Hoyer, Congressman Kweisi Mfume and nearly 15 elected officials from across Montgomery County _The list of supporters continues to grow, and we would be honored to have you on our team._ We’re looking forward to the event and hope you can attend, and even invite some friends and neighbors to join you! _**Monday September 18 - 6:00 PM
featuring Special Guest Comptroller Brooke Lierman
**hosted by **
**_Obaid and Saima Ahmad | Fariha and Hasnain Aslam
Amanda Brown Lierman and Kyle Lierman | Rick Edson

** hosted by**

Susie and Bruce Turnbull | Linda and Bob Youngentob
**[RSVP HERE](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5489?t=9&akid=438%2E52803%2EtNjX_B)** We're so grateful for your consideration, and can’t wait to see everyone in Montgomery County soon! Team Alsobrooks

name: News Update via AndyBeshear.com
subject: Inside Elections: Andy could still lose this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
You need to see what Inside Elections is saying about Andy's chances → You need to see what _Inside Elections_ is saying about our race: "Even though he has a narrow advantage in the final weeks, **Beshear has little room for error and could still lose the race."**

Peter, right now, we’re seeing a massive surge in union power – from Teamsters to screenwriters – and it couldn’t come at a more critical moment. **At Emerge, we know that the labor movement has a huge role to play in ensuring a healthy democracy and protecting our essential rights for years to come.******
That’s why so many of our Emerge alums are proud union members and pro-labor leaders. In fact, **Emerge women represent 95 different unions – from education and trade unions to government and health care!**

I know where the true values of Michiganders lie, Peter. And if you read my team’s email from yesterday, you would know that John James simply cannot state the same. | | | **NYT:_Trump and Allies Forge Plans to Increase Presidential Power in 2025_**

**🚨Republicans are endangering our democracy🚨**
**Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have plans to take unprecedented control over the federal government if he returns to the White House – they’re calling this power-grab _“Project 2025.”_**
Here’s what they’re planning:
* **Building unilateral power.** Vital decisions around health care, public education, environmental protection, and more, could be made without _any_ independent oversight.
* **Cutting vital funding.** Republicans want to give the president powers to deny funding to programs that don’t align with the GOP’s priorities.
* **Stocking the government with Trump allies.** They’re set on stripping employment protections from dedicated civil servants, making it easier to replace them if they disagree with Republicans’ far-right platform.

This corrupt MAGA plot _demands_ our attention because it has the potential to reshape the entire government, affecting _every_ American in _every_ state. **It’s _dangerous_.**

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Corruption at the highest levels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, **Joe Biden and the Democrats are out of control.**

The Biden administration has weaponized the Department of Justice to go after their top presidential political opponent. The indictments of President Trump are nothing but a lousy scheme to distract the American people from the ongoing investigations into the Biden family.

Have you noticed that any time any potential criminal information comes out against the Biden Family, another indictment is laid on Donald Trump? **There is a clear and obvious two-tiered justice system and the Biden family consistently finds themselves on the right side of it.**

I will not stand for corruption in our government but I need your reinforcements. 2024 is a vital year for the future of our democracy and the choice is yours: **Allow the Democrats to continue their control of our country... or help Republicans take back America so we can get things back on track.**

**[Can I and other Republicans in Congress count on you?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=cabcd3a2aecc4bf79b3739762b79a5d6&_e=S4HdcSPwX1QAHmEsMka1TzIMV1Sh44iBG_XJGEEmOr2GQpIVuVvdbgDWa3Aqrnxn-LcO_sxt7IaXyrlbqeNes_DPJ3ad92cNVMlflLDM01J5h1hszqkHDeY-AXZvMP5lFsYf_4rtCv4AtVjd5DidGo8vb8u5mgPZjvcfDKqSsPPAaJtn67c2D_PpChJ90MnT7FThG02dSMGZfC_Dc9KyMXzrmMjTF9D01zicpXfIutDDJex3-G6WK92PfykHoDSYwOIG_0dijhbDXwsAoI8ZNO7sCW7Nmkq6d9SJ3pOhG1_HYaxnLkKtAfMf1080ATkh4I9PowlQvDOPOy768io4Att2ipD-AyKpIdwsBTejRyVI44n36txbkacuFfXh5dqv)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: BIG NEWS: We have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, this is Elissa Slotkin. I’m running for Senate in Michigan, and Tina asked me to reach out. I wanted to make sure you saw this big update in my U.S. Senate race: **after six months without any serious Republican opposition, former U.S. Representative Mike Rogers entered the race.** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377613/425946175/-1632499059?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230907_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTViMWU1ZC1kNDRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhJlQSZCYyejYzgfOQUpZQRU2-AcXsmhreVSa8nY1Jk=)
---
While this wasn't unexpected, Mike Rogers is the first serious Republican to announce his candidacy. Other Republicans, including former Congressman Peter Meijer and former Detroit Police Chief James Craig, are also apparently eyeing this seat, which could set up a very messy primary. We can expect to see the Republican candidates duke it out to earn their place as Donald Trump’s pick for this seat.
But as we always do here on Team Slotkin, we've done our homework, and we’re prepared to tell Michiganders about Mike Rogers and any other Republican who may enter the race.
As the only official serious contender for the Republican nomination, it’s important Michiganders understand exactly who Mike Rogers is: He was on the Trump national security transition team and was in talks to be Trump’s Director of FBI, but then got fired. Then he became a critic of Trump.
Regardless of his record on Trump, he's a true conservative. He supports extreme abortion bans; he voted to cut Social Security and Medicare; and, with an A-rating from the NRA, he voted to *expand* access to guns. He represented a version of my current congressional district, 4 years before I flipped it – but with a different set of values.
Unfortunately, his entry into the race will make this race competitive — and expensive. In 2020, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race cost nearly $200 million, all-in. We expect that this race will cost just as much (if not more). **Michigan is already a battleground state for the Presidency, and Rogers as a Senate candidate means that we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**
**[So given this important inflection point in the campaign, I’d love for you to consider splitting a contribution of $10 between my campaign for U.S. Senate and Tina Smith. Every donation following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377614/425946176/-1632499059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230907_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTViMWU1ZC1kNDRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhJlQSZCYyejYzgfOQUpZQRU2-AcXsmhreVSa8nY1Jk=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Elissa Slotkin and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_

When Will told me he was going to run for Congress again, I wasn’t sure what to think. Campaigns are expensive, time-consuming, and his opponents dragging his name through the mud isn’t something I love to see.
But after seeing Ken Calvert repeatedly attack the LGBTQ+ community -- at a time when we’re facing intensifying threats -- I knew Will couldn’t sit this out. The way I see it, he has a duty to win this seat, and I couldn't be prouder of how he’s responded.
I’ve always believed in Will, and yes, politics can get nasty. But after seeing the outpouring of support behind his campaign, I’m even more confident he can do this. And the fact is, winning means we all need to rally during the big moments -- like this deadline we’re facing this month.
[**Do me a huge favor and chip in $3 or more to help us meet our end-of-quarter goal. Take it from someone who's with Will every single day: your support matters and will go a long way in flipping CA-41. It will also mean I can come home to a partner who's a little less stressed. :)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377715/425946507/-1669222325?refcode=em-9.07.23-non-openers_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmZlMWIxMy1kNTRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HncNeMOLzO2KOsoBLn9DarlPB5q3Q6wchPZMF9q_NNY=)

name: Adam Frisch
subject: please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377976/425947297/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY4OTdkOS1kNzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZIWb4AiizsXZwg7qmQ50baeqdVD0PXVTmpxhFOtdRo=&emci=64f68d43-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f86897d9-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377977/425947298/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY4OTdkOS1kNzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZIWb4AiizsXZwg7qmQ50baeqdVD0PXVTmpxhFOtdRo=&emci=64f68d43-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f86897d9-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
[**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377978/425947299/1610638071?refcode=em20230907pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=f86897d9-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY4OTdkOS1kNzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZIWb4AiizsXZwg7qmQ50baeqdVD0PXVTmpxhFOtdRo=) **But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.**
Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.
The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country.
We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies.
How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and _listening_ to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible.
This time, things are already getting even nastier. Boebert’s Super PACs are going to try to smear me on every TV across the district.
**We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of raising another $150,000 for our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert, but right now we're still $27,873 short:**
[**If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? I’m grateful for every dollar you can afford to chip in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69377979/425947300/1610638071?refcode=em20230907pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=f86897d9-d74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODY4OTdkOS1kNzRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZIWb4AiizsXZwg7qmQ50baeqdVD0PXVTmpxhFOtdRo=)

name: Shawn (personal)
subject: Peter, I’m about to step onstage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Hey Peter, I’m about to step on the debate stage, and wow — I’m so grateful for the chance to dive into the issues that really matter to Louisianans. I hope you’re tuning in! I’m confident that we can lower costs for working families, reduce crime in our communities, and create good-paying jobs to grow Louisiana's middle class. But we can only do it if we work TOGETHER, and with a little over 3 weeks left until voters head to the polls, I need your support. **Peter, I’d love to get off the stage and see that you’ve shown some support for our people-first campaign. Will you chip in anything you can _right now_ to help us reach more voters before early voting begins on Sept. 30th?** **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-bax-em?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69378147/425948077/218720461?refcode=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc5NmNiNDAtZDk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MK9txFSU2jC9By7thKkf8E44KaHWkB7Y3N5D4LAwiSc=)_** I have to run, but remember this: Louisiana needs smart, practical, and compassionate leadership to overcome its slate of big challenges. Let’s show everyone that this is the campaign that will deliver it. Thank you — I hope to make you proud tonight! \- Shawn | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69378148/425948078/-342935317?refcode=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc5NmNiNDAtZDk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MK9txFSU2jC9By7thKkf8E44KaHWkB7Y3N5D4LAwiSc=&emci=82e01cc0-b44d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15236116) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69378149/425948079/1261052311?refcode=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc5NmNiNDAtZDk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MK9txFSU2jC9By7thKkf8E44KaHWkB7Y3N5D4LAwiSc=&emci=82e01cc0-b44d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15236116) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69378150/425948080/78109511?refcode=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc5NmNiNDAtZDk0ZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MK9txFSU2jC9By7thKkf8E44KaHWkB7Y3N5D4LAwiSc=&emci=82e01cc0-b44d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4796cb40-d94d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15236116) | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA

subject: RE: Battleground Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=1f0c187dbe6d4b03a72f573d4eb8f9eb&_e=MlOX5pFEmh3kmlfbdF-qZcDKEPs3nx_9Rw6uqnM6CEW38O3qrvtvO_eHINsqI-SgyFQsN-ZKatTq7tAooFd4nrhA7EULLf0NzysM9I49cOwV87c-ra1c98zVThCjnYjL2LE01RFa_YLHvTaCbagCnATWzfWb_ITdpYEu_ozlMJaRZgIy71Qd82PLwQYNsaJ-8hCertHZMOwe8SEKjNtm-oB6Fy5LEVsIMxvsFcc0Y1syiG1-A2s8N6ZCHC99rkfaqeon4TEDNMiEHmlfAj0lYruQRp3xB7ygWExtxp0k3pIPO0usfu9EFhvlBu1Cel4EUcPIbc_b_WdOScqlAMWZshd7pR8CL8qfIiTRaE3ZVdXCeMyjqRhAGIrSRMnaauEphpy-k3tE1OcjKpaz044b1H6StfO4-b2JnaCYd2Fxmvaq5GxVwe2AcHR76mZMK9cHX2mIj3025kInLdVbVcXHW4QQJK3gl3sDF-OY4DMrPfm0blRyNKPixY0XVZzcjr5M)
---
| | Patriot,

---
Wow!
---
Our campaign’s internal pollster found that we’re beating Crooked Joe by **EIGHT** **POINTS** in the __key battleground states__ that will decide the 2024 election.

---
While Biden’s weaponized Department of Justice as well as his accomplices in New York and Georgia continue to engage in Election Interference – and our RINO opponents attack me in the primary – _our campaign has remained laser-focused on laying the groundwork for victory in the most important battleground states._

---
**Your support has enabled us to rise above the very vicious and vile attacks from both Democrats and disloyal Republicans alike.**
---
No matter how many times the Left wrongfully arrests me, no matter how many mugshots they take of me, and no matter how many special interest dollars the globalist RINOs spend against me, you can have full confidence that I will NEVER, _EVER_ take my eyes off the _real_ mission at hand: __firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House_._
---
That’s why I made the (_wise!_) decision to launch our Battleground Victory Fund at the beginning of 2023 – and _**NOT**_ wait until 2024.
---
If we had waited until 2024, we certainly wouldn’t be sitting on an 8-point lead right now – that I can assure you!
---
Wouldn’t you like somebody with that level of foresight and early planning in charge of our country right now? _Just sayin’!_
---

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | | | Patriot, Wow! Our campaign’s internal pollster found that we’re beating Crooked Joe by EIGHT POINTS in the key battleground states that will decide the 2024 election. While Biden’s weaponized Department of Justice as well as his accomplices in New York and Georgia continue to engage in Election Interference – and our RINO opponents attack me in the primary – our campaign has remained laser-focused on laying the groundwork for victory in the most important battleground states. Your support has enabled us to rise above the very vicious and vile attacks from both Democrats and disloyal Republicans alike. No matter how many times the Left wrongfully arrests me, no matter how many mugshots they take of me, and no matter how many special interest dollars the globalist RINOs spend against me, you can have full confidence that I will NEVER, EVER take my eyes off the real mission at hand: firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House. That’s why I made the (wise!) decision to launch our Battleground Victory Fund at the beginning of 2023 – and NOT wait until 2024. If we had waited until 2024, we certainly wouldn’t be sitting on an 8-point lead right now – that I can assure you! Wouldn’t you like somebody with that level of foresight and early planning in charge of our country right now? Just sayin’! Patriot, it’s now critical that we keep our Battleground Victory Fund fully funded at all moments throughout the election up until the very last vote is cast on November 5, 2024. | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: | | | | | My friend, You are an integral part of my campaign, and your support has meant the world to me. From donations to retweets, every bit of your support has made a positive impact on our campaign. That's why I'm reaching out to you first, friend. With common sense in such short supply in our politics, this is an exclusive membership card that shows how generous you've been to this campaign. Let's bring common sense back to Washington DC. Thank you,Will Hurd Candidate for President & Former TX Congressman | | | | | | |
